name: My Father, the BTK Killer
description: A woman recounts what it was like to grow up with a parent who seemed ordinary at home while secretly committing horrific crimes. Through her perspective, the film explores the shock of discovery, the long aftermath for loved ones, and how a community can be blindsided by evil hiding in plain sight.

name: The Patron Saint of Roadkill
description: Andy's bogus job search comes to an end when they accept a mysterious position giving funerals to roadkill.

name: Lost Horizon
description: A former soldier, now working for hire, fights to rescue the innocent in a land torn by war. Facing ruthless enemies and betrayal, he struggles for survival, justice, and redemption.

name: Finding Hozho
description: An older man takes in his estranged father during his final days, forcing him to face long-buried childhood pain. As memories resurface, he searches for a path toward healing and forgiveness, shaped by traditional Navajo teachings.

name: Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show
description: Filmed at the end of a massive tour stop in Vancouver, this concert film captures the full on-stage experience, featuring the complete Tortured Poets Department set. The show runs for several hours and is presented as a grand, end-of-tour event for the crowd in front of it.

name: R.L. Stine's Pumpkinhead
description: After a family moves to a small town ahead of Halloween, strange events begin when one child vanishes and the adults act like he never existed. The remaining sibling teams up with new friends to investigate a local curse and a creepy presence before the missing child is lost for good.

name: Terry McMillan Presents: His, Hers & Ours
description: Two parents are pulled into each other’s orbit when their teenage children start dating, turning family time into something unexpectedly complicated. As they try to keep things simple, a private attraction grows in quiet moments away from everyone else.

name: Christina Aguilera: Christmas in Paris
description: A dazzling live celebration marking the 25th anniversary of global superstar Christina Aguilera’s beloved holiday album My Kind of Christmas – culminating in an unforgettable visual spectacular; channeling fantasy, grandeur, and theatrical wonder.

name: The Rats: A Witcher Tale
description: A gang of six misfit outlaws plans a daring heist, but pulling it off means doing the one thing they’ve avoided: trusting each other. To boost their odds, they team up with a washed-up monster hunter whose help comes with its own risks and complications.

name: Maya & Samar
description: In contemporary Athens, two young women from clashing cultural backgrounds begin a brief but intense romance. As their connection draws attention, it puts one of them in serious danger while the other is suddenly thrust into the spotlight through viral online fame.

name: Misfits
description: From childhood innocence to the chaos of adulthood, we follow Josh-a widowed father-and his loyal band of misfit friends as they fight to save his family and home. In a last-ditch effort, Josh and his best friend Ryan enter a holiday-themed high-stakes wrestling match. As the crew rallies together, unexpected allies surface and signs from Josh's late wife Sandy appear, guiding their turbulent journey. What follows is an unpredictable mix of calamity, comedy, and camaraderie-leading to a gritty and moving conclusion.

name: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Last Straw
description: A laidback middle-schooler keeps stumbling into messy, funny disasters while trying to live up to his father's high expectations. When the pressure turns into an ultimatum, he has to prove he can take responsibility, leading to a family-focused adventure with plenty of chaos and heart.

name: The Observance
description: After five years in a coma caused by a devastating crash, a woman wakes up to find her home life transformed. A secretive religious group has tightened its hold over her family and property, and she must navigate fear, control, and hidden truths as the group fights to keep its secrets buried.

name: The Roughneck
description: An oil worker heading to his wedding with his dog is thrown off course by a brutal attack at a rest stop. As he joins forces with his estranged father to get answers, their search for revenge exposes buried trouble in a remote community.

name: We're So Dead
description: The restaurant is dead in more ways than one. A huge party has canceled and dashed their hopes of a big holiday tip. Surviving the shift becomes much more than side work and a deep clean, when a Karen, unhappiness with her service, goes on a spree to murder the entire staff.

name: Denzel Washington: Falling Forward
description: This documentary traces a celebrated performer’s rise from modest beginnings to major success across television, theater, and blockbuster films. It highlights the setbacks, risks, and determination that shaped a long career spanning Broadway revivals and Hollywood hits.

name: All Saints Day
description: A worried sibling pulls together an estranged brother and a long-missing sister to help save their oldest brother from spiraling out of control. The attempt turns into a chaotic reunion and a messy intervention that pushes the family toward hard truths, forgiveness, and a fresh start.

name: He Wasn't Man Enough
description: After a painful romantic betrayal, a successful writer reconnects with someone from her past and finds support in an unlikely circle. What begins as heartbreak becomes a warm journey about friendship, trust, and healing after disappointment.

name: Predator: Wastelands
description: An alien hunter lands on Earth and begins wiping out brutal warlords, earning unexpected support from people living under their rule. As the body count rises, the conflict builds toward a showdown with the most feared leader of them all.

name: Frankenstein: The Anatomy Lesson
description: This short behind-the-scenes documentary follows the cast and crew as they bring a new version of a classic story to life, guided by a visionary director. It highlights the ambition, dedication, and hands-on work involved in building detailed sets, designs, and effects while capturing the team’s creative process.

name: Breakdown: 1975
description: Set in 1975 amid America’s social and political upheaval, this documentary looks at how filmmakers turned the era’s chaos into art. It connects movies to the broader national mood, spanning the time from the aftermath of Watergate through the Bicentennial.

name: Kumail Nanjiani: Night Thoughts
description: A comedian returns to Chicago for a new stand-up special that mixes personal stories with sharp observations. The set dives into anxiety, therapy, awkward pre-legalization drug-buying, and the surprisingly high-stakes world of cat medication, balancing laughs with a heartfelt tone.

name: Trap 48
description: After a loved one dies from counterfeit drugs, a grieving man becomes consumed by revenge against the person responsible. As he tries to rebuild his life through school and a more honest future, he is pulled between anger and the chance to become someone better.

name: Murder in Monaco
description: Set in Monaco in 1999, this documentary centers on the sudden death of a wealthy banker at his penthouse. It revisits the circumstances around the case, probing what happened and why, through investigation details, testimonies, and the surrounding social context.

name: Music City Mistletoe
description: In Nashville, a spirited songwriter and a widowed consultant clash over the fate of a music publishing office. As Christmas nears, rivalry turns to romance in this conflict-filled holiday tale where saving dreams means risking hearts.

name: Sandiwara
description: In a bustling Malaysian night market, five different people share their own stories as their paths brush past one another. Through everyday moments, the film offers a window into sides of Malaysian culture that are rarely shown on screen.

name: The Making of Jay Kelly
description: This behind-the-scenes documentary takes viewers through the making of a film, blending on-set material with finished scenes to show how key moments came together. It aims for a personal, reflective look at the creative process from first image to final note.

name: The Strawberry
description: After a life-changing diagnosis, a man tries to reconnect with his fractured family and find meaning in the everyday joys he once ignored. As painful history resurfaces and relationships begin to mend, he searches for peace and a sense of closure.

name: Stranger Things: Fireplace
description: A cozy holiday fireplace special brings crackling flames, glowing lights, and a playful hint of spooky mystery. It blends a warm seasonal mood with an eerie, upside-down twist for a simple watch you can leave on in the background.

name: Marty, Life Is Short
description: Martin Short reflects on a life driven by joy in this documentary. It mixes classic clips, new interviews, and star-studded never-before-seen home movies.

name: Ted Bunny
description: A documentary crew follows a lead tied to a notorious killer’s legacy, only to find themselves pulled into a grim, rabbit-themed nightmare. As the investigation spirals, the group faces escalating violence and a chaotic hunt for survival amid a strange mix of shock, dark humor, and slasher mayhem.

name: The Anacondas
description: A group of explorers in Mexico discovers the ruins of an ancient snake-worshiping civilization. Their excitement turns into a fight for survival when they awaken a massive anaconda that has been dormant for centuries, forcing the team to work together to escape alive.

name: Homecoming: The Tokyo Series
description: In 2025, as MLB's Dodgers and Cubs clash in Tokyo for a historic season opener, their games become a lens into Japan's passionate baseball culture and the values that bind two nations through America's pastime.

name: Kidnapped: Elizabeth Smart
description: Elizabeth Smart’s abduction at 14 unfolds in a documentary told through her own words and includes never-before-seen material. Set against the family’s Utah home and the months that follow, it builds a tense, firsthand account of what she endured.

name: Elway
description: Told in his own words, the definitive story of Denver Broncos quarterback John Elway goes deep on his NFL dreams, heartbreaks and Super Bowl redemption.

name: Cheetahs Up Close with Bertie Gregory
description: In the Serengeti during the wildebeest migration, a wildlife filmmaker follows cheetahs up close, from a mother raising tiny cubs to a young male group learning to hunt together. Along the way, the film highlights the speed, teamwork, and everyday pressures these animals face in a demanding season.

name: Dave Chappelle: The Unstoppable...
description: In this stand-up special, a veteran comic tackles a world that feels off balance with blunt commentary, personal reflections, and provocative jokes. It plays more like an unfiltered talk about culture and current events than a rapid-fire laugh fest.

name: Dune: Part Three
description: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

name: One Last Adventure: The Making of Stranger Things 5
description: This documentary looks back at the years of work behind the final chapter of a major series, showing how many people helped bring its world to life. It focuses on the effort, collaboration, challenges, and emotion involved in saying goodbye.

name: Oscar Shaw
description: A retired detective, still shaken by a personal loss, is pulled back into a violent case that forces him to operate outside the system. As he hunts for answers and revenge, he struggles to balance redemption with the cost of taking justice into his own hands.

name: Kill Tony: Once Upon a Time in Texas
description: This stand-up showcase throws rising comedians onto the stage for a single minute, where they perform in front of a host and celebrity panel. Set in Austin, it mixes quick sets, live reactions, and on-the-spot feedback in a loud, high-pressure comedy event.

name: Twenty One Pilots: More Than We Ever Imagined
description: This concert film drops you into a massive Mexico City stadium show, capturing the rush of a sold-out crowd and a high-energy set. Between songs, it slips backstage for candid moments that show the pressure, preparation, and personality behind a career-defining night.

name: 19 Hz
description: A visionary inventor spends his final years chasing a hidden goal: finding a way to connect with something beyond ordinary human reach. Framed around a little-known obsession behind a famous legacy, the story blends historical intrigue with a mysterious, otherworldly pull.

name: Miracle: The Boys of '80
description: A group of young American hockey players relives the 1980 Winter Olympics run that turned them into a symbol of hope during the Cold War. Using rare archival footage and present-day reflections, the film revisits the pressure, the teamwork, and the national mood surrounding a historic upset and a gold-medal dream.

name: Nuptials
description: A young couple on their honeymoon is forced to experience each other’s darkest desires. As the lines between reality and sanity blur, a sinister presence keeps them trapped in their bridal suite and tries to seduce them towards unbearable truths.

name: Lazarus: The Awakening
description: A resurrected vigilante takes on a violent drug empire in a city overwhelmed by fentanyl. As the fight pulls in powerful criminals and those searching for the truth, a mission for justice escalates into an all-out war.

name: The Investigation of Lucy Letby
description: This true-crime documentary revisits a high-profile case involving a hospital nurse convicted of multiple infant deaths, tracing how suspicions grew and how authorities built their case. Along the way, it raises questions about evidence, accountability, and the challenges of presenting sensitive testimony while protecting those affected.

name: A Gorilla Story: Told by David Attenborough
description: Veteran naturalist Sir David Attenborough recounts a remarkable group of gorillas, beginning with his first encounter in the '70s and continuing through to the present day. The story traces how his perspective on these animals has grown over time.

name: Mary J. Blige Presents Be Happy
description: As her youngest child leaves home, a longtime wife and mother starts questioning the life she has built and the distance growing in her marriage. A trip to New Orleans reconnects her with old passions and forces her to consider what happiness and self-worth really mean.

name: Unauthorized Love
description: After losing a partner in a car accident, a woman is reluctant to open her heart again. When she meets someone new who seems charming and promising, the chance at love is complicated by hidden intentions.

name: Ice Beast
description: When a young girl goes out to search for her missing grandfather, the cold is not the only thing she has to survive. As night falls and the snow closes in, she begins to realize she is not alone and whatever is out there has been waiting.

name: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
description: After a mishap leaves a stray kitten without a home, a helpful pup offers a place to stay for the night. The unexpected guest quickly turns the evening chaotic, leading to a warm lesson about asking for help when things get overwhelming.

name: Daydream
description: A young adult recounts childhood memories involving his 6th grade teacher and the lessons she taught, particularly her unconventional assignment: to daydream.

name: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
description: With rare access and a no-holds-barred approach, an acclaimed documentarian investigates an ultra-masculine online network and its controversial influencers. The film follows the personalities behind the content to explore how their ideas spread and how their self-styled identities play out in real life.

name: Refuge
description: Four estranged friends reunite for a quiet fishing trip, hoping to mend old wounds. When a child goes missing and a frantic father points the finger, the getaway spirals into suspicion, fear, and a dangerous fight to survive.

name: I Don't Love You Anymore
description: A man is found dead in a suburban couple’s pool, and the details don’t add up. As police question the couple separately, their clashing stories replay the same night from shifting viewpoints, uncovering a tangled web of deceit, desire, and long-buried truths.

name: Sniper: No Nation
description: A pair of elite operatives head into Venezuela on a high-stakes rescue mission after their friends are taken hostage. As the situation escalates, they must rely on precision, teamwork, and quick decisions to bring everyone home safely.

name: World of Westeros Ambient Video
description: A cozy ambient video from the Game of Thrones world.

name: Untold: Jail Blazers
description: Volatile players and criminal charges collide with national headlines in Portland’s championship-caliber NBA team. This unflinching documentary follows the implosion as the season spirals into explosive, real-world fallout.

name: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition
description: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition is a five-decade documentary with unprecedented access to official archives and intimate recollections from current and past band members. It follows the journey from East London pubs to major stadiums, with exclusive interviews and all-new animated sequences featuring Eddie.

name: The Boy with My Son's Face
description: After losing her baby and serving time for a crime she cannot remember, a woman tries to rebuild her life on parole. Her fragile fresh start is shaken when she comes across a photograph that raises troubling new questions.

name: Orangutan
description: This nature documentary takes you into the rainforest canopy of Southeast Asia to observe a lively orangutan community up close. Along the way, it follows a curious young orangutan as it approaches a major step toward independence in a jungle full of wildlife.

name: Love Is Blind: The Reunion
description: After the weddings, this reunion special brings the group back together to share where their relationships stand and confront lingering questions. Emotions run high as they revisit major moments and compare stories in a tell-all setting.

name: Jerry West: The Logo
description: He shaped dynasties, helped break barriers, and became the silhouette that defines the game. Through rare interviews with family and basketball icons, this story explores the drive, perfection, and pain behind that legendary legacy.

name: The Crash
description: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.

name: Finding Harry: The Craft Behind the Magic
description: This behind-the-scenes special follows the creative teams shaping a beloved fantasy book series for television, from casting to sets, costumes, and creature work. Through interviews and production footage, it highlights how key roles were chosen and how artists and technicians are rebuilding a detailed magical world for a new generation.

name: Immortal Combat
description: History’s most legendary warriors are pulled from different eras and forced into a brutal contest run by a secretive group. As the fighting escalates, the captives begin pushing back against the people controlling the deadly spectacle.

name: The Amazing Digital Circus: The Last Act
description: With Caine gone and the circus dark, the cast are left with only the mistakes and traumas of their pasts to keep them company. As the prospect of eternity closes in around them, they discover the truth about the Digital Circus and its history.  Will they come to terms with what they uncover, or will they make… the other choice? Also, presumably at some point someone says something funny, because this ending can’t be THAT depressing, can it? A theatrical screening of episode 8 and the all new, hour-long episode 9.

name: The Loud House: European Adventure
description: The Louds are headed to Europe, where they'll attend a knighting ceremony in London, search for the world's best pizza in Italy, spend a night in a creepy castle in Transylvania, ski the Swiss alps, and time-travel to ancient Greece!

name: The Gardener
description: A cosmetics heiress faces a hostile takeover of her company and retreats to a remote mountain cottage to regroup. Away from the pressure, she finds unexpected comfort and a sense of renewal through a connection with a mysterious local gardener.

name: Thera: The Inverted Planet
description: On another world much like our own, a young Samoyed named Seamus Alessandro O'Shaughnessy discovers a lost girl named Dakota who has unfathomable magic! Seamus must overcome great challenges both physical & emotional alongside his best friend Carolina Oriqueda Campbell Keeshond-Seal to save Great Canyon City from the Menace known as The Blurred Blaze! Can our heroes defeat their foes while simultaneously protecting an innocent child in the process? And who exactly is The Blurred Blaze?

name: My Husband's Other Wife
description: After losing her husband, a widow begins uncovering disturbing secrets about the life he kept hidden from her. As the truth slips further out of reach, she is pulled into a tense mystery filled with deception and danger.

name: iHeartRadio Jingle Ball 2025
description: This holiday music special brings together major artists and celebrity guests for a festive celebration filled with live performances and seasonal cheer. It is built as a feel-good event centered on pop music and holiday spirit.

name: Silent Hymns
description: In 1920s Southern Ireland during the civil war, a remote farming village begins to wither as livestock are found bloodless and families vanish overnight. When a travelling outsider arrives, they uncover an old folk belief the villagers pretend not to remember.

name: Masters of the Universe
description: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

name: Avatar: Fire and Ash
description: After the devastation of war and the loss of their eldest son, a family on Pandora faces a new, violent threat from the Ash People. Led by a ruthless Na’vi warrior, this power struggle forces them to fight for survival and for Pandora’s future, testing them emotionally and physically.

name: Snow White
description: After a kind ruler vanishes, a cruel monarch takes control of a once-peaceful kingdom. Forced to flee into a dark forest, a young princess finds unexpected allies and begins a hopeful fight to survive, resist cruelty, and restore goodness to the land.

name: Motor City
description: In 1970s Detroit, a man’s new romance puts him in the crosshairs of a well-connected local gangster. After being framed and sent to prison, he teams up with old friends and sets his sights on escape and payback to reclaim the life that was taken from him.

name: Space/Time
description: After a deadly experiment shuts down a high-stakes project, a disgraced group of scientists turns to the criminal underworld to rebuild a forbidden engine that can bend space. As the risks grow, their work could become humanity’s last hope or trigger a global disaster.

name: Afterburn
description: After a massive solar flare destroys the Eastern Hemisphere, a postapocalyptic Earth forces mutated life to survive in a harsh new world. Treasure hunters race to extract legendary objects like famous art, ancient artifacts, and jewels while clashing with rival groups, mutants, and pirates.

name: Red Sonja
description: After a devastating past, a determined young warrior rises to become a legendary fighter feared across the land. In a sword-and-sorcery world filled with monsters and escalating battles, she sets out to prove herself and carve out a brutal new destiny.

name: The Brink of War
description: At the most dangerous point of the Cold War, political enemies Ronald Reagan and Mikhail Gorbachev meet in Iceland over one long, tense weekend to decide if there will be peace or war. They sit across from each other, choosing to unclench their fists and instead extend their hands — a triumph of overcoming fear, differences, egos, and consequences.

name: How to Make a Killing
description: A blue-collar outsider learns he sits far down the line for a massive family fortune and becomes determined to change those odds. This dark comedy thriller follows a risky climb through a world of privilege, greed, and increasingly messy consequences.

name: Ballerina
description: Set during the events of John Wick: Chapter 3 – Parabellum, Eve begins training in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma. As her new life takes shape, she sets her sights on a path of vengeance tied to what was taken from her.

name: Hamilton
description: This filmed version of the Broadway hit tells the story of an American founding father, framing the era of early America “then” through the lens of today. It covers his rise and major public work, bringing big historical moments to the stage with nonstop musical storytelling.

name: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
description: Ethan Hunt and his team race against time to track a terrifying AI called the Entity, which has infiltrated intelligence networks worldwide. With support from new allies and a mysterious connection from his past, they pursue a way to shut it down before governments—and the future—change forever.

name: Final Destination Bloodlines
description: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, a college student heads back home to find the one person who may be able to stop a cycle of deadly events threatening her family. As she digs for answers, she becomes convinced the danger is tied to something from the past that won’t stay buried.

name: TRON: Ares
description: A powerful digital program crosses from a virtual world into reality on a dangerous mission, forcing humanity into its first direct encounter with artificial intelligence beings. The story mixes high-tech action with questions about what happens when a controlled digital force meets the unpredictability of the human world.

name: Den of Thieves 2: Pantera
description: Big Nick returns to hunt down Donnie across Europe, closing in as diamond thieves and the Panther mafia circle a massive robbery. With a planned heist targeting the world’s largest diamond exchange, the chase escalates into a dangerous game of shifting loyalties.

name: The Long Walk
description: In a bleak alternate America, a group of teenage boys enters a harsh annual walking contest where slowing down has deadly consequences. As exhaustion, fear, and pressure mount, the march becomes a brutal test of endurance, purpose, and survival.

name: Trap House
description: An undercover DEA agent teams up with a partner to hunt down a daring crew of thieves. But the targets turn out to be rebellious teenagers who start using their parents’ tactics and top-secret intel, turning the chase into a high-stakes game of cat and mouse.

name: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
description: Set in a 1960s-inspired retro-futuristic world, the Fantastic Four must juggle family life and hero duties while defending Earth from Galactus and his enigmatic Herald. Their tight bond is tested as a cosmic threat forces them to make impossible choices under immense pressure, blending grounded family stakes with intergalactic danger.

name: Super Troopers 3
description: When Farva’s wildly over-the-top Indian engagement to Thorny’s sister spirals into chaos, the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny’s schemes to break up the relationship, while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring  — all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself.

name: Return to Silent Hill
description: After receiving a mysterious letter, a grieving man returns to Silent Hill, a familiar town now swallowed by darkness. Searching for his lost love, he encounters monstrous threats and unsettling psychological distortions that challenge his grip on reality.

name: Cold Storage
description: A contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, turning a routine night shift into a fight for survival. Two employees, with help from a seasoned bioterror operative, race to stop the threat from spreading and ending humanity.

name: Project Hail Mary
description: A science teacher wakes up alone aboard a spaceship far from home, with no memory of how he got there. As his recollections return, he realizes he has to solve the mystery behind a substance threatening the sun, using his science skills and unconventional thinking to save Earth.

name: Nightmare Hospital
description: A horror film about a pilot who is the sole survivor of the plane crash in the deep unknown. He must survive in an isolated building where something evil is waiting.

name: The Electric State
description: An orphaned teen sets out on a journey with a mysterious robot to find her long-lost brother. Along the way, she teams up with a smuggler and his sidekick as they navigate a retro-styled dystopian world.

name: Shadow Force
description: Two elite operatives who once led a secret multinational unit break the rules by starting a family and disappear to protect their child. With a bounty on their heads and their former team closing in, staying hidden becomes impossible and their fight for safety escalates into open conflict.

name: The Smashing Machine
description: Set in the late 1990s, an up-and-coming mixed martial artist chases greatness in and out of the ring. Along the way, he struggles with opioid dependence and strains in a volatile relationship with his girlfriend, testing whether he can stay focused on his biggest competition goal.

name: Heads of State
description: A UK prime minister and a US president let their very public rivalry threaten an important alliance. When a dangerous enemy targets them, they’re forced into an on-the-run, globe-hopping scramble with help from a sharp intelligence agent to stop a conspiracy with worldwide stakes.

name: The Unbreakable Boy
description: A family faces unexpected challenges when they learn their young son is autistic and has a fragile-bone condition. As they adjust, they lean on growing faith and his resilient spirit, discovering joy, gratitude, and courage through difficult moments.

name: Newborn
description: After years in solitary confinement, a man steps back into the outside world hoping to rebuild his life and reconnect with family. But freedom brings new pressures, turning everyday moments into a tense psychological struggle as he tries to find stability again.

name: In the Lost Lands
description: A queen sends a feared sorceress into a ghostly wilderness to find a magical power. Guided by a drifter, they must survive a land crawling with deadly creatures—while also battling both human pursuers and demons.

name: The Actor
description: Paul Cole finds himself stranded in a mysterious small town with no memory of who he is or how he got here. As bits and pieces of his past slowly emerge, he attempts to find his way home, but time is slippery, appearances can't be trusted, and it's unclear which of his identities is real.

name: Havoc
description: After a drug heist spirals into deadly chaos, a jaded cop pushes through a corrupt criminal underworld to protect a politician’s son. The escalating fallout pulls him into betrayal, violence, and desperate attempts to regain control of the situation.

name: Keeper
description: Liz and Malcolm head to a secluded cabin for a romantic anniversary weekend. When Malcolm leaves unexpectedly, Liz is left alone as strange presences build isolation and fear, and the cabin seems to hide horrifying secrets.

name: Captain America: Brave New World
description: A newly established hero is drawn into an international crisis after a White House meeting goes horribly wrong. As global tensions rise, he must untangle a dangerous conspiracy and stop a hidden force from pushing powerful nations toward chaos.

name: Greenland 2: Migration
description: After finding relative safety in a Greenland bunker, a family is forced to leave when disaster strikes again. They must cross the devastated wastelands of Europe, facing danger at every turn, to reach a new potential home and keep each other going.

name: The Running Man
description: In a harsh near-future, a struggling father joins a deadly televised competition to pay for his child’s care. As he runs from professional hunters and a watching public, his survival turns into a challenge to the system profiting from the spectacle.

name: Wolf Man
description: A couple leaves city life behind for a remote Oregon farmhouse, hoping for a quiet family break. But after an attack from something lurking outside, the night turns into a tense fight to stay safe as one of them starts changing in unsettling ways.

name: Faces of Death
description: A website content moderator starts coming across violent videos that seem to recreate shocking death scenes from an older film. As the clips keep appearing, she begins looking into where they came from and gets pulled into a dangerous situation at work and beyond.

name: The Old Guard 2
description: Andy and her immortal allies return with renewed purpose as they battle a powerful new foe. Their mission to protect humanity takes them into escalating danger and urgent conflict, forcing the team to rely on what they’ve learned and what they still can’t escape.

name: Wild Horse Nine
description: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ. Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

name: Becoming Led Zeppelin
description: This documentary follows the four members as they navigate the 1960s music scene, building their paths through small British clubs and influential performances. It leads to their summer 1968 rehearsal, where their coming together reshapes their future and sets the stage for major music history.

name: Silent Night, Deadly Night
description: After a childhood Christmas tragedy, a drifting young man takes on a twisted Santa persona and targets people he sees as bad. When he settles in a small town during the holiday season, an unexpected connection begins to pull him in a different direction.

name: Desert Warrior
description: In seventh-century Arabia, a royal woman rejects a cruel ruler’s control and escapes into the desert with her father. Hunted by an army, she must rely on unlikely allies, face tribal divisions, and find the courage to fight for freedom.

name: Mickey 17
description: An unlikely worker, repeatedly used for dangerous missions, is forced into an extraordinary job that requires the ultimate sacrifice. As he operates in a far-off colony, the situation turns complicated and raises unsettling questions about identity and ethics in the future.

name: The Home
description: A troubled man takes a job at a retirement home and quickly senses something is seriously wrong. As he investigates the building and its forbidden fourth floor, he uncovers unsettling secrets tied to residents and caretakers—and starts to connect the mystery to his own foster-child past and upbringing.

name: Smurfs
description: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards, Smurfette leads the Smurfs on a mission into the real world to find him. Along the way, they meet new allies and search for what defines their destiny, as they work to save the universe from spreading danger.

name: Hypochondriac
description: A young potter’s life devolves into chaos as he loses function of his body while being haunted by the physical manifestation of his childhood trauma.

name: The Parenting
description: Two boyfriends plan a weekend getaway to introduce their parents, hoping for a calm bonding trip. Instead, their country rental turns into a chaotic pressure cooker when they realize the house is haunted by a centuries-old poltergeist, forcing everyone to face awkward family dynamics amid escalating supernatural trouble.

name: Americana
description: When a rare Lakota Ghost Shirt resurfaces in the black market, it pulls in outsiders and outcasts in a small South Dakota town. Their lives collide as greed and old wounds turn a normal day into a violent, tangled chase.

name: The Red Queen
description: A young software engineer ventures into a vivid journey to study a newly developed A.I. interface.

name: K-Pops!
description: A down-on-his-luck musician heads to Korea hoping to write songs for K-pop stars and revive his career. When he discovers a personal connection to a rising new group, he tries to ride the wave of fame, only to find that family matters more than the spotlight.

name: The Shrouds
description: A grieving widower creates a controversial technology that lets people watch their loved ones’ remains from inside their graves. When several burial sites are vandalized, he’s pulled into a tense search for who’s responsible, forcing him to confront how far obsession and new tech can reshape mourning.

name: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
description: In 1940, a self-exiled gangster must return to Birmingham after his estranged son is pulled into a Nazi plot. With his family at risk and Britain under threat, he faces a desperate mission tied to counterfeiting and national survival.

name: Play Dirty
description: An expert thief is pulled into a major heist with a ruthless plan, but his crew must navigate multiple powerful enemies to make it work. The job escalates into a high-stakes showdown involving organized crime, a political strongman, and a world-level power player.

name: The Gorge
description: Two highly trained operatives are assigned to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge, isolated from each other and the world. As they form a bond across the distance, a hidden danger below forces them into a fight for survival.

name: Wicked: For Good
description: After conflict erupts in Oz, two longtime friends are forced to come together again. As anger and propaganda threaten their futures, they must face each other with honesty and empathy to change themselves—and Oz—for good.

name: Thunderbolts*
description: After seven disillusioned castoffs find themselves trapped in a deadly situation, they must work together on a dangerous mission. As the team pushes forward, they’re forced to face the darkest parts of their pasts and decide what kind of heroes they want to be.

name: Hell of a Summer
description: A 24-year-old returning counselor arrives early for a summer camp weekend and quickly feels out of place among younger co-workers. As tensions and jokes fly, a masked killer begins targeting the staff, forcing the group to stick together and figure out how to survive the night.

name: The Dink
description: Desperate to save a struggling country club and earn his father's respect, a washed-up tennis pro is compelled to break a sacred vow and do the unthinkable: play pickleball.

name: A Minecraft Movie
description: Four misfits are pulled through a mysterious portal into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic world where imagination powers everything. To find their way back home, they must learn the rules of this place during a magical quest alongside an unexpected expert crafter.

name: Fixed
description: After a pet dog learns he’s about to be neutered, he bolts for a final 24-hour blowout with his closest buddies. The result is a chaotic, raunchy, and surprisingly heartfelt misadventure that mixes crude jokes with friendship, self-worth, and a few pointed jabs at human behavior.

name: The Alto Knights
description: Two notorious New York crime bosses, once close friends, fight for control of the city’s streets as jealousies and betrayals pile up. As power shifts, outside pressure and rising criminal opportunities force hard choices, turning their rivalry into a dangerous collision that reshapes the Mafia’s future.

name: Borderline
description: After escaping from a mental hospital, a violent sociopath launches a dangerous rampage, fixating on a world-famous pop star. He targets her at home, convinced they’re meant to be together, creating a tense and unpredictable hostage situation.

name: Peter Pan's Neverland Nightmare
description: A young woman sets out to rescue her brother after he’s taken by a terrifying, corrupted version of a childhood legend. Her search pulls her into a grim world of violence and addiction, where familiar fairy-tale elements are twisted into something far more disturbing.

name: Elio
description: Elio, a space-obsessed kid with an active imagination, is swept into a cosmic misadventure where he has to connect with eccentric alien life and deal with an intergalactic crisis. Along the way, he must uncover who he’s truly meant to be.

name: People We Meet on Vacation
description: Poppy is a carefree free spirit, while Alex is a planner who prefers structure. After years of annual summer vacations, the two longtime friends start questioning whether their chemistry could turn into a real romantic match.

name: Alexander and the Terrible, Horrible, No Good, Very Bad Road Trip
description: An 11-year-old and their family set off on a dream Spring Break trip to Mexico City, hoping for fun and connection. But after they come across a cursed idol, the vacation turns into a string of chaotic mishaps that tests their patience, teamwork, and outlook.

name: The Conjuring: Last Rites
description: A pair of paranormal investigators face what may be their final and most frightening case, as a family is threatened by mysterious entities. As the haunting grows more intense, the investigators must confront fear, faith, and the weight of their long history with the supernatural.

name: The Naked Gun
description: A wildly clumsy police officer follows a family legacy while trying to solve a murder case that could decide the future of his squad. The case quickly pulls him into a larger threat, with absurd mishaps and nonstop silliness along the way.

name: Eden
description: A group of disillusioned outsiders leave modern society behind and settle on a remote island to start over. Their hope for paradise collapses as harsh conditions and rising tension turn survival into a struggle, driven largely by conflict between people.

name: Die My Love
description: After inheriting a remote Montana house, a New York couple tries to rebuild their lives in isolation, welcomed by the arrival of a child. But as one partner grows increasingly absent and the loneliness deepens, the relationship frays and love, identity, and motherhood are pushed to a breaking point.

name: The Man in My Basement
description: A financially struggling homeowner agrees to rent out his basement to a mysterious stranger offering a tempting payout. As strange rules and unsettling behavior escalate, the arrangement turns into a tense psychological standoff that forces hard questions about power, guilt, and what’s buried in the past.

name: George A. Romero's Resident Evil
description: A documentary that brings to light the vision that director George A. Romero had for an adaptation of Resident Evil, using newly filmed interviews with those who were there, and unravels the secrets behind why it was never produced.

name: Darkness of Man
description: After a raid goes wrong, a veteran international agent makes a promise to look after an informant’s child. Years later, that vow pulls him into a brutal turf war as rival gangs close in, forcing him to confront old guilt and push his limits to keep the family safe.

name: G20
description: When a major world summit is seized by terrorists, a president is forced into a desperate fight to protect family members and fellow leaders. The crisis blends political pressure with close-quarters action as survival becomes the only agenda.

name: Bambi: The Reckoning
description: After a mother and son survive a car wreck, a mutated, grief-struck deer starts hunting them through the woods. The chase escalates as the creature’s revenge spreads and the survivors fight to stay ahead of a deadly rampage.

name: iPossessed
description: A group of celebrating friends make a pact with a demon to stay the night or someone loses their soul, only to find out the demons they are fighting might be the ones they carry inside.

name: Back in Action
description: Fifteen years after stepping away from espionage, a longtime spy couple gets pulled back in when their cover is compromised. Forced to work together again, they dive into globe-trotting missions where danger and comedic chaos collide.

name: Bad Hombres
description: Bad Hombres tells the story of two undocumented immigrants who take a job digging a hole and then learn their employers are criminals.

name: Fear Street: Prom Queen
description: At Shadyside High’s 1988 prom, students compete for the title of prom queen, and the rivalry turns deadly fast. An underdog tries to survive the cutthroat contest while a series of killings targets the candidates.

name: War of the Worlds
description: A Homeland Security analyst uses mass surveillance to track threats—until an attack by an unknown force makes him question what’s truly being shown to him and the rest of the world. As the incident unfolds through screens and reports, his certainty starts to slip.

name: Bad Shabbos
description: An interfaith couple plans a Shabbat dinner where both families will meet for the first time, but a sudden fatal accident throws the evening into chaos. What follows is a fast-moving dark comedy of nerves, cultural clashes, and desperate attempts to keep dinner from completely falling apart.

name: The Thursday Murder Club
description: A cozy circle of retirees who enjoy puzzling over old cases suddenly find themselves drawn into a real murder investigation. This light comic mystery follows their amateur sleuthing as friendship, curiosity, and mischief collide in a genteel retirement-community setting.

name: The History of Sound
description: In 1917, two young music students at the Boston Conservatory bond over folk music. They reconnect years later and set out on a song-collecting trip through the backwaters of Maine, recording traditional tunes and reflecting on what their connection meant.

name: Superman
description: Superman works as a journalist in Metropolis while trying to balance his Kryptonian roots with the life he has built on Earth. As tensions rise around his role in the world, he faces pressure from powerful enemies and unexpected allies while trying to stay true to his values.

name: The Uninvited
description: Rose and Sammy enjoy an idyllic life with love, a Hollywood Hills home, and a curious son. During a party, Sammy assigns unusual significance to it, while Rose juggles preparations amid distractions.  The unexpected arrival of Helen, who claims residence there, oscillates between confusion and lucidity. Strangely, Helen possesses intimate knowledge of the house and its guests. Her revelations spark drama, unearthing hidden truths and compelling Rose to confront her past, future, and the desire for change.

name: The Amateur
description: After a devastating terrorist attack in London, a quiet intelligence analyst is pushed into a dangerous world far outside his comfort zone. With official channels refusing to act, he relies on brains, tech skills, and determination to pursue justice on his own terms.

name: Bride Hard
description: A secret agent must navigate a lavish destination wedding when mercenaries crash the celebration and take the guests hostage. Forced to fight while keeping her cover intact, she battles in a fairy-tale setup and wonders if the real danger is tied to the party itself.

name: Waltzing with Brando
description: An idealistic architect is pulled out of his comfortable Los Angeles life when a famous actor recruits him for an ambitious plan: creating an eco-friendly retreat on a tiny, seemingly unlivable island in Tahiti. As the project grows, the pair’s unlikely partnership is tested by big dreams, clashing personalities, and the realities of building paradise from scratch.

name: I Know What You Did Last Summer
description: After five friends cover up their role in a fatal car accident, they agree to keep quiet and move on. A year later, a chilling message and a string of threats drag them back into the guilt they buried, as someone seems determined to make them pay for what happened.

name: Sneaks
description: Ty, a misguided, one-of-a-kind designer sneaker, doesn’t know life outside the comforts of his velvet-lined shoebox. After his sister is stolen by a shady collector, Ty must venture into New York City to find and rescue her. In his adventure, Ty meets a ragtag group of footwear friends from all walks of life who help him find the courage to step outside of his shoebox and find his sole-mate.

name: Psycho Killer
description: After her husband is murdered during a traffic stop, a highway patrol officer launches a personal hunt for the killer across the Midwest. What begins as a revenge-driven manhunt grows darker as she uncovers a brutal pattern of crimes tied to a deeply disturbed murderer.

name: The Monkey
description: Twin brothers stumble on a mysterious wind-up monkey, and a string of outrageous deaths fractures their family. Decades later, the cursed toy resurfaces, dragging the estranged brothers back into the past they tried to leave behind as the threat begins again.

name: Freakier Friday
description: Years after a mother and daughter went through a strange identity mix-up, their family is facing new changes as a wedding approaches and two households try to come together. Old chaos returns in a bigger way, forcing different generations to understand each other while navigating family tensions.

name: Diablo
description: An ex-con abducts a Colombian gangster’s daughter to honor a promise made to her mother. Hunted by her powerful father, the criminal underworld, and a ruthless killer, he must fight and improvise to survive, protect the girl, and keep his word.

name: Midwinter Break
description: A retired couple takes a holiday to Amsterdam hoping for a change of pace, but the trip exposes old wounds, unmet needs, and deep differences in belief and purpose. As buried feelings rise, they are forced to question what still holds them together and what comes next.

name: Cleaner
description: After radical activists seize an energy company’s annual gala and take hundreds of people hostage, an ex-soldier turned window cleaner suspended high outside the building races to keep those trapped inside safe, including her older brother. With the siege unfolding around her, she must find a way to survive and help from the outside.

name: Anniversary
description: On a couple’s 25th wedding anniversary party, their son brings home his new girlfriend, a former student with a controversial past. As her influence spreads through their family, the home that once felt safe turns into a tense pressure cooker where beliefs and loyalties quickly fracture.

name: Flight Risk
description: A pilot is hired to fly a law officer and a key witness from remote Alaska to a New York trial. Trapped together in a small plane over harsh wilderness, nerves fray as doubts grow and loyalties blur, turning a routine transport into a tense fight to stay in control.

name: The Salt Path
description: After losing their home, a couple sets off on a long coastal trek along England’s south west coast, traveling with only basic supplies. As the journey begins, it becomes clear the husband is living with a terminal illness, turning the walk into a test of love, endurance, and hope over the course of a year.

name: Bonjour Tristesse
description: At the height of summer, 18-year-old Cécile is relaxing by the French seaside with her father and falling in love with her new boyfriend. The arrival of her late mother's enigmatic friend turns her world upside down.

name: Barron's Cove
description: After a child is killed, a grieving father takes the classmate he holds responsible and sets off a desperate manhunt. This dark crime drama follows grief, blame, and revenge as buried pain and powerful influence push everyone toward dangerous choices.

name: Islands
description: A drifting tennis coach works at a tropical resort, spending his days teaching tourists and his nights partying. When a mysterious visitor arrives with her family, a nagging sense of familiarity turns into a tense connection—until her husband vanishes and suspicion starts closing in around the coach.

name: The Phoenician Scheme
description: A wealthy businessman appoints his only daughter—a nun—as sole heir, just as he launches a new venture. Soon, the plan draws the attention of scheming rivals, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins, forcing their tight-knit group to keep moving and reacting under mounting pressure.

name: Marshmallow
description: At a secluded summer camp, a shy 12-year-old struggles to fit in as a campfire legend starts to feel frighteningly real. When danger creeps through the woods, the kids band together, pushing past fear and bullying to search for answers and uncover a darker truth hiding in plain sight.

name: Mayday
description: When a U.S. Navy pilot on a top-secret mission during the Cold War gets trapped behind enemy lines, his only chance at survival is to form an alliance with an eccentric ex-KGB agent.

name: It Feeds
description: A therapist with psychic insight takes on a desperate case: a young girl convinced a sinister presence is feeding on her. As the threat grows, the therapist must face her own buried fears and limits to protect the girl and those closest to her.

name: Tyler Perry's Duplicity
description: A successful attorney takes on a deeply personal murder case and, with help from a private investigator, digs into a tangled trail of lies, suspicion, and betrayal. What starts as a search for justice becomes a tense mystery shaped by grief, public outrage, and hidden motives.

name: The Fuzzies
description: A group of childhood friends comes back together at a spooky estate after the death of someone close to them. What begins as a mourning visit turns into a terrifying fight to survive when grotesque puppets and sinister stop-motion creatures emerge from the shadows.

name: The Pout-Pout Fish
description: After a clash leaves two underwater homes ruined, an unlikely pair sets off on a difficult quest to find a mythical force that can grant a wish. Their journey is complicated by another seeker chasing the same prize.

name: Materialists
description: In New York City, an ambitious matchmaker who turns romance into a checklist faces a personal dilemma between a polished ideal and a complicated past connection. The story explores modern dating, self-worth, money, and the uneasy gap between what looks perfect and what feels real.

name: Honey Don't!
description: A small-town private investigator investigates strange deaths linked to a mysterious church. As the investigation unfolds, her own digging and local reactions complicate the case and push her deeper into unanswered questions.

name: Matchbox
description: When a group of former childhood friends reconnect, their reunion takes a wild turn as they stumble upon a dangerous international plot—and must save the world.

name: Adulthood
description: Two adult siblings return to a tense family home life and uncover a long-buried body in the basement. What starts as a shocking discovery quickly pulls them into a chaotic chain of bad decisions, crime, and escalating danger, mixing dark humor with uneasy family drama.

name: Scissors
description: Courtney and her influencer friends are making a horror movie based on an urban legend.  Faced with an early start time the next day, the group decides to spend the night in a creepy, old house. But when someone puts on the costume and begins killing them one by one,  the remaining survivors must unravel the mystery of the killer’s identity and stop them before it is too late.

name: Bring Her Back
description: After their father dies, a brother and sister are placed with a foster mother who seems caring at first. As they settle into an isolated new home, grief, distrust, and strange behavior turn their temporary refuge into something deeply frightening.

name: Beau Ideal
description: In the stillness of a remote town, a troubled writer intervenes in a neighbor’s abusive household— testing the limits of truth, heroism and his own fractured sense of self.

name: Nonnas
description: After a painful loss, a man pours his savings and hope into a new Italian restaurant, inviting real grandmothers to run the kitchen. As the doors open, the project becomes a warm, sometimes bumpy journey of community, tradition, and healing through shared meals.

name: Eenie Meanie
description: A former teenage getaway driver is pulled back into her past when a former employer offers her a chance to help save the life of a chronically unreliable ex-boyfriend. The risky job drags her into escalating crime and tension as she tries to navigate the fallout.

name: Scream 7
description: A new masked killer turns a quiet town into the center of another deadly spree, forcing a longtime survivor to protect her family while confronting old trauma. The story leans on legacy connections, a parent-child bond, and a familiar race to stop the bloodshed.

name: Pig Hill
description: Carrie has been fascinated by the local legend of the pig people of Pig Hill, revolting creatures who breed and cause havoc in the area. As the tenth woman goes missing, Carrie can't stop thinking that there could be more to these stories.

name: The Lemurian Candidate
description: Three old college friends reunite for a backpacking weekend on Mount Shasta, hoping to mend their friendship and support each other’s mental health. When psychedelics enter the trip, their hike veers into strange, funny, and frightening territory as reality blurs and a search for something beyond the ordinary takes over.

name: The Bride!
description: In 1930s Chicago, a lonely reanimated figure turns to a daring scientist to create a companion. When a murdered young woman is brought back to life, the experiment sparks a strange, chaotic journey neither creator can fully control.

name: The Wrecking Crew
description: Estranged half-brothers reunite after their father’s mysterious death, forcing them to work together despite old grudges. Their search for answers pulls them into buried secrets and a wider conspiracy that threatens their family and the community around them.

name: Laws of Man
description: A pair of U.S. marshals search for a wanted murderer in Nevada at the height of the Cold War and encounter more than they bargained for.

name: Code 3
description: A burned-out paramedic tries to get through his final 24 hours on the job while training a new recruit. As the shift escalates, routine calls turn into nonstop pressure, forcing both exhaustion and hard-won resilience to the surface.

name: The Bad Guys 2
description: The now-reformed outlaws are determined to live right, but their second chance is derailed by a new criminal crew, pulling them into a high-stakes, globe-trotting heist. With trust issues and an elaborate criminal scheme, they have to prove themselves while scrambling to keep their fragile progress on track.

name: Fackham Hall
description: A new servant at a grand English estate quickly finds himself tangled in an unlikely bond with the youngest daughter of an aristocratic family. Meanwhile, family rivalries erupt as wedding plans collapse and fresh complications threaten the household’s future.

name: The Dutchman
description: A successful Black businessman is haunted by his crumbling marriage and identity crisis when a mysterious white woman draws him into an unsettling cat-and-mouse exchange on a New York subway. As the encounter intensifies, reality and fantasy begin to blur in a psychological tension-filled game.

name: The Mannequin
description: A stylist assistant investigates her sister's death in a historic LA building, only to face a vengeful ghost of a serial killer who dismembered victims decades ago. She must escape before she's next.

name: Crime 101
description: An elusive thief plans what may be his final job, targeting high-stakes heists along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles. His plans collide with a disillusioned insurance broker at a personal crossroads, while a relentless detective closes in and pushes the danger higher.

name: Desert Dawn
description: A newly appointed small-town sheriff and a reluctant deputy investigate the murder of a mysterious woman, only to find themselves pulled into a widening web of lies and corruption. As shady businessmen and cartel ties surface, the case becomes a dangerous test of trust, judgment, and survival.

name: Remi Milligan: Lost Director
description: Remi Milligan: Lost Director explores the life of Remi Milligan, a filmmaker known for genre-defying, cult films. It delves into his unique style, the toll on his personal life, and the mystery of his 2006 disappearance.

name: She Rides Shotgun
description: Newly released from prison and hunted by ruthless enemies, a father must do whatever it takes to protect his estranged young daughter. With few allies and constant danger, they rely on grit, training, and hard-earned trust as their bond grows stronger through survival—and unconditional love.

name: Guns Up
description: After a job goes wrong, a former cop living a double life as a mob enforcer has just one night to get his family out of the city. With danger closing in and time running out, he’s forced to rely on skills he hoped to leave behind to keep everyone safe.

name: The Unholy Trinity
description: Set in 1870s Montana, a man about to be executed tasks his estranged son with killing the person who framed him for a crime he didn’t commit. The son heads to a remote town where a new sheriff and a mysterious outsider pull him into danger and uncertainty.

name: Soul on Fire
description: After a terrible accident leaves a young boy badly scarred, he fights to rebuild his life and believe in his own worth. With steady support from family, community, and an unexpected act of kindness, he learns to face pain with courage and hope.

name: A Working Man
description: A former black ops soldier tries to live quietly as a construction worker, but that peace is shattered when a young woman close to his workplace family is abducted. His rescue mission pulls him back into violence and exposes a larger criminal network.

name: The Strangers: Chapter 3
description: After a harrowing turning point, a battered survivor finds themself pulled deeper into a masked group’s violent orbit. As the pursuit tightens around a secretive small town, the line between hunted and trapped blurs, building toward an unavoidable, unforgiving showdown.

name: Worldbreaker
description: After a rupture between realities unleashes deadly creatures onto Earth, a parent keeps a child hidden on an island and trains her to survive. As danger closes in and the wider crisis worsens, their isolated refuge no longer feels secure.

name: Björk: Cornucopia
description: A live concert experience blends lush, psychedelic visuals with futuristic screens and vivid nature imagery, built around powerful vocals and an ensemble of musicians and choirs. It’s a theatrical, sensory-heavy show that leans into bold themes and an immersive atmosphere designed for the big screen.

name: F Marry Kill
description: Pushed onto dating apps for her 30th birthday, a true-crime fan starts juggling three new romances—just as a string of murders dominates her favorite podcast. As clues pile up, her fun new dating life turns into a tense guessing game, and she begins to suspect one of her matches may be dangerously close to the case.

name: The Witcher: Sirens of the Deep
description: When human sailors are attacked by mysterious creatures of the deep, a hard-edged Witcher is pulled into a conflict that threatens both land and sea. As the attacks escalate into open war, only one hardened monster hunter stands between the factions.

name: Dream Hacker
description: Due to her age, Professor Jennifer Connelly is often described as a science prodigy. A genius of our time, with five Phd's psychology, psychiatry, neurology, physics and chemistry. Jennifer's primary studies are in dreams and the effects they have on the waking mind. For the past 6 years, her studies have led her to theorize that with the right equipment, she can not only watch and record someone else's dreams but maybe even influence them in a subconscious way. To prove this theory, and believing it may have military applications, Oxford obtains a substantial government grant to build the equipment Jennifer needs to journey into this new unknown area of neural science.

name: Enola Holmes 3
description: Adventure leads detective Enola Holmes to Malta as personal and professional dreams collide on a case more perilous than any she's faced before.

name: Night of the Zoopocalypse
description: When a glowing meteor crashes into a city zoo, a strange virus begins turning animals into zombie-like threats. Two unlikely predators team up with a small group of survivors to navigate the chaos, protect their home, and try to stop the outbreak from spreading beyond the zoo walls.

name: Ella McCay
description: An idealistic young politician finds her political life colliding with difficult family dynamics as she prepares to take over a mentor’s job. While trying to manage the demands of leadership and relationships at home, she also faces public scrutiny and mounting problems that threaten her progress.

name: Rise of the Conqueror
description: In the 14th century, as trade routes collapse and rival factions plunge the region into chaos, a fearless warrior returns from exile with nothing left. Driven by strategy and sheer will, he battles to unite fractured kingdoms and forge a new empire—earning a reputation as both a brilliant leader and a ruthless conqueror.

name: The Twin
description: After the tragic loss of his son, a man begins experiencing terrifying visions of a shadowy figure that looks like himself. As reality unravels, he must confront his past and the supernatural force haunting him before it consumes him completely.

name: Karate Kid: Legends
description: After a family tragedy, a kung fu prodigy is forced to relocate from Beijing to New York City with his mother. When a new friend asks for help, he enters a karate competition, but he needs more than skill—so his teacher brings in help from an original mentor to blend fighting styles for a big showdown.

name: Violent Ends
description: A man raised in a violent crime family tries to build a quiet future away from that world. After a reckless robbery leaves an innocent person caught in the middle, he is forced back into the life he has long wanted to escape.

name: Neighborhood Watch
description: A young man believes he witnessed an abduction, but police refuse to take him seriously. He reluctantly teams up with his bitter, retired next-door security guard to search for the missing woman and figure out what really happened in their community.

name: Evil Dead Burn
description: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

name: Kinda Pregnant
description: When plans for settling down and starting a family fall apart, a woman decides to fake a pregnancy, hoping it will bring attention and change her luck. But the deception quickly tangles with real feelings as she meets her dream guy.

name: Swiped
description: Swiped follows a tech pioneer’s fight to carve out space in a male-dominated industry using grit and ingenuity. As workplace mistreatment comes into focus, her drive to keep building pushes the story forward.

name: Fight or Flight
description: A hired fighter boards a plane to track down a target, only to find the situation turning far more dangerous mid-flight. With enemies closing in from all sides, the mission shifts from capture to survival in a confined, high-pressure setting.

name: London Calling
description: After a job goes wrong, a struggling hitman flees the UK and lands under a new crime boss. To earn a way back home, he’s tasked with babysitting the boss’s awkward teenage son and dragging him along on dangerous errands, forcing an unlikely bond to form amid action and dark humor.

name: The Dresden Sun
description: In a near-future world ruled by powerful corporations, a dangerous theft draws together mercenaries, insiders, and an unhappy financial worker. As rival forces chase a mysterious technology, corporate greed, fraud, and espionage push ordinary and extraordinary players into a deadly conflict.

name: Stitch Head
description: Stitch Head was the first creature brought to 'almost life' by mad professor Erasmus. In the years since, he’s become nursemaid to the master’s ever-growing menagerie of neglected creatures, tasked with teaching them to suppress their 'inner monster' and hide out in the castle — away from prying eyes and itchy pitchfork fingers, of the village mob in the valley below. But when grubby circus impresario Fulbert Freakfinder arrives offering Stitch Head a starring role in his freak show, our hero is tempted by the promise of love and acceptance.

name: Vampires of the Velvet Lounge
description: In present-day Savannah, a hidden group of vampires tries to survive in a modern world by preying on people they meet online, while a determined hunter closes in. The story mixes nightclub excess, dark humor, and a violent clash with a dangerous foe.

name: The Cut
description: A retired boxer gets a surprise chance at one last title run, but first must drop a dangerous amount of weight in days. Locked in a Las Vegas room with a ruthless trainer, the pressure mounts as an extreme, illegal cutting plan pushes body and mind to the edge.

name: Simple Minds: Everything Is Possible
description: This documentary follows a Scottish band’s rise from working-class roots in post-industrial Glasgow to global fame, fueled by a defining ’80s anthem and major live performances. Along the way, it traces the friendships, setbacks, and comebacks that shaped their long-running career and ongoing tours.

name: Screamboat
description: A late-night ferry ride in New York City turns into a frantic fight for survival when a mischievous mouse becomes a real, monstrous threat. Trapped on the water with nowhere to run, a mixed group of passengers and crew must endure chaos, dark humor, and escalating danger as the night spirals out of control.

name: Love Hurts
description: A successful realtor is forced back into a dangerous former life when an old associate resurfaces with a threatening message. With a powerful family figure closing in, he’s pushed to confront unfinished business, old loyalties, and the past he tried to bury for good.

name: Pretty Thing
description: A powerful professional’s affair with a younger partner turns dangerous when his fixation escalates. As the situation spirals, she is forced to protect her life, career, and sense of control.

name: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description: A year after a terrifying incident at a family pizza spot, the town turns the rumors into a festival, while the real truth stays buried. When a child sneaks out to reconnect with the familiar animatronics, it sparks a new wave of supernatural danger and a search for where the nightmare truly began.

name: No Address
description: A group of individuals who unexpectedly fall into homelessness. They bond together as an unconventional family, struggling to survive on the streets while warding off a harassing gang, an unforgiving community, and local authorities.

name: 28 Years Later
description: Twenty-eight years after the Rage virus outbreak, a heavily-defended island survives, connected to the mainland by a single causeway. When a young member of the group ventures out, he uncovers secrets, wonders, and horrors that have changed infected—and other survivors—into something more mutated.

name: Klara and the Sun
description: Klara, an Artificial Friend designed to prevent loneliness, is purchased by a mother and her bright teen daughter, Josie. Josie, who suffers from a mysterious illness, adores her new robot companion. On a quest to save Josie and those who love her from heartbreak, Klara learns the power of human love.

name: Until Dawn
description: One year after her sister vanishes, a group heads into a remote valley to search for answers. At an abandoned visitor center, they’re stalked by a masked killer and picked off one by one—only to wake up back at the beginning of the same evening.

name: Pinocchio: Unstrung
description: A chilling reimagining of the familiar fable, ‘Pinocchio Unstrung’ unfolds inside an elite London prep school. Influenced by a sinister Cricket (Robert Englund) and created by Geppetto (Richard Brake), Pinocchio launches a violent crusade to carve himself into a real boy like his brother James, one piece at a time.

name: Fear Below
description: A rough-around-the-edges group of divers heads into a river to recover a sunken car, but the job turns into a fight for survival when an unusually aggressive bull shark starts hunting them. The setup stays focused on underwater danger and escalating pressure.

name: Jurassic World Rebirth
description: Years after dinosaurs have become part of a changed world, a covert team is sent on a risky mission to collect rare genetic material from the largest surviving creatures. When their journey crosses paths with a stranded family, everyone is pushed toward a remote island filled with danger and buried secrets.

name: Black Bag
description: When a trusted intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, another agent must investigate while facing a painful conflict between personal loyalty and duty. The story unfolds as a tense, talk-driven spy drama about trust, secrecy, and suspicion inside a close circle of professionals.

name: Mercy
description: In a near-future justice system run by artificial intelligence, a detective accused of killing his spouse has just ninety minutes to prove innocence. Trapped in a high-pressure trial, the case becomes a race through evidence, surveillance, and doubts about whether fast automated judgment can find the truth.

name: Birthrite
description: When a pregnant woman is bequeathed a home from an estranged aunt, she and her girlfriend leave the city behind to begin new chapter. But when a karmic debt threatens the life of their unborn child, they soon discover their place in the cursed history of the town.

name: Wormtown
description: A year into a plague of flesh-eating, mind-altering worms, a small Ohio town has fallen under a cult-like rule that spreads by persuasion or force. Three uninfected women try to stay alive through scavenging, strict hygiene, and staying out of sight, but the pressure of the new order pushes everyone toward desperate choices.

name: Anaconda
description: Four mid-life friends head into the rainforest to remake a favorite movie from their youth. Their plan turns into a fight for survival as disasters, giant snakes, and violent criminals collide with their low-budget production.

name: Sinners
description: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again and plan a fresh beginning. But as they prepare for a new night of music and community, they uncover a far greater evil that seems determined to pull them back in.

name: Dead of Winter
description: A widowed fisherwoman travels alone through a snowbound stretch of northern Minnesota with no phone service when she stumbles upon a kidnapping. Far from help and with little time to think, she realizes the teenage girl’s only hope is a dangerous, improvised pursuit of answers and rescue.

name: Everyone Is Going to Die
description: On his daughter's birthday, a wealthy father's reconciliation attempt is hijacked by two female burglars. A shakedown evolves into a lethal cat-and-mouse as hidden motives emerge, culminating in a life-altering revelation.

name: The Lost Bus
description: A determined father risks everything to rescue a teacher and her students as wildfire spreads fast and traps children in the path of the flames. What starts as a hurried attempt to reach safety turns into a tense, life-or-death journey through smoke, chaos, and blocked roads.

name: Warfare
description: A platoon of Navy SEALs heads into a dangerous mission in Ramadi, Iraq, where the pressure, chaos, and closeness of the group unfold through their own memories. What begins as a tense, confined operation turns into a brutal siege, forcing them to endure and survive as events escalate.

name: The Vortex
description: In 1980 Las Vegas, a Native Paiute cleaning lady enters a slots room at the MGM Grand Casino, setting off a chain of strange and unexplained events. Meanwhile, in-house comic Pete plays shrink to a host of colorful misfits while dodging mobsters and collectors. Struggling with a gambling addiction, he faces a life-altering decision that may determine his fate.

name: One Battle After Another
description: A burned-out former revolutionary lives off-grid with his independent teenage daughter, haunted by paranoia and the fallout of an old fight. When a dangerous enemy from the past resurfaces and the girl disappears, he is forced back into a frantic struggle shaped by politics, family, and consequences.

name: Zootopia 2
description: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia’s history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde are pulled into a twisting mystery after the arrival of a new figure who throws the city into chaos. Their investigation leads them to go undercover across unexpected parts of town, pushing their partnership to the limit.

name: Mob Cops
description: A retired NYPD detective writes a book about his family's ties to the mob, igniting a firestorm between the corrupt cops working for the city's brutal crime boss and the officers trying to bring them to justice.

name: Sally
description: This documentary follows a pioneering astronaut whose historic achievement opened doors while intense public scrutiny shaped her life. Alongside the space milestone, it explores a long-hidden relationship and the personal cost of staying private in a hostile era.

name: Steve
description: Over one intense day, a devoted head teacher at a last-chance reform school battles to keep order as outside pressures pile up. As the day unfolds, the school’s future and his own breaking point add extra strain to an already volatile environment.

name: The Dreadful
description: Set in medieval England, this gloomy gothic tale follows an isolated woman and her harsh mother-in-law as they scrape by on the edge of society. When someone from the past returns from war, old tensions rise and a strange curse begins to close in around them.
