name: Z-O-M-B-I-E-S 4: Dawn of the Vampires
description: A summer road trip takes an unexpected turn when two teens end up counseling at a camp caught between rival supernatural groups. As tensions rise, they try to help both sides find common ground and work together, especially when a bigger danger threatens everyone.

name: Ballistic
description: After learning that the bullet that killed her son overseas was produced at the factory where she works, a grieving mother begins a personal quest for revenge. Her search points toward the people and systems tied to his death.

name: Sharp Corner
description: After moving into a new home, a devoted family man witnesses repeated crashes on the dangerous bend outside his front window. Determined to help before emergency crews arrive, he throws himself into preparing for the next incident, and the fixation begins to strain his job, his relationships, and his sense of purpose.

name: The Woman in the Yard
description: After her husband’s death, a grieving widow struggles to care for her two children while living in an isolated rural home. Their already fragile life is disrupted when a strange woman with unsettling powers appears in the yard and begins to draw closer, forcing the family to face buried fears and painful truths.

name: Stans
description: Stans is an edgy, revealing look at superfandom, told through the enduring lens of a legendary music artist and the fans who connect to his work. It blends personal fan stories with glimpses of his career and life moments, showing how devotion can shape identity.

name: The Demon Detective
description: A professional exorcist is drawn into a disturbing new case when a client reports a demonic presence. As the investigation deepens, the haunting begins to connect to a troubled past, turning a routine job into something far more personal and dangerous.

name: Savage House
description: In 18th-century England, a wealthy couple chase the promise of a better life as a widespread pox outbreak and political unrest close in. Their grand home becomes a pressure cooker of duels, decadence, and escalating violence that tests how far they’ll go to protect their future.

name: Caught Stealing
description: A burned-out former baseball player in late-1990s New York agrees to a seemingly simple favor—minding a cat—and is pulled into a violent struggle tied to the local criminal world. With chases, threats, and pressure from authorities, he fights to stay alive while trying to survive a reality he never expected.

name: Madea's Destination Wedding
description: A loud, lovable family heads to the Bahamas for a whirlwind destination wedding, but the trip quickly turns into a messy mix of arguments, misunderstandings, and over-the-top moments. As the celebrations ramp up, old habits and big personalities collide, testing everyone’s patience while they try to keep the wedding on track.

name: Playdate
description: An out-of-work accountant joins a stay-at-home dad for a playdate that’s supposed to be low-key. Instead, they’re chased by mercenaries, and the unprepared guest has to get through one absurd danger situation after another to make it through the day.

name: Drop
description: A widowed mother heads out for a long-awaited first date at an upscale restaurant, hoping for a good time. But anonymous messages and unsettling “drops” to her phone quickly turn the night into a tense, targeted ordeal with escalating instructions and fear for her loved ones.

name: La Dolce Villa
description: When a daughter decides to buy a crumbling Tuscan villa, her father rushes to Italy to talk her out of it. Instead, he’s swept into the village’s charm, where romance, family bonds, and a fresh sense of purpose begin to take root.

name: Vicious
description: A woman receives a mysterious box with a strange rule: she must place inside something she needs, something she hates, and something she loves. As unsettling events close in, she has to face fear, pressure, and painful memories to stop the box from taking everything from her.

name: Alarum
description: Two married spies living off the grid try to enjoy a quiet winter resort retreat, but their cover is blown when an international intelligence network closes in. Suspected of joining a rogue spy team, they’re forced back into survival mode, fighting to secure a critical asset before old enemies catch up.

name: We're Not Safe Here
description: After a woman reappears with a terrifying story, she and a close friend find themselves targeted by a sinister presence. As fear starts taking shape around them, they must face a threat that feels both personal and impossible to escape.

name: Night Always Comes
description: Facing eviction in a city her family can no longer afford, a woman launches into a desperate all-night effort to raise $25,000. As the hours drag on, her search becomes increasingly dangerous and unpredictable, forcing her to keep pushing despite mounting obstacles.

name: Merv
description: After a breakup, a couple tries an awkward co-parenting plan for their beloved dog, who seems to lose his spark. A Florida getaway meant to cheer the pup up turns complicated when the other owner shows up unexpectedly, forcing them to navigate old feelings, miscommunication, and the messy work of moving on—or reconnecting.

name: Putin
description: A portrait of a formidable political figure, unraveling the contrasting facets of an iron-fisted tyrant and a man haunted by fear.

name: The Life List
description: After her mother sends her to complete a teenage bucket list tied to an inheritance, a young woman starts checking off goals and searching for true love. Along the way, she uncovers family secrets, reconnects with what matters, and rediscovers herself through the process.

name: Happy Gilmore 2
description: A retired golf star is pulled back toward the sport when family responsibilities create a costly new goal. His comeback brings old-school chaos, family pressure, and plenty of absurd humor as he tries to prove he still has something left.

name: OnlyFangs
description: A wannabe monster hunter gets pulled into an uneasy partnership with a ruthless crew of vampire women. Together they build a new app that turns their targets into paying customers, mixing nightlife seduction, dark humor, and bloody consequences as the hustle grows beyond anyone’s control.

name: War Machine
description: During a brutal Army Ranger training mission, a combat engineer and the rest of the unit are dropped into a deadly survival fight when they come face to face with a massive alien war machine. What starts as a test quickly becomes a desperate battle to stay alive.

name: The Roses
description: A polished couple’s comfortable family life starts to fracture when their careers move in opposite directions. As one partner’s ambitions soar and the other faces a painful setback, old resentments and rivalry turn their ideal-looking marriage into a tense, darkly comic battle.

name: Primitive War
description: During the Vietnam War, a recon unit heads into an isolated jungle valley to investigate the fate of a missing platoon. What should be a search turns into a brutal fight for survival when prehistoric dinosaurs enter the conflict.

name: Bad Man
description: In a small Tennessee town, a local lawman tries to confront a growing meth problem just as a celebrated undercover agent takes over the spotlight. As doubts build and loyalties are tested, the case turns into a murky crime story full of tension and mistrust.

name: A Corpse in Kensington
description: A mysterious killing spree ignites suspicion among three former classmates who have rekindled a love triangle in their hometown on Halloween night.

name: Oh. What. Fun.
description: At the holidays, a usually steady parent plans a special outing for a chaotic, close-knit family—only for a big mistake to leave them stuck without her. Feeling fed up and underappreciated, she sets off on an impromptu adventure that turns the season into something unexpected and magical.

name: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
description: In the aftermath of the outbreak, one survivor becomes trapped in a dangerous new circle of influence, while a doctor pursues an unsettling experiment with an infected alpha. As their paths draw closer, the world around them is pushed toward brutal consequences and hard choices.

name: Charlie the Wonderdog
description: A shy 9-year-old and his beloved family dog are thrown into an out-of-this-world adventure when the dog is abducted by aliens and comes back with surprising new abilities. Together, they race to stop a nearby pet with a dangerous plan that could put everyone at risk.

name: Way of the Warrior Kid
description: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

name: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
description: A kid-friendly road trip turns into a big-city adventure when a beloved dollhouse goes missing in a colorful urban world. To set things right, the journey moves beyond playtime and into the real world, where teamwork, imagination, and growing up all come into focus.

name: The Death of Robin Hood
description: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

name: The Whistler
description: After the loss of their daughter, a grieving couple inherits a secluded farm in Venezuela, hoping for a fresh start. As they settle in, unsettling events and an ominous presence begin to surface, forcing them to confront a growing darkness.

name: Verity
description: Lowen Ashleigh gets hired by Jeremy Crawford to ghostwrite novels for his bestselling author wife Verity, who's unable to finish after an accident. Lowen uncovers Verity's disturbing truths while residing at the Crawfords' home to work.

name: The Occupant
description: A woman takes a risky job in a remote mountain wilderness to help her family, but a crash leaves her stranded in brutal conditions. With only a mysterious voice on the radio to guide her, she pushes onward as exhaustion and fear blur the line between what’s real and what isn’t.

name: One of Them Days
description: Two best friends and roommates hit a chaotic, clock-ticking crisis when their rent money goes missing. To avoid eviction and keep their bond from breaking, they scramble across the city for one last chance to fix everything—turning a bad day into a comedic race against time.

name: Dangerous Animals
description: A savvy, free-spirited surfer is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat. With sharks circling below, she has to think her way out of a dangerous situation before a ritualistic feeding can happen.

name: Stolen Girl
description: After a young child is taken out of the country by a parent, her mother spends years chasing leads that go nowhere. When she crosses paths with a specialist who recovers internationally abducted children, she agrees to work with him, risking everything for a chance to bring her family back together.

name: The Sheriff
description: A small-town sheriff investigates a fresh murder and finds unsettling links to a personal tragedy that has haunted him for years. As the case deepens, grief, suspicion, and buried history push him toward answers that may reopen old wounds.

name: The Carpenter's Son
description: In Roman-era Egypt, a remote village becomes a battleground between faith and supernatural forces when a carpenter, his wife, and their child are targeted. As ominous events close in, the family’s fears and beliefs are tested by horrors that feel both natural and divine.

name: Control Freak
description: A successful motivational speaker develops a relentless itch on her head just as career pressure and family issues start piling up. As the condition worsens, she is drawn into a disturbing mystery tied to her heritage and a possible parasitic force she may not be able to control.

name: Dora and the Search for Sol Dorado
description: A young explorer and her companions head into the Amazonian jungle to find an ancient treasure before it falls into the wrong hands. Along the way, they face wild dangers, puzzles, and a fast-moving adventure built for family viewing.

name: The Luckiest Man in America
description: In 1984, an out-of-work man lands a spot on a hit TV game show with a method that lets him rack up astonishing winnings. As his streak grows, the people running the show grow suspicious and scramble behind the scenes to figure out what’s really going on.

name: Mutiny
description: After witnessing his billionaire boss' murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss' death only to discover an international conspiracy.

name: Stone Cold Fox
description: Set in the 1980s, this revenge thriller follows a young woman who escapes an abusive commune and sets out to find her family. When her little sister is taken and a corrupt cop is sent after her, she returns to the dangerous place she fled for a rescue mission.

name: Thrash
description: When a powerful hurricane wrecks a coastal town, the resulting storm surge unleashes devastation—and brings hungry sharks onto shore. Amid the chaos, survival becomes a battle against both the flooding and an unseen, relentless threat.

name: Seven Snipers
description: A former elite sniper living in hiding on a remote Australian farm is forced back into a deadly fight when a brutal warlord from her past tracks her down. To protect the daughter she has raised in secret, she must use every survival skill she has.

name: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
description: When Mary becomes the focus of a public scandal, and the family faces financial strain, the household confronts the risk of social disgrace. The Crawleys respond to changing times as staff shifts and a new generation prepares to move Downton Abbey forward.

name: Shelter
description: A man lives in self-imposed exile on a remote island until a violent storm forces him to rescue a young girl. Her presence draws him out as threats connected to his past close in, pushing him to protect her even as danger escalates.

name: Solo Mio
description: After his fiancée leaves him at the altar, a man heads to Italy for the honeymoon he planned—only this time he travels alone. Along the way, he immerses himself in the country’s vibrant culture, food, and stunning scenery, and forms new connections, including a chance meeting with Gia.

name: The Woman in Cabin 10
description: On a lavish yacht for an assignment, a journalist witnesses a passenger go overboard. When others dismiss her claims, she pushes herself to dig for answers, placing her safety on the line as the truth becomes harder to uncover.

name: Rosario
description: After a sudden family death, a high-powered professional returns to an old apartment to sort through personal belongings. What begins as a tense night of grief turns into a supernatural ordeal when hidden occult objects and long-buried family secrets begin to surface.

name: Disclosure Day
description: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?

name: Toy Story 5
description: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

name: Gunslingers
description: A notorious outlaw resurfaces in a small Kentucky town hoping for a fresh start, but his past quickly catches up when a vengeful posse arrives chasing a bounty. With loyalties tested and old grudges reignited, the streets erupt into relentless gunfights as the town fights to survive the chaos.

name: My Fault: London
description: An 18-year-old moves from America to London with her mother and starts a new life with her mother’s wealthy new partner and his son. As she settles in for the summer, she feels a powerful attraction and must also face troubles from her past.

name: Beast
description: A retired MMA legend living a quiet life as a commercial fisherman is forced back into the cage when a family crisis puts his brother at risk. With help from an old coach, he trains for one last championship bout against a ruthless reigning champion.

name: Apex
description: A woman seeking escape on a solo trip into the Australian wilderness finds herself hunted by someone who turns the remote landscape into a deadly game. To survive, she must rely on grit, instinct, and the harsh terrain around her.

name: The Death That Awaits
description: A drifter searching for answers to a mystery from her past takes on a job looking after a sick teen who is undergoing a mysterious transformation her family will do anything to stop.

name: The Perfect Gamble
description: After getting out of prison, two gamblers team up to run an illegal casino, chasing quick money and a fresh start. Their risky plan draws the attention of the mafia, and the pressure spills into their personal lives, pulling a loved one into the crossfire.

name: Inheritance
description: After a family loss, a young woman discovers her estranged father has a hidden past tied to espionage. Pulled into a fast-moving international conspiracy, she becomes a target and must improvise her way across multiple countries while deciding who, if anyone, she can trust.

name: The Rip
description: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops uncovers millions in cash hidden in a run-down stash house, triggering chaos and suspicion all around. As questions mount about loyalties and motives, the operation starts pulling everyone—and every decision—into doubt.

name: A Breed Apart
description: A private island getaway promises a group of famous online personalities a chance at viral attention, but the weekend turns into a deadly contest. As monstrous dogs stalk the guests, the pursuit of fame becomes a fight to survive.

name: Murder at the Embassy
description: Set in 1934 Cairo, this period mystery follows a private investigator looking into a killing inside the British Embassy after a secret document disappears. With the building sealed and every guest or staff member under suspicion, the case mixes diplomatic danger with a classic whodunit setup.

name: Jaws @ 50: The Definitive Inside Story
description: This authorized documentary marks 50 years since the premiere of a defining Hollywood blockbuster, using rare archival footage and new interviews. It revisits the behind-the-scenes chaos, celebrates the film’s rise, and traces a legacy that also connects to ongoing shark conservation efforts today.

name: My Oxford Year
description: An ambitious American heads to Oxford to study, convinced she can plan the perfect year. But she quickly falls for a charismatic Brit, and what begins as a romantic escape threatens to disrupt her carefully laid future.

name: The Lion King at the Hollywood Bowl
description: In honor of “The Lion King's” 30th Anniversary, the Hollywood Bowl transforms into the Pride Lands for an immersive concert event. This music event celebrates the franchise's evolution, from the 1994 animated film to the Tony Award-winning musical, and the 2019 and 2024 live-action films, honoring the music and characters that made it a global phenomenon.

name: Darbie's Scream House
description: Darbie is quite deadly and especially when you mess with her boyfriend.

name: Heart Eyes
description: In Seattle on Valentine’s Day, a pair of co-workers working overtime are mistaken for a couple by a notorious couple-hunting killer. As the holiday panic grows, they’re forced to spend the most romantic night of the year trying to stay alive.

name: F1
description: A retired racing great is pulled back into Formula 1 to help a struggling team and guide a talented rookie. As pressure builds on and off the track, the film follows a high-speed comeback story about teamwork, rivalry, and one last shot at success.

name: The Map That Leads to You
description: A young woman travels Europe with friends before settling into a carefully planned future. A chance encounter sparks a romance that pulls her into deeper emotional discovery, testing what she thought she wanted and changing the course of her life.

name: Man with No Past
description: Waking up in an unfamiliar city, a man with no memory must confront the mysteries of his own identity. However, his desperate search to uncover the past pits him against a powerful enemy, leading to a showdown that ultimately reveals the truth.

name: Minions & Monsters
description: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

name: Preparation for the Next Life
description: A young immigrant trying to survive in New York’s hidden restaurant world crosses paths with a recently returned veteran struggling to rebuild his life. As their bond deepens, both begin to imagine a future beyond loneliness, hardship, and the paths they thought were already set for them.

name: The Wrong Paris
description: A woman heads to Paris, France for what she believes is a dating show, but her plans go sideways when she ends up in Paris, Texas instead. Her planned escape route gets complicated as the cowboy bachelor connection starts to heat up.

name: Pressure
description: In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

name: Saipan
description: Set during Ireland’s troubled build-up to the 2002 World Cup, this drama follows a fierce clash between a team captain and the national manager at a chaotic training camp. As poor preparation and rising frustration boil over, questions of leadership, pride and professionalism take center stage.

name: Hostile Takeover
description: A professional hitman tries to keep his life on track by attending a self-help group, but his crime boss starts to suspect disloyalty. Soon, a wave of rival assassins closes in, forcing him to fight his way through mounting pressure, uneasy alliances, and a mix of danger and offbeat humor.

name: The Assessment
description: Set in a climate-changed world where parenthood is restricted, a hopeful couple is put through a strict seven-day assessment by an evaluator. As the scrutiny intensifies, their private lives become part of the process, forcing them to deal with questions about suitability and what it means to be “good enough.”

name: All of You
description: Longtime best friends begin to question whether their bond has always been something more. As life moves on around them, they face the risk of changing everything to explore a love that has quietly been there for years.

name: The Mouse Trap: Welcome to the Mickeyverse
description: Mickey will be loose in the city and will kill people to search for his beloved called Minnie

name: Paradise Records
description: A struggling record store owner fights to keep his shop open with a quirky, tight-knit staff as everyday setbacks pile up. Along the way, the crew leans on humor, friendship, and music-fueled chaos to get through another unpredictable day behind the counter.

name: Champagne Problems
description: A driven American executive travels to Paris to acquire a champagne brand by Christmas, but the high-stakes negotiations quickly become complicated. While navigating a competitive deal, she also finds herself drawn to the heir to the bubbly empire.

name: Regretting You
description: After a devastating accident, a mother and her daughter are left to sort through what’s been uncovered, including a surprising betrayal. As grief and tension collide, they confront family secrets, reshape their idea of love, and work to rediscover each other.

name: One Mile: Chapter Two
description: A former elite soldier returns to a remote island after a violent, secretive group kidnaps his daughter in revenge. Cut off from help and facing enemies who seem ready for every move, he begins a desperate hunt to get her back.

name: Addition
description: A Melbourne mathematician finds comfort in a compulsive need to count and repeat numbers, using it to bring order to a chaotic, sometimes tragic world. As she tries to keep life feeling “normal” with her family, she also leans on an unusual confidante who helps her face everyday challenges.

name: Red Riding
description: After a family tragedy, a teenager leaves London for her estranged grandmother’s remote Scottish estate. As she uncovers unsettling secrets tied to missing children and a terrifying wolf, reality begins to feel unstable and survival becomes her main goal.

name: Frozen: The Hit Broadway Musical
description: A young royal sets out to find love during a long-awaited coronation, but a sudden crisis plunges the kingdom into an endless winter. Joined by an unlikely group of companions, the journey becomes a race to restore warmth and hope while learning what courage, friendship, family, and true love really mean.

name: Sarah's Oil
description: In early 20th-century Oklahoma Indian Territory, a young Black girl believes there’s oil beneath the seemingly worthless land she’s been allotted. When the discovery draws greedy opportunists, she leans on her community and unlikely allies to protect her rights and hold onto what’s hers.

name: The Drama
description: A soon-to-be-married couple faces a sudden crisis during the final stretch before their wedding. As plans unravel and emotions run high, the story explores trust, forgiveness, awkward social pressure, and whether love can withstand an uncomfortable surprise.

name: Echo Valley
description: A mother lives a secluded life until her troubled daughter arrives frightened and covered in someone else’s blood. As the mother tries to piece together what happened, she’s drawn into a dangerous web and discovers just how far she will go to protect her child.

name: Prisoner of War
description: During World War II, a captured British pilot is sent to a harsh prison camp where survival means enduring brutal hand-to-hand fights staged by his captors. Drawing on years of martial arts training, he resists intimidation, forms uneasy bonds with fellow prisoners, and looks for a chance to outlast the camp’s cruelty.

name: Remarkably Bright Creatures
description: A lonely elderly widow finds unexpected comfort when she connects with a stubborn octopus at the aquarium where she works. As a young man searches for his birth father, the threads of their lives begin to align with the octopus’s mystery mission.

name: Splitsville
description: After a divorce request shakes up a close couple’s life, a well-meaning partner leans on friends for support. The group discovers their happiness is tied to an open marriage, but one boundary-crossing moment turns everything into chaotic, tangled mess.

name: Office Romance
description: Jackie, President and CEO of Air Cruz, runs a tight ship in her business, including a rigid anti-fraternization policy for all her employees. When a new sexy lawyer begins working for her, that policy becomes very tested.

name: Untitled Home Invasion Romance
description: During a romantic getaway meant to repair a strained relationship, a desperate actor takes an extreme gamble. He arranges a staged break-in to jolt the weekend into something unforgettable, but the plan quickly tests trust and boundaries.

name: When We Went MAD!
description: This historical documentary celebrates the legacy and lasting influence of a legendary satire magazine through interviews with celebrity fans and the creators behind it. It looks back on the publication’s impact, spotlighting the artists, writers, and editors affectionately known as “The Usual Gang of Idiots.”

name: A Great Awakening
description: One of the most defining moments in American history is brought to life through an unlikely friendship between a reverend and a founding figure. Their bond helps illuminate ideas and tensions that shape the nation’s early story.

name: The Life of Chuck
description: An ordinary life is explored through moments of love, loss, wonder, and self-discovery, with dance and memory tying together the pieces. As the story moves across time, it reflects on how even a seemingly simple life can hold deep meaning.

name: Pitfall
description: After a young man is separated from his friends in the woods, he falls into a ten-foot deep pit of spikes, impaling him through his leg and leaving him trapped. He quickly learns that his fall was not an accident.

name: BFFs
description: Two best friends keep trying to outdo each other with practical jokes, turning their friendship into a nonstop prank war. As the stunts escalate, the fun starts to blur into real consequences and they’re forced to reckon with how far is too far.

name: House on Eden
description: A trio of paranormal investigators heads to a remote abandoned house for what seems like another ghost-hunting stop, but the night quickly turns dangerous. As strange events build and people start vanishing, they realize they may be dealing with something far older and more hostile than expected.

name: Dog Man
description: A faithful police dog and his human officer are badly hurt on the job, leading to a strange surgery that fuses them into one crime-fighting hero. Now the new team must stop feline supervillain schemes as they try to earn approval and keep the city safe.

name: The Penguin Lessons
description: Set in 1976 Argentina amid escalating violence and chaos, a world-weary English teacher starts out emotionally guarded. An unlikely friendship with an oil-slick penguin helps rekindle his compassion, even as tensions rise at a prestigious boarding school and beyond.

name: Piglet
description: A birthday camping trip turns into a fight for survival when a brutal pig-masked killer starts hunting a group of friends in the woods. As fear spreads and the body count rises, hidden links to the nightmare push the survivors into a desperate struggle to make it out alive.

name: 100 Nights of Hero
description: In a remote castle ruled by strict expectations, a young bride faces pressure from her marriage as a charismatic guest upsets the fragile balance in the household. To hold the situation at bay, a devoted maid turns to storytelling, weaving a fantasy-infused battle of desire, power, and survival.

name: Killing Mary Sue
description: A corrupt senator arranges for the murder of his biggest liability, his erratic burnout stepdaughter, only for her to unwittingly discover her natural talent as an untouchable killer.

name: Marked Men: Rule + Shaw
description: A rule-following student and a rebellious tattoo artist cross a line after years of tension, forcing them to confront their differences and complicated baggage. As feelings deepen, they have to decide whether their opposite worlds can meet without tearing them apart.

name: The Family Plan 2
description: After putting his past behind him, a father tries to spend Christmas focusing on his kids—until his daughter’s independent plans pull the whole family into danger. He arranges a trip to London, but an unexpected enemy makes their vacation targets instead of just holiday fun.

name: The Carman Family Deaths
description: After a young man is rescued at sea following a family fishing trip, the incident sparks intense suspicion and a wider investigation. As questions mount around two deaths in a wealthy New England family, the story follows the accusations, shifting theories, and the long shadow cast over everyone involved.

name: Macbeth
description: A bold, high-concept staging of Shakespeare’s tragedy, filmed live at London’s Donmar Warehouse. This modern interpretation leans into a chilling atmosphere while exploring ambition, guilt, and the story’s psychological undercurrents with unusual sensitivity and emotional weight.

name: Brimstone Terrace
description: After taking his own life, a struggling public defender finds himself condemned to Hell. When the ruler of the underworld notices his talents, he is offered a deal that could change his fate, forcing him to weigh survival against his sense of right and wrong.

name: Take A Friend
description: On the last night before college graduation, a student sets out to film every moment as a personal record. As the night spirals into unexpected chaos, he must decide whether to keep the camera rolling or put it down and truly be present.

name: Off the Grid
description: A brilliant scientist disappears into remote country after a corrupt company tries to turn a breakthrough invention into a weapon. As armed pursuers close in, the hunt becomes a tense survival game where brains, preparation, and the landscape become his best defense.

name: The Gates
description: A road trip takes a terrifying turn when three friends witness a killing inside a gated community. With exits cut off and residents turning on them, they must stick together under pressure as suspicion spreads and a powerful local figure tightens the net.

name: The Housemaid
description: A woman trying to leave a troubled past behind takes a live-in housekeeping job with a wealthy couple, hoping it will be a fresh start. Inside the polished home, the dream opportunity turns tense as secrets, desire, and power games begin to close in around her.

name: Reminders of Him
description: After returning home to rebuild her life, a young mother fights to reconnect with the daughter she’s never been allowed to know. When a local bar owner with ties to the child offers unexpected understanding, a fragile bond grows—bringing comfort, complications, and a hard-earned chance at forgiveness.

name: Twisted
description: Two young scammers make easy money by leasing upscale New York apartments they do not own to unsuspecting renters. Their scheme starts to unravel when one property owner turns the situation around, pulling them into a much darker and more dangerous game.

name: Frontier Crucible
description: In 1870s Arizona Territory, a desperately needed wagon full of medical supplies falls victim to an Apache attack. The only man who can guide it through is Merrick Beckford, but in order to get there, he’ll need to enlist the help of a trio of dangerous outlaws hellbent on survival. When they accidentally kill an Apache scout, all bets are off, and survival is the name of the game.

name: In Whose Name?
description: Built from six years of close-up footage, this documentary follows a hugely influential and controversial music figure through public pressure, private struggles, and constant reinvention. It aims for an intimate, unfiltered look at the person behind the headlines, fame, and debate.

name: The Chosen: Last Supper
description: Jesus rides into the holy city as king, but finds His Father’s house has been turned from a place of prayer into a corrupt market. As the Jewish High Priest schemes against the would-be Messiah, Jesus strikes first—turning the tables on religious corruption.

name: Rule Breakers
description: In a place where girls’ education is treated like defiance, a determined mentor helps a small group of students pursue science and robotics. As their talent gains attention beyond their borders, they face growing pressure, danger, and hard choices while trying to keep their hopes alive.

name: The Dog Stars
description: After the world's population has been ravaged by a pandemic, a man lives a lonesome existence in a Colorado airplane hangar with his dog and a dour gunman he has befriended. When a mysterious transmission comes through on the radio while he’s flying his old Cessna, it sparks a hunt for the provenance of the sound.

name: Tornado
description: After a traveling puppet show is attacked by a ruthless gang, a young performer steals their stolen gold and goes on the run through a harsh rural landscape. With pursuers closing in and loyalties shifting, the chase becomes a test of survival, resolve, and the fight to shape a future on their own terms.

name: Protector
description: A former war hero is pulled back into violence when her daughter is kidnapped, forcing her into the criminal underworld. With law enforcement and the military closing in, she races against time, relying on hard-earned skills and sheer determination to bring her child home.

name: The Last Supper
description: In the days leading to betrayal, a gathering of disciples unravels into a web of secrets and hidden motives. As tensions simmer beneath the surface, trust is tested, and loyalty is questioned. The Last Supper becomes a night where nothing is as it seems, and every glance hides a deeper truth.

name: Hurry Up Tomorrow
description: A sleepless musician is drawn into a strange journey after meeting an unexpected stranger. As the night unfolds, the experience begins to shake his sense of self and push him into a tense, personal reckoning with fame, identity, and what lies beneath the surface.

name: Eddington
description: In a small New Mexico town during May 2020, a dispute between local leaders grows into a wider community crisis. As fear, politics, and mistrust spread, neighbors turn on one another and everyday tensions begin to boil over.

name: Rosemead
description: A seriously ill mother discovers her teenage son’s disturbing violent fixations just as time and options begin to run out. Inspired by true events, this family drama follows her desperate struggle to protect him while weighing the possible danger to others.

name: Riff Raff
description: A retired hitman is trying to enjoy a quiet holiday season when unexpected family members show up at his door. Their sudden arrival pulls him back toward a dangerous past, as old criminal connections close in and threaten his hard-won peace.

name: Balls Up
description: Two marketing executives go “balls out” with a daring, full-coverage condom sponsorship tied to the World Cup. After a drunken celebration in Brazil triggers a global scandal, they race to outrun furious fans, criminals, and officials while trying to save their careers and get home alive.

name: The Pickup
description: A routine cash pickup turns chaotic when two mismatched armored truck drivers face a coordinated ambush by ruthless criminals led by a clever mastermind. As the situation escalates, they get pulled into a high-stakes attempt involving big money and mounting danger.

name: Maintenance Required
description: An independent owner of an all-women mechanic shop faces a new corporate competitor moving in across the street. Looking for support, she opens up to an anonymous online confidant, not realizing the person on the other side is tied to the rivalry, and their growing connection puts both her business and her heart on the line.

name: Novocaine
description: A mild-mannered bank worker who can’t feel pain is forced out of his careful routine when someone he cares about is taken during a robbery. With the police unsure of his role, he throws himself into a frantic, increasingly dangerous chase, relying on grit, luck, and a strange advantage that keeps him moving.

name: You're Cordially Invited
description: A comedy where two weddings are accidentally booked on the same day at the same venue, forcing each bridal party to fight to keep their own celebration intact. As the families face cramped conditions and mounting chaos, rival determination takes over in a nonstop showdown to protect what matters most.

name: Juliet & Romeo
description: In medieval Verona, two young lovers defy their feuding worlds as a familiar legend is reshaped with a fresh perspective and modern English. This bold retelling swaps classic verse for contemporary pop songs, aiming to bring the romance, rivalry, and high-stakes choices to life with big energy and a new twist on tradition.

name: Predator: Badlands
description: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator teams up with an unlikely ally: a damaged android. Together, they set out on a treacherous journey to track down the ultimate adversary and prove themselves.

name: Cliffhanger
description: During a weekend trip with a billionaire's son, seasoned mountaineer Ray Cooper and his daughter Sydney are targeted by a gang of kidnappers. Ray’s other daughter Naomi, still haunted by a past climbing accident, witnesses the attack and escapes. To save her family, she must confront her fears and fight for survival.

name: Hellfire
description: A lone drifter arrives in a small town where residents live in fear under a ruthless crime boss and his crew. With trouble closing in and the community pushed to the edge, the newcomer decides to step in and fight back, even as questions linger about his past.

name: T Bird
description: A homeless streetfighter breaks up a child trafficking ring

name: Broke
description: A rodeo rider facing the decline of his career gets trapped in a brutal blizzard while struggling with a serious head injury. As he fights to endure the storm, he looks back on the choices, pressures, and relationships that made his dreams feel farther away.

name: Sidelined: The QB and Me
description: A determined high school dancer is set on earning a spot at an elite dance program tied to her late mother’s legacy, until an unexpected connection with the school’s star quarterback complicates her plans. As both face family pressure, grief, and big ambitions, they must figure out whether love and dreams can coexist without either one getting pushed aside.

name: Wish You Were Here
description: Charlotte finds herself in a rut, searching for a spark that seems just out of reach. After she has a whirlwind night of romance and imagining a future with a man named Adam, he ghosts her. When Charlotte finally discovers that Adam is terminally ill, she helps him spend his last days living life to the fullest.

name: Bloat
description: After a near-death drowning accident, a young boy's family is horrified to discover he has become possessed by a legendary demon from the depths of the lake. As the family races against time to save the boy's soul, the evil monster inside the child tears the family apart as it seeks to destroy everyone in its path.

name: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
description: After an earlier victory, two heroic brothers are pulled into a new cosmic adventure when a young villain tries to free an imprisoned parent and revive a powerful family legacy. With help from familiar and new allies, they race across starry worlds to stop the plan.

name: Witchboard
description: After a young couple relocates to New Orleans to start a new chapter, they uncover an old spirit board with a dangerous history. Using it awakens dark forces that blur trust and reality, pulling them into a terrifying spiral of possession, deception, and escalating supernatural threats.

name: Ice Road: Vengeance
description: An ice road driver travels to Nepal to scatter his late brother’s ashes on Mount Everest. During a tense bus journey across dangerous mountain terrain, he and a guide face a group of mercenaries, forcing them to fight to protect themselves and the travelers on board, as well as local villagers.

name: Popeye's Revenge
description: A group of young adults heads to a remote property with plans to turn it into a summer attraction, but a local legend tied to the place starts to feel dangerously real. As fog rolls in, their weekend project becomes a fight to survive a familiar slasher setup.

name: Lifeline
description: A late-night suicide hotline operator receives a disturbing call from someone claiming to be him, knowing personal details only he would know. The caller threatens to end his life within the hour, forcing the operator into a tense, emotional race against time. As the clock ticks down, he must confront his deepest fears and uncover the truth before it’s too late to save “himself.”

name: Moana
description: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

name: Animal Friends
description: Two fugitive animals embark on an adventure across America to find the ranch that was once their home, healing their friendship while pursued by an equally "odd-couple" DEA agent and Fish and Wildlife ranger with something to prove.

name: HIM
description: After a serious head injury threatens a rising football star’s future, he accepts an offer to train with a legendary champion at an isolated compound. As the intense regimen ramps up, the mentor’s charm gives way to unsettling mind games, strange rituals, and escalating pressure to sacrifice everything for greatness.

name: Mother Mary
description: Long-buried wounds resurface when an iconic pop star reconnects with her estranged best friend and former costume designer on the eve of a high-profile comeback performance. As the reunion unfolds, their past complications and tense working relationship come to the surface.

name: Into the Deep
description: A group of divers heads out to search for sunken treasure, but their trip turns into a fight for survival when they cross paths with violent criminals and modern-day pirates. Trapped in dangerous waters, they’re forced back into the depths while a relentless great white circles, making every dive a high-stakes gamble.

name: The Stranger in My Home
description: A family’s seemingly perfect life is shaken when a stranger claims their teenage daughter was switched at birth. As doubt and suspicion spread, the situation spirals into a tense domestic thriller filled with secrets, emotional fallout, and escalating danger.

name: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
description: A widowed single mother tries to rebuild her life while balancing work, parenting, grief, and the pressure to meet someone new. With friends and family around her, she steps back into dating and finds herself pulled between a younger admirer and a kind figure from her child’s school.

name: Companion
description: During a weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate, friends get pulled into escalating secrets involving deception and advanced technology. As tension mounts and loyalties shift, they uncover unsettling truths about themselves and the world around them.

name: Altered
description: In an alternate present where genetically enhanced people hold power, two outcasts push back against a society built on inequality. As corrupt leaders exploit the divide, they risk everything to expose the system and fight for a fairer future in a tense, dystopian world.

name: Busboys
description: Two clueless friends think landing jobs as restaurant waiters will fix everything in their lives. The work brings unexpected opportunities and headaches, forcing them to learn what it really takes to get ahead without losing themselves.

name: Uppercut
description: A hardened former boxing champion agrees to train a determined young fighter, and their mismatched partnership turns into an unlikely alliance. Through tough sparring and hard-earned lessons, the trainee learns that real strength isn’t just about winning fights, but about facing setbacks and pushing forward when life hits hardest.

name: Nobody 2
description: A former assassin, trying to reconnect with his family, brings them to a small-town theme park for a nostalgic getaway. Their trip quickly turns into another fight for survival when they collide with corrupt operators, a crooked sheriff, and a ruthless crime boss.

name: Last Breath
description: Seasoned deep-sea divers face a brutal undersea emergency when rough conditions and equipment failure leave one crewmate stranded far below the surface. With oxygen running low, the team races against time to attempt a rescue in hostile, unlit depths.

name: In Your Dreams
description: Two siblings step into the wildly absurd landscape of their own dreams to ask the Sandman for help with their family. Their journey turns fears and hopes into a surreal quest where dream logic rules everything.

name: The Mime
description: When a murderous mime starts a killing spree in a quiet neighborhood, an already injured teenager must survive his onslaught of terror.

name: M3GAN 2.0
description: When stolen robot technology is turned into a dangerous military weapon, the team behind the original doll decides their best chance is bringing her back with major upgrades. What follows is a bigger, more action-heavy showdown built around AI gone wrong.

name: Trust
description: After a public scandal, a famous actress hides out in a remote rental to escape the spotlight. Her attempt at a quiet reset turns into a fight for control when dangerous intruders arrive looking for an easy payoff, forcing her to rely on quick thinking to survive.

name: Wardriver
description: A hacker who targets banks tries to keep his code-based crimes from hurting ordinary people, but being noticed changes everything. As the stolen money draws dangerous attention, he’s pulled into a tense situation with a woman who could be his way out—or his biggest threat.

name: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
description: Two singles meet at a mutual friend’s wedding and, through a surprising twist of fate, set off on a funny, fantastical journey together. They revisit important moments from their respective pasts, exploring how those memories shape who they are now—and whether they can change what comes next.

name: Do Not Enter
description: A group of young explorers breaks into an abandoned hotel to investigate its mysteries, but their search quickly turns dangerous when they face an unsettling supernatural presence. With another crew also hunting for a rumored hidden treasure, tensions rise as the night becomes a fight to survive and escape.

name: KPop Demon Hunters
description: A chart-topping K-pop group lives a double life, thrilling fans onstage while secretly defending them from supernatural danger. The movie mixes pop-star energy, fantasy action, humor, and themes of friendship and self-acceptance.

name: Christmas Karma
description: In contemporary London, miserly British-Indian businessman Eshan Sood is compelled by three ghosts to reflect on his life and to consider the needs of those around him.

name: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
description: Desperate to prove he’s brave, SpongeBob follows The Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure. The journey plunges him to the deepest parts of the deep sea, where he takes on challenges and explores a world no Sponge has visited before.

name: The Sound
description: A group of climbers embarks on a dangerous climb that has been off-limits for years. What initially begins as an audacious expedition transforms into a battle for survival against a force that toys with them.

name: The Twits
description: When a pair of nasty villains try to pull a scheme that would let them control their town, two brave kids join forces with a family of magical animals to stop them. Along the way, they face gross-out tricks, goofy obstacles, and a big push to protect the creatures in danger.

name: Exit Protocol
description: A veteran assassin known for taking out other killers decides he wants to leave the job behind. When the people he once targeted become unexpected allies, the pair must work together to stay ahead of relentless pursuers and find a way out alive.

name: Ladies First
description: An arrogant but charismatic ladies' man finds his life of money, power and casual flings upended when he wakes up in a parallel world dominated by women.

name: Girls Like Girls
description: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.

name: Violent Night 2
description: The sequel to the 2022 film. Plot TBA.

name: Resurrection Road
description: An elite squad of six Black soldiers, led by ex-slave Barabbas, have been sent on a suicide mission; to infiltrate a Confederate fort deep in the Arkansas woods and blow up its long-range guns, altering the course of the war.

name: Re-Election
description: A 40-something underdog gets a rare chance at a do-over by returning to high school and running again for class president. This warm comedy mixes old regrets, awkward culture clashes, and a hopeful lesson about growing up at any age.

name: Untold: The Fall of Favre
description: This eye-opening documentary delves into Brett Favre's controversial career, the dark side of sports stardom, and the scandals that marred his legacy.

name: Joe's College Road Trip
description: A loud, unfiltered older relative takes a sheltered, college-bound teen on a cross-country road trip meant to toughen him up and broaden his view of the world. Along the way, the chaotic detours mix raunchy comedy with moments that touch on culture, history, and a generational gap.

name: One Mile: Chapter One
description: After leaving prison, a father hopes a college road trip will help repair his bond with his teenage daughter. Their uneasy reunion turns into a fight for survival when a violent cult targets them in the wilderness.

name: Like Father Like Son
description: Eli is a young man whose father waits on death row for the crime of murder in the first degree. As Eli’s life begins to fall apart, he discovers similar terrifying triggers in himself and takes extreme measures to ensure that the family’s string of savagery comes to an end.

name: East of Wall
description: After losing her husband, a tough, independent horse trainer struggles to keep her ranch afloat in the Badlands while carrying heavy grief. As she takes in a group of at-risk teenagers and tries to hold her makeshift family together, an unexpected business opportunity forces her to weigh survival, trust, and what home really means.

name: A Merry Little Ex-Mas
description: Recently separated, Kate wants one last, perfect family Christmas before her divorce is final and the house is sold. Her plans go sideways when her soon-to-be ex brings home his new, younger girlfriend, turning holiday traditions into a chaotic mix of logistics and feelings.

name: Turbulence
description: A young married couple takes a hot air balloon trip over Italy’s Dolomites to reconnect and reset their strained relationship. When the pilot allows an unexpected extra passenger aboard, the peaceful getaway turns into a tense fight for control and survival high above the mountains.

name: Henry Danger: The Movie
description: A young hero teams up with a devoted fan and an old friend after a reality-hopping device throws everything into chaos. With alternate worlds opening around them, they race through a fast-moving adventure to find a way back before getting trapped for good.

name: Valiant One
description: With tensions between North and South Korea, a US helicopter crashes on the North side. The survivors must work together to protect a civilian tech specialist and find their way out without the help of US military support.

name: Xeno
description: After an alien crashes in the desert, a lonely teenager forms a powerful bond with the creature and tries to keep it safe. With authorities closing in and trouble at home, the friendship becomes a fight for survival that could affect more than just their small world.

name: Cash Out 2: High Rollers
description: A seasoned thief is forced into a high-stakes casino job after someone close to him is taken as leverage. With rival criminals closing in and law enforcement on his trail, the crew must plan a risky score where every move could cost them everything.

name: Bight
description: Two couples test the boundaries of an open relationship during an intimate night that quickly turns tense. As old resentments surface and trust erodes, the evening becomes a pressure cooker of jealousy, manipulation, and emotional fallout that leaves everyone questioning what they really want.

name: Salvable
description: A worn-down boxer struggles to hold onto work, self-respect, and a fractured family life. When an old associate draws him toward risky, illegal fights and shady opportunities, he must decide how far he’ll go to rebuild his future and protect what matters most.

name: Melodrive
description: After separating from his wife due to an emotional affair, a homeward bound musician goes on a road trip, but after bumping into his high school sweetheart, his feelings become even more off balance.

name: Sherlock Holmes: Mare of the Night
description: A horrifyingly fresh look at the iconic detective that delves into his worst nightmares that haunt him about one case he could never solve.

name: Killer Whale
description: Best friends get stranded in a remote lagoon, where a dangerous killer whale named Ceto circles their situation. Trapped and under threat, they must work together to survive the escalating danger around them.

name: Sniper: The Last Stand
description: An expert sniper and a government operative lead an elite team into hostile territory to stop an arms dealer from using a devastating new weapon. As the mission grows more desperate, a seasoned fighter must adjust to command, mentor a rookie, and keep the team alive under heavy pressure.

name: The Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
description: A former big-city criminologist returns to her Texas hometown to teach at the local university and run a community arts shop. When a wealthy yarn-company heiress is found dead during a special event, a small-town circle of amateur sleuths teams up with local law enforcement to untangle family rivalries and protect the future of a major business.

name: The Bad Guys: Little Lies and Alibis
description: A group of former criminals do their best to get to their parole interview on time.

name: Pie To Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
description: A small-town baker gets pulled into a murder case when a local theater rival is found dead and her own family is drawn under suspicion. As she tries to clear her mother's name, the investigation unfolds alongside a gently growing romance.

name: Melania
description: Offering unprecedented access to the 20 days leading up to a Presidential Inauguration, the film follows the First Lady-elect as she helps orchestrate plans, manages the transition into a new White House routine, and returns to public life with her family. It features exclusive footage from key meetings and private conversations, plus never-before-seen environments.

name: The Royal We
description: After her sister runs off, a woman who has kept her distance from royal life is suddenly expected to enter an arranged marriage with a prince. As duty, peace, and personal happiness collide, she must decide how to handle a future she never planned.

name: The Reluctant Royal
description: A working-class mechanic from Philadelphia gets an unexpected shock when he learns his estranged father is a duke. Thrown into an unfamiliar world of tradition and expectations, he tries to find his place while navigating family tensions, culture clash, and a growing connection with a sharp, capable advisor.

name: A Very Jonas Christmas Movie
description: Three brothers race from London to New York to make it home for Christmas, but a string of travel mishaps and unexpected detours keeps piling up. Along the way, they’re pushed to reconnect, laugh at themselves, and remember what the holiday is really about.

name: Kiff Lore of the Ring Light
description: Kiff and her friends go on an adventure to destroy a ring light of immense power.

name: The Land That Time Forgot
description: Present-day survivors of a sunken naval vessel capture a Russian sub, only to find themselves stranded on an island filled with deadly, prehistoric creatures

name: Silent Zone
description: In a zombie-ravaged world, a resourceful teen and her protector struggle to stay alive amid relentless threats. Their fight for survival tests their hope and loyalty as danger keeps closing in around them.

name: The Space Rodent
description: On Halloween night in a quiet small town, a strange alien rodent crash-lands and turns the celebration into chaos. A group of locals must rely on improvised plans, odd weapons, and humor to survive the creature’s attacks.

name: STRAW
description: What will be her last straw? A devastatingly bad day pushes a hardworking single mother toward her breaking point, where a desperate moment spirals into a terrifying, high-stakes situation involving media attention and law enforcement.

name: Being Eddie
description: From teen comedian to Hollywood legend, this documentary follows a celebrated entertainer as he looks back on his showbiz journey with raw honesty and humor. It blends personal reflections with career memories, highlighting both the highs and the quieter side of staying grounded.

name: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
description: A young football standout and an ambitious dancer try to hold onto their relationship while facing setbacks, distance, and big decisions about their futures. As pressure builds, both are pushed to rethink what they want and who they are becoming.

name: Diabolic
description: A woman desperate for a miracle cure is drawn into a secluded faith community, only to find herself haunted by a cursed witch’s spirit. As fear and pressure close in, she must fight to keep control of her own life before the evil presence can take hold.

name: High Ground
description: A quiet border town is thrown into chaos when a mysterious prisoner is brought into the local jail. As outside forces close in, the sheriff and the community must hold their ground, testing loyalties, courage, and how far they’ll go to protect one another.

name: Relationship Goals
description: A driven TV producer in New York sets her sights on a historic promotion to run a top morning show, only to find her ex competing for the same job. As work pressures rise and old feelings resurface, she tries to stay focused while rethinking what she wants from love and ambition.

name: Matthew Perry: A Hollywood Tragedy
description: The story of Matthew Perry's rise to fame is interwoven with the harrowing story of his final days, as his assistant allegedly sought ketamine from sources the U.S. Attorney claims "should have known better." We hear from some of Perry's collaborators, Hollywood insiders, and law enforcement in telling this tragic Hollywood story.

name: Tinsel Town
description: A faded Hollywood action star gets roped into performing in a small English town’s Christmas pantomime. Surrounded by energetic locals, a no-nonsense dance teacher, and complicated family ties, he’s pushed out of his comfort zone and starts to rediscover warmth, community, and a bit of seasonal magic.

name: Goodbye June
description: Over the holiday season, four siblings are brought back together when their mother’s health takes a serious turn. As the family faces difficult choices and old tensions rise, they struggle to support one another and find a way through a painful time with honesty, love, and a little humor.

name: The Twister: Caught in the Storm
description: This documentary revisits the devastating 2011 tornado that tore through Joplin, Missouri, using firsthand accounts and raw footage from locals and security cameras. It focuses on what it felt like in the moment and how ordinary people endured the chaos, fear, and aftermath of a sudden natural disaster.

name: Muzzle: City of Wolves
description: A former police K-9 officer tries to live quietly with his family and retired dog, but a violent attack pulls him back into danger. With a new canine partner, he enters a tense pursuit to protect the people he loves and confront the threat closing in.

name: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
description: This documentary examines Japan’s struggle during a nuclear disaster that unfolded in the wake of a devastating earthquake and tsunami. It looks at the scale of the crisis, the human response, and the wider questions raised about preparedness, responsibility, and the risks of powerful technology.

name: The Thistle in the Kiss
description: Declan has had no luck with the holidays: his girlfriend Stephanie broke up with him on the way to Christmas dinner. He's managed to keep it secret until New Year's Day, when his car breaks down and his sister Rachel shows up to help him fix it. Crumbling under her relentless curiosity, Declan is now on a crash course to confront the poor decisions of his life.

name: Preschool
description: Two dads become obsessed with getting their children into a highly sought-after preschool, turning a simple application into a ridiculous rivalry. As the competition escalates into increasingly over-the-top stunts, the families are forced to confront what they’re really prioritizing.

name: The Highest Stakes
description: Five strangers gather at a luxurious hotel for an exclusive, high-stakes poker game. As the night wears on, rising tension and buried secrets turn the competition into a dangerous test where trust is fragile and every decision could mean the difference between safety and disaster.

name: Rob1n
description: When a robotics expert channels the grief of losing his 11 year-old son into building 'Robin', a fully functioning robotic doll, a series of horrific events makes it clear Robin will do whatever it takes to have his creator all to himself.

name: My Secret Santa
description: A single mom must find work during the holidays, and a ski resort needs someone to fill a Santa role. With the rent and her daughter’s snowboarding dreams on the line, she takes a bold disguise plan and hopes to win over a charming hotel heir.

name: The Breadwinner
description: When a major business opportunity takes a mother away for an extended trip, her partner suddenly becomes the full-time caregiver at home. As a first-time stay-at-home dad, he must juggle parenting, household duties, and the pressure of keeping the family steady during a big transition.

name: Moses the Black
description: A feared Chicago gang leader returns home after prison, pulled between revenge, street power, and the weight of his choices. As pressure mounts from rivals and the law, a faith-rooted message of repentance challenges him to face consequences and consider whether real change is possible.

name: Pets
description: This documentary travels around the world to explore the bond between people and the animals they care for, from household pets to rescued and rehabilitated creatures. Through interviews, archival moments, and viral clips, it captures the joy, challenges, and everyday quirks that come with sharing life with animals.

name: Wildcat
description: A former black-ops crew reunites for a high-risk heist when their leader’s young child is in danger. As the plan unfolds, old loyalties and hard choices collide with a gritty criminal underworld, pushing the team to rely on skills they hoped to leave behind.

name: The Punisher: One Last Kill
description: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight. He must face escalating danger as his past refuses to stay buried.

name: Grenfell: Uncovered
description: Survivors, witnesses, and experts recount a deadly residential tower fire in London and the investigation that followed. The documentary brings together personal accounts and probing analysis to examine what led up to the tragedy and why it unfolded so disastrously.

name: Say Less
description: A weekend home alone turns messy when teen siblings make clashing romantic plans under the same roof. Hurt feelings, rivalry, and last-minute invitations push a simple night into awkward chaos, forcing them to face family tension and their own insecurities.

name: The Confession
description: After returning to her childhood home, a woman finds a tape left by her late father confessing to a murder linked to a sinister force. When her young son begins acting in deeply unsettling ways, she races to uncover the truth and protect her family.

name: Veronica's Secret
description: A girl's disappearance spirals into unraveling a dark past and its secrets.

name: National Theatre Live: Inter Alia
description: A high-achieving Crown Court judge balances a demanding career with a lively home life, including a love of karaoke and a close-knit family. When a sudden event threatens to upend everything, they must fight to keep their personal and professional worlds from falling apart.

name: You, Me & Tuscany
description: A woman crashes at an empty Italian villa while posing as the owner’s fiancée, hoping to turn the trip into a fresh start. Instead, her lie tangles her up with a lively family and sparks an unexpected romance in Tuscany’s summer festival setting.

name: Oklahoma City Bombing: American Terror
description: This gripping documentary revisits the shocking 1995 bombing of an Oklahoma City federal building, the deadliest act of domestic terrorism in US history.

name: Air Force Elite: Thunderbirds
description: This documentary follows an elite Air Force demonstration team through a demanding training season, showing the skill, trust, and discipline needed to perform at the highest level. Alongside the flying, it highlights the pressure, teamwork, and personal sacrifices behind the public spectacle.

name: Behind the Curtain: Stranger Things: The First Shadow
description: This behind-the-scenes documentary follows the cast and crew of an award-winning live stage show that expands a familiar small-town supernatural universe. It offers a look at how the production comes together, from performances to creative collaboration, as the team brings the story to the stage.

name: Clika
description: An ambitious small-town musician chases a breakthrough after a performance clip goes viral. As he pushes to claim a spot in a rising Mexican-American music scene, new opportunities bring pressure, tough choices, and a risky situation that’s more dangerous than he expected.

name: I Can Only Imagine 2
description: After a hit song turns a band’s frontman into a major success, the pressure of life on the road starts straining his family and exposing old wounds. A new touring partner brings humor, perspective, and hard truths that push everyone toward gratitude, healing, and what matters most.

name: Making Megaforce
description: A devoted fan sets out to make a documentary about a famously failed 1980s action movie, hoping to prove it deserves a second look. As he interviews cast and crew and reconnects with a childhood hero, the project spirals into a funny, heartfelt celebration of fandom, friendship, and over-the-top stunts.

name: The Last GunFight
description: ​In a ruthless underground tournament, the world's top assassins fight to the death. But hidden among them is a rogue crew with its own deadly agenda: infiltrate the competition, survive the bloodbath, and take down the mastermind pulling the strings.

name: A Deadly American Marriage
description: A chilling 911 call and a brutal scene inside a quiet suburban home raise urgent questions about what happened. Presented from both sides, the documentary explores competing accounts surrounding a family's tragedy.

name: Two Sleepy People
description: Two coworkers try a new line of melatonin gummies and soon find themselves returning to the same shared dream night after night. As the strange routine repeats, the dream space becomes a place for humor, awkward honesty, and heartfelt conversations that push them to reflect on what they’re carrying in waking life.

name: Casa Grande
description: A woman returns to her family’s farm during a painful period, where her father’s serious illness and outside business pressure force everyone to face old conflicts. As the future feels uncertain, the family must decide how to move forward together.

name: Infiltrate
description: In a crime-ridden city, a government agent is pushed into an impossible choice when a loved one is kidnapped and she’s blackmailed into targeting powerful criminals. As she goes deeper into the underworld, her drive for justice exposes widespread corruption and forces a life-changing decision.

name: Saving Buddy Charles
description: As best friends Clara and Sydney prepare to part ways for college, they embark on a cross-country journey to rescue Sydney’s pet lizard from her ex-boyfriend. Unbeknownst to Sydney, Clara is harboring a life-altering secret that may just change their friendship forever.

name: Borley Rectory: The Awakening
description: In 1900, young Reverend Henry Bull and his sister, Kitty, are tasked with taking over the duties of their family home in Essex, a majestic Victorian mansion built on the site of an old monastery. Unaware of the sinister forces that lurk within, the pair are soon confronted by terrifying paranormal activities that threaten their loved ones. Desperate to protect themselves from the demonic intrusion, they call upon the services of a trusted family friend to investigate the origins of the vengeful ghosts which haunt their property. But these are spirits who will not rest, and Borley Rectory is doomed to gain a chilling reputation, as the most haunted house in all of Britain.

name: A Loud House Christmas Movie: Naughty or Nice
description: Trying to get off Santa’s naughty list before Christmas, a determined kid hacks the North Pole’s system and accidentally throws the whole holiday into chaos. With the naughty and nice lists reversed worldwide, the family heads north to undo the damage and save Christmas.

name: Trainwreck: The Real Project X
description: This documentary looks at how a teen birthday invitation accidentally spreads online and turns a quiet Dutch town into a night of confusion, partying, and damage. It follows the fallout while exploring crowd behavior, online sharing, and questions about who should have stepped in sooner.

name: Trainwreck: The Astroworld Tragedy
description: Featuring exclusive interviews with survivors, paramedics and festival staff, this documentary examines the 2021 Astroworld tragedy and its aftermath. It revisits what unfolded at the event and how people experienced the fallout afterward.

name: The Mortuary Assistant
description: A new mortuary assistant takes a night shift expecting routine embalming and paperwork, but the quiet halls soon feel wrong. As strange signs mount and fear creeps in, the job turns into a tense fight to keep control and make it through the night.

name: Shaun the Sheep: The Beast of Mossy Bottom
description: The residents of Mossy Bottom Farm looking forward to Halloween – until the clumsy Farmer trashes the flock’s beloved pumpkin patch! When Shaun turns mad scientist to fix the problem, things rapidly spiral out of control. With the Farmer missing and a wild beast roaming the woods of Mossingham, all the ingredients are in place for a monstrously fun family adventure.

name: Sketch
description: A young girl’s sketchbook draws a strange pond into her world, bringing her drawings to life as chaotic monsters that spread through town. With their family under pressure, the siblings must regroup and find a way to stop what they never meant to unleash.

name: Timeless Tidings of Joy
description: Ally, inherits Timeless Tidings, a shop her grandmother, Joy, opened in the 1940s to sell her handmade letter-press tidings. The shop was a labor of love, service, and sacrifice throughout the decades for Joy. Ally always saw Joy’s sacrifices for the shop as a burden on Joy’s life and happiness. When Ally returns to the shop to prepare it for sale, she meets Bennett, an old soul, who wants to preserve her Grandma Joy’s legacy. As Ally and Bennett navigate the next steps, divine intervention forces them both to take a new, or rather old look at the fate of the shop and themselves.

name: Inside That House
description: After a number of strange disappearances have been reported in the area, Andrew and Jason, two brothers who received a drone for graduation, decide to film around their town to learn more about them, but then become distracted by a new girl in school who lives nearby. The two boys devise a plan to sneak their drone through an open window of her home, only to discover a terrible, dark secret.

name: A Gunfighter's Deal
description: A troubled man is approached by a mysterious stranger who offers to shape him into the fast-draw legend he’s always dreamed of becoming. As the promise of power and recognition grows, so do the moral questions, manipulation, and consequences that come with chasing a name in the Old West.

name: Affinity
description: A troubled former special-operations soldier is trying to live quietly while battling trauma when a mysterious woman enters his life with no memory of her past. After she suddenly vanishes, he is pulled back into brutal danger and a wider conspiracy to bring her back.

name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Chrome Alone 2 - Lost in New Jersey
description: When a mysterious toy company seeks to profit off the turtles' new hero status, the brothers follow the clues to New Jersey and make a shocking discovery in this all new original short.

name: Peppa Meets the Baby Cinema Experience
description: This family-friendly cinema outing follows a cheerful animated family as they prepare for a big change at home: the arrival of a new baby. Along the way, the story leans into excitement, togetherness, and gentle adventure aimed at young viewers.

name: Jingle Bell Heist
description: Two struggling hourly workers team up to rob a posh London department store on Christmas Eve, hoping it will solve their money troubles. As their plans unfold, their connection grows and the job turns into a holiday rom-com with plenty of festive charm.

name: Snoopy Presents: A Summer Musical
description: A cheerful group heads to summer camp for songs, friendship, and outdoor fun, while one newcomer struggles to see why it matters. When the camp’s future is threatened, they pull together to protect a place filled with shared memories and simple joys.

name: JC Bratton's Dollhouse
description: In the wake of a mysterious family death, a couple's night of mourning is interrupted by a strange delivery containing an antique dollhouse and a terrifying tale about its lone occupant.

name: Infestation
description: Jason, a man burdened with the care of his abusive, dementia ridden mother, takes a job as an exterminator. He steals something from his client, who turns out to be a witch, and suffers the consequences.

name: The Knight of the Sorrowful Figure
description: Don Quixote and Sancho Panza set forth on their quest in search of honor, chivalry, and legacy.

name: Bono: Stories of Surrender
description: A famous rock singer delivers an intimate one-person stage show that blends storytelling, humor, and stripped-down music. Reflecting on family, faith, love, and activism, he revisits the moments that shaped his life and career while reimagining songs in a simpler, more personal setting.

name: Sod and Stubble
description: A family faces the challenges and small victories of building a life on the Kansas plains. Based on a best-selling biography, the story follows pioneer life through hardship, resilience, and the demands of an unforgiving frontier.

name: Tyler Perry's Finding Joy
