description: A successful designer heads to the mountains at Christmas hoping for a long-awaited proposal, only to find her plans unraveling. Stranded in a snowy setting, she is pushed to rethink love, expectations, and what real connection might look like.

name: Black Zone
description: After a mysterious object crashes, a wide area is plunged into an electronic blackout and unsettling waves of extreme mania ripple through the community. As authorities scramble for answers, one person at the center seems changed by the otherworldly presence, drawing an intense government pursuit.

name: The Killer Is Calling
description: When a mysterious killer targets her remote island town over the course of one long night, veteran 911 operator Faye must uncover his motives and try to save her community, one emergency call at a time.

name: Wife Stalker
description: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo crumbles, leading to dire consequences. Her delusions of domestic harmony and eternal love are abruptly confronted by harsh reality, forcing her to face the truth of their relationship.

name: Girl Taken
description: After an argument at home, a teenager accepts a ride from someone she thinks she can trust and is taken against her will. As she tries to stay alive, her mother races to find her before it is too late.

name: Holiday Touchdown: A Bills Love Story
description: Two neighboring families bonded by decades of loyalty to their hometown football team keep their holiday traditions alive around the last home game before Christmas. As seasonal celebrations bring everyone together, a warm romance and a small mystery unfold against a cozy, community-centered backdrop.

name: My Sister's Double Life
description: After a woman disappears following a late-night diner shift, her sister struggles to persuade police that it was an abduction. In a race against time, she uncovers a growing threat that puts both women in grave danger.

name: My Weird School
description: A middle school student teams up with teachers and classmates when a bizarre alien invasion throws school life into chaos. Blending everyday kid problems with a big sci-fi threat, the story turns one strange school day into a fast-moving mission to save the world.

name: Trainwreck: Poop Cruise
description: An engine fire strands 4,000 passengers at sea, cutting off power and leaving the ship without working toilets or plumbing. This short documentary revisits the infamous 2013 “poop cruise,” focusing on how people cope as conditions spiral and sanitation becomes a central crisis.

name: Making of Lord of the Flies
description: A trippy tale capturing the creative vision of writer Jack Thorne and director Marc Munden, as a British crew and young cast film this timely adaptation on the remote islands of Malaysia during monsoon season. The crew battle twisters, torrential rain and scary insects to create this hallucinatory fever dream, featuring behind-the-scenes interviews and mesmerising performances by the newbie cast.

name: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted 2 Love
description: A successful chef travels to Ireland for a high-profile culinary event with a new partner, expecting a fresh romantic chapter. Things get complicated when a younger former love appears, forcing everyone to balance professional pressure with unresolved emotions.

name: The Nurse Who Knew Too Much
description: After a patient seems to confess to murder while under anesthesia, a nurse is pulled into a dangerous race to find out what really happened. As she digs deeper, the situation turns into a tense cat-and-mouse struggle and her own safety is put at risk.

name: Double Double Trouble
description: After a heartbreaking loss and a broken marriage, a woman tries to steady her life while growing increasingly unsettled by her identical twin’s seemingly perfect new relationship. What follows is an emotional thriller about grief, jealousy, and strained family bonds.

name: Prep & Landing: The Snowball Protocol
description: Christmas elves Lanny and Wayne panic when their holiday missions go awry, leaving Wayne thinking he's in BIG trouble with Santa and accidentally revealing other merry mishaps.

name: Sebastian Maniscalco: It Ain't Right
description: This live stand-up special leans into everyday frustrations, family chaos, and the weird realities of getting older. Performed in a packed Chicago arena, it delivers observational comedy with an animated, irritable edge aimed at familiar annoyances many viewers will recognize.

name: Leanne Morgan: Unspeakable Things
description: A stand-up comedian shares how she found success later in life, mixing stories about family, everyday frustrations, and the small moments that shaped her. Along the way, she reflects on her roots and even recounts a memorable first-time experience trying CBD.

name: Dr. Seuss's The Sneetches
description: On a beach-ringed island, two young creatures from different sides of a social divide strike up an unexpected friendship. This sweet musical special follows their bond as they navigate differences in a colorful world inspired by Seuss.

name: Kevin Costner Presents: The First Christmas
description: Kevin Costner hosts this special exploring the extraordinary journey of Mary and Joseph as they navigate the hardships, trials and triumphs surrounding Jesus Christ's birth, offering an inspiring way to experience the true meaning of Christmas.

name: Katt Williams: The Last Report
description: A veteran stand-up comic returns for another special, delivering an energetic set packed with sharp observations. He tackles big-picture topics like conspiracies, celebrity culture, and everyday life with a bold, no-holds-barred style.

name: Skyscraper Live
description: A live special follows a renowned free solo climber attempting a dangerous ascent of a towering skyscraper in Taipei, Taiwan, without ropes. The focus is on real-time risk, intense height, and the pressure of performing an extreme challenge as it unfolds.

name: The Voices of Our Mother
description: When a family matriarch falls seriously ill, relatives gather and discover their shared ancestral ties bind them in unexpected ways.

name: Countdown: Rousey vs. Carano
description: Hit training camp with MMA legends Ronda Rousey and Gina Carano before they return to the cage on May 16 for their must-see fight that’s been years in the making. Countdown: Rousey vs. Carano is narrated by Uma Thurman and directed by Tim Mullen & Jackie Decker.

name: The Second Life of Freddie Nole
description: When Freddie Nole drives to meet a man walking out of prison, he’s not just offering a ride, he’s offering hope, dignity, and a path to permanent freedom. As this vérité road trip unfolds, we come to learn the remarkable story behind Freddie’s mission, a staggering mistake that cost him 50 years of freedom but ultimately brings him right back to the prison door.

name: Legend of the White Dragon
description: The White Dragon, Erik Reed, has returned home to Virtuo City 3 years later after being defeated in a colossal battle against the ancient overlord, Ashtagor. The crystal he used to become the White Dragon was broken in two as a result of the epic battle, both pieces were subsequently lost. Being blamed for the destruction and collateral lives lost, his identity was outed after the battle thus making him a fugitive from the law. We now follow Erik on his journey as he teams up with treasure hunters from the past who help him reclaim his power as the White Dragon. Once reunited with his powers, he and his team are now ready to battle a new threat, Dragon Prime, who seeks revenge against the White Dragon. Erik must now try and defeat Dragon Prime in order to get one step closer to clearing his name and being able to protect his family from an ancient evil that still lurks in the darkness… Ashtagor

name: Surfacing
description: After years of living with severe depression, a young man slowly begins to reconnect with himself and the people around him. As therapy, emotional vulnerability, and queer romance intersect, he searches for trust, love, and hope in human connection.

name: Jamie Vardy
description: From part-time footballer to prime league legends, this is the story of Jamie Vardy's unprecedented path and his rise to the top against all odds.

name: Signal One
description: A computer scientist is invited by a tech billionaire to join his private facility on a Caribbean island to investigate extraterrestrial matter on Earth. When they make contact beyond our world, chaos erupts as we’re left to wonder: do they come in peace?

name: Pendulum
description: Young couple Patrick and Abigail journey to a new-age retreat in New Mexico, drawn by the possibility of healing after a traumatic event. Patrick is willing to do anything to help his wife but becomes distrustful of the retreat’s enigmatic leader even as Abigail falls under her spell. As paranoia builds, the couple must determine if the group’s unconventional spiritual practices offer genuine healing or mask a terrifying truth that threatens to consume them both.

name: Gary
description: Two friends head out on a work trip and run into unexpected challenges and distinctive local personalities. Juggling setbacks and adapting on the fly turns the assignment into a funny, small-town adventure that tests their teamwork—and strengthens their bond.

name: Connection
description: A kidnapped woman will be freed on one condition: She must convince her kidnapper that his life is worth living.

name: Grow
description: In the self-proclaimed ‘Pumpkin Capital of the World’, no-nonsense curmudgeonly farmer Dinah Little takes in her estranged niece Charlie, who decides to enter the local pumpkin growing competition where she and the other growers face fierce competition, sabotage, and a genetically engineered rival.

name: Shark Whisperer
description: A marine conservationist and social media activist swims up close with sharks in a documentary following a high-risk campaign to change public perception and push for their protection. Along the way, the film balances awe-inspiring underwater encounters with the personal drive behind the advocacy.

name: Ice Cream Man
description: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

name: Adult Swim's The Elephant
description: Told in three parts and brought to life by multiple animation creators, this Adult Swim special follows a deeply human journey of self-discovery. Each segment shifts in style, building a connected experience that explores identity from different angles.

name: Die'ced: Reloaded
description: Benny escapes an asylum on Halloween, masked as a scarecrow and hungry for blood. In 1980s Seattle, the hunt is on - and no one is safe.

name: Legend of the Forest
description: A group of friends set out on an adventure deep into the wilderness, determined to investigate the legend of Bigfoot.

name: The Jurassic Games: Extinction
description: A group of contestants enters a deadly virtual reality competition where fighting dinosaurs could earn them another shot at life. When the system starts failing, the danger becomes all too real and the race to survive grows even more desperate.

name: Masaka Kids, A Rhythm Within
description: The story behind the Uganda-based YouTube dance sensations who have endured devastating personal loss from famine and war, and use the power of dance and song to overcome hardship.

name: Tales from Black Manor
description: This horror tale spans centuries, following a family obsessed with a mysterious book tied to death. As generations chase power and immortality through war and cruelty, the story unfolds as a chain of dark, connected episodes stretching toward the end of the world.

name: A Paw Patrol Christmas
description: A holiday delivery is in jeopardy when Santa comes down with a cold and can’t bring presents. With a greedy plan threatening to spoil the season, a team of heroic pups races to protect the gifts and keep the celebration on track for everyone.

name: The Wife Who Knew Too Much
description: A coach’s wife sees her seemingly perfect school community shaken when a student is killed after a pep rally. As pressure builds around the team, the school, and her family, she must decide how far to go in searching for the truth.

name: Unexpected Christmas
description: Fresh off a recent breakup, Marissa Scott's return home takes an unexpected twist when her ex-boyfriend Richard arrives at the family gathering arm in arm with her estranged stepsister Kerry.

name: Under Fire
description: At a remote border drug deal, two undercover agents on what seems like the same case suddenly find themselves exposed and under deadly pressure. Trapped in a harsh, isolated setting, they have to work together fast as the mission spins into a tense fight for survival.

name: Wizard of Oz: Dead Walk
description: A young woman accidentally brings two familiar figures from a fantasy world into reality, where they become violent threats. As confusion and fear spread, she has to face a nightmare version of a once-whimsical story turned into a grim horror setup.

name: Risqué
description: Fired from a strip club, a vengeful dancer masterminds a high-stakes heist with fellow strippers to take down the corrupt boss and the men who underestimate them.

name: Stolen: Heist of the Century
description: In 2003 Antwerp, a crew pulls off a daring robbery at the supposedly impenetrable Diamond Center. Through interviews, case materials, and competing accounts, the story digs into who may have planned the heist, how it was executed, and what investigators believe happened afterward.

name: Wingman
description: As the first man to attempt to paraglide across the Colorado Rockies braves dangerous weather, camps in extreme weather, and hiking for miles in search of suitable launch points, he documents every minute of the perilous journey.

name: October 7: Bearing Witness to the Massacre
description: A feature documentary film on the history of Gaza and the horrific events of October 7, 2023 that shook the world.

name: The First Snow of Fraggle Rock
description: When the holidays are filled with unexpected adventures and challenges, the Fraggles learn to appreciate each day for being unique and special, like a snowflake.

name: Kissing Is the Easy Part
description: Two high-achieving teens strike a secret arrangement tied to college plans, expecting it to stay strictly practical. As tutoring and pressure from ambitious parents build, their growing connection turns messy and heartfelt, forcing them to question what they want and what they’re willing to risk.

name: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish
description: Vulgar, taunting texts start blowing up a teen’s phone and the drama spreads as the harassment continues. This documentary digs into who might be behind the messages and the disturbing reasons for it, building toward a shocking answer.

name: Lego Disney Princess: Villains Unite
description: After Ariel, Moana, Tiana, Rapunzel, and Snow White thwarted Gaston's plan to take over all of their kingdoms, he calls upon Ursula, Jafar, and the Evil Queen to help take the Princesses down once and for all. The Princesses learn about Gaston's scheme and recruit a few friends of their own with the help of Magic Mirror: Aurora, Belle, and Cinderella! Together, the Princesses team up for an ultimate showdown of good versus evil.

name: Air Bud Returns
description: 12-year-old Jacob is an aspiring basketball player coping with the recent loss of his father. After he and his mother move to his dad’s childhood home in Fernfield, Jacob discovers a VHS tape of his old man playing basketball on the same court as a hoops-shooting golden retriever. Soon, Jacob begins his own adventure with a neglected golden retriever that he names Buddy.

name: The Jester 2
description: On Halloween night, a teenage magician is hunted by a supernatural killer whose deadly tricks turn every encounter into a gruesome game. To survive, she has to think faster than a foe who mixes bloodshed with dark magic.

name: Winter of Empires
description: A tense decision could determine whether peace holds or a galactic war ignites. Leaders must weigh the fate of a frozen world and its people, where every choice carries enormous consequences for the wider universe.

name: Roommates
description: A shy college freshman thinks finding the perfect roommate will make campus life easier. Instead, an eager friendship with a confident new roommate turns tense as small slights and passive-aggressive behavior start to dominate their shared space.

name: Castration Movie Anthology iii. Year of the Hyaena
description: Izzy seeks out everything in her power to stop her partner from transitioning. Meanwhile, Michaela tries her best to be a good person.

name: All the Devils Are Here
description: After a heist goes wrong, four criminals hide out in a remote safehouse and wait for instructions. With time dragging on and nerves fraying, suspicion spreads through the group, and the danger starts to feel less like an outside threat and more like something brewing within.

name: Lookout
description: Hoping to escape a troubled past, a young woman takes a solitary job in a remote fire lookout tower deep in the wilderness. The quiet soon turns unsettling as strange events build, forcing her to confront the hidden danger surrounding her before isolation becomes a trap.

name: Girl in the Cellar
description: A mother imprisons her daughter in their basement to prevent bad choices, unaware she's recreating her own traumatic past. As neighbors notice the girl's absence, suspicion falls on the conflicted mother.

name: Descendants/ZOMBIES Worlds Collide - Concert Special
description: A concert special that brings the high-energy songs from two beloved franchises to the screen. After a sold-out North American arena tour, fans can sing and dance along at home and relive the excitement of a big live show experience.

name: Past Life
description: After taking part in a past life regression event, an unemployed reporter wakes up with disturbing memories that do not feel like his own. As violent visions begin to intrude on his daily life, he is pulled into a tense search for answers about where they came from and what they mean.

name: Sangre del Toro
description: A filmmaker revisits childhood memories, cultural myths, and the monsters that shaped a lifelong imagination. Moving through a personal, dreamlike journey, the story traces how these influences helped spark the distinctive worlds and themes seen across their movies.

name: Ozzy: No Escape from Now
description: Ozzy Osbourne confronts identity and mortality as his health challenges take center stage and his world changes. With Parkinson's affecting his ability to perform, he looks inward, questioning whether he can return to what he loves most—music.

name: The Family McMullen
description: Set three decades after an earlier family story, this gentle ensemble comedy follows a close-knit clan as parents, siblings, and grown children all stumble through messy dating lives, breakups, and unexpected second chances. As generations collide under one roof, old habits, family expectations, and romantic confusion keep everyone off balance.

name: Still Hope
description: A teen from a close-knit community is lured into danger by someone she thinks she can trust and is taken far from everything familiar. After enduring years of exploitation, she finds her way back to safety, then faces the difficult work of rebuilding her life and healing from trauma.

name: The Muppet Show
description: Music and comedy take over the original Muppet Theatre as the Muppets welcome a very special guest, Sabrina Carpenter. Expect familiar chaos, lively sketches, and performance energy as celebrity appearances and backstage mayhem keep the variety-show momentum going.

name: LEGO Frozen: Operation Puffins
description: After the events of Frozen, Anna and Elsa want to start fresh in Arendelle, and make the castle feel a bit more comfortable. While they struggle to break free of the bounds of tradition, the Duke of Weselton has other plans for their beloved home alongside a flock of menacing puffins.

name: Aileen: Queen of the Serial Killers
description: This true-crime documentary revisits the life and crimes of a rare female serial killer, tracing a path from a traumatic childhood to intense interviews and revelations from death row. Using archival material and commentary, it examines how her story was told, debated, and remembered over time.

name: The Last Whale Singer
description: After a dangerous creature breaks free from a melting iceberg, a self-doubting teenage whale sets out with friends into the ocean’s darkest depths. Together they search for a mystical song that could protect the seas, while facing fear, uncertainty, and the growing threat to their world.

name: Nikola Tesla's 19hz
description: A visionary inventor spends his final years chasing a hidden goal: finding a way to connect with something beyond ordinary human reach. Framed around a little-known obsession behind a famous legacy, the story blends historical intrigue with a mysterious, otherworldly pull.

name: Trevor Noah: Joy in the Trenches
description: A comedian takes everyday chaos and online drama and turns it into a sharp, playful stand-up set. With quick observations and personal reflections, the show finds humor in messy moments and unexpected lessons.

name: Bugonia
description: Two conspiracy-obsessed young men abduct a powerful company CEO, convinced she’s an alien with a plan to destroy Earth. As they try to force answers out of her, the situation turns into a tense, darkly funny standoff that pokes at paranoia, misinformation, and corporate power.

name: Coyote vs ACME
description: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner, Wile E. Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation.

name: Queen of Bones
description: Twin siblings seek answers about their mother's death and her connection to the supernatural while living on a remote homestead with their father in 1931 Oregon.

name: Marcel et Monsieur Pagnol
description: In 1955, an acclaimed writer and filmmaker is asked to write a weekly column about his childhood, hoping it will reconnect him with his creative roots. As his memory falters and self-doubt grows after recent setbacks, a magical visit from his younger self helps him revisit formative moments and treasured encounters from across his life.

name: Torch Song
description: An eccentric former pop singer visits her estranged half-brother and turns his life upside down when she finds a muse in his girlfriend.

name: The Invite
description: Joe and Angela’s marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

name: In the Blink of an Eye
description: Three interconnected storylines unfold across vast stretches of time, echoing one another as they explore hope, connection, and the cycle of life. As the threads begin to align, the film invites you to reflect on what it means to care for others in a universe that keeps moving on.

name: Dust Bunny
description: A young girl insists a monster under her bed has taken her family, so she turns to her mysterious neighbor for help. As danger closes in from multiple sides, the unlikely pair must navigate a strange, whimsical world where childhood fears collide with very real violence.

name: In Vitro
description: On an isolated cattle farm, a couple experimenting with biotechnology have their lives upended when they discover a disturbing presence on their property.

name: New Fears Eve
description: Unbeknownst to the trio, their corporate obligation will soon become a fight for survival. When The Doctor targets them, the celebration descends into a blood-soaked nightmare. Trapped in Hooper Industries' towering building, Leslie, Brian, Moses, and their unsuspecting colleagues must confront a deranged killer intent on making this night unforgettable-for all the wrong reasons.

name: Pinocchio Unstrung
description: We follow James as his grandfather, Geppetto, introduces him to a seemingly magical doll to become best friends. However, unaware of Pinocchio's naïve nature, as James introduces him to the world it results in the doll going on a crusade to eliminate all things “bad.”

name: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
description: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

name: Hybrid Hazards: Revelation
description: Megan Florentino, a woman whose life is shattered after a scientific experiment gone wrong infects her with gene-splicing DNA, transforming her into a wolf-like Hybrid. Struggling to control her dangerous nature, Megan and her daughter, Lacy, live on the run, never staying in one place long enough to build a stable life. Lacy, burdened by the chaos of their existence, yearns for normalcy and eventually leaves in search of a better future. When Megan learns of a potential cure, she embarks on a desperate quest to reclaim her humanity and repair her fractured relationship with her daughter. But to achieve this, she must face unimaginable challenges, including betrayal, danger, and even conflict with her own kind.

name: Lost Joy
description: Jane's getaway with her partner to the woods goes south when a stranger arrives and questions the integrity of their relationship.

name: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
description: When an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy, Ryan is forced back into the world of espionage to confront a rogue black-ops unit.

name: Hoppers
description: A young nature lover joins a secret experiment that lets people “hop” their minds into lifelike robotic animals. Using this strange new way to move through the wild, she tries to protect a threatened local habitat and uncover what’s really happening among the creatures who live there.

name: Backrooms
description: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

name: High Rollers
description: A seasoned thief is forced into a high-stakes casino job after someone close to him is taken as leverage. With rival criminals closing in and law enforcement on his trail, the crew must plan a risky score where every move could cost them everything.

name: City Wide Fever
description: A young film student uncovers a USB archive about a forgotten Italian horror director and starts looking into his disappearance. The deeper she digs, the more her search begins to mirror the kind of violent conspiracies found in the movies she loves.

name: Sherlock Holmes Mare of the Night
description: A horrifyingly fresh look at the iconic detective that delves into his worst nightmares that haunt him about one case he could never solve.

name: Passenger
description: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

name: Betray: Thirst
description: Jamal Wiggins is a lawyer at Tate and Wiggins, the law firm he co-founded with his college roommate and friend, Darren Tate. While he enjoys professional success, his personal life is strained by a sexless marriage to Shavonne, his wife of 15 years. He takes on a case representing Jada Campbell, whose husband was involved in a life-altering accident. Jada, a victim of verbal and emotional abuse from her husband, develops feelings for Jamal. He, in turn, succumbs to temptation and crosses a professional boundary, soon realizing his world may be on the verge of collapse.

name: Run
description: When Melissa leaves her fiancé Andre at the altar, her best friends convince her to go to a Cabin in the woods on a much needed “Girls Trip” to get her mind off things. But things take a huge turn when their friend Jenny is found mutilated in the middle of the woods. When the news announces an all out Alien attack on the Nation, the girls will now have to try their best to survive.

name: Mega Blood Moon: The Freelancer
description: After arriving early to an empty workplace on his last day of work, a Freelancer discovers that he may not be alone. Under the light of the mysterious Mega Blood Moon, he'll find out that his last day is going to be a fight... to the death.

name: Ouija: A New Beginning
description: Molly Price is a woman on the run, but when her oldest daughter finds a Ouija board and attempts to communicate with her deceased father, she invites the spirit of an ancient witch into her soul and puts the entire family at risk.

name: Con Mum
description: A chef’s world is thrown into chaos when a glamorous, globe-trotting woman suddenly claims to be his long-lost mother. This true-crime documentary follows the shocking claims, the mounting requests, and the emotional fallout as he and those around him try to figure out what’s real.

name: Catalyst
description: Seven men are abducted and held by mysterious masked captors. As the mystery behind their captivity unfolds, they must decide their path: choose one of them to die, or take the leap of faith there may be another way out to save them all.

name: The Accused
description: When a brilliant plant geneticist is framed for her fiance's murder, she must go on the run, relying on her intelligence and physical prowess to expose the truth and clear her name before time runs out

name: Suky
description: In this grim and unforgiving environment, Suky discovers a glimmer of hope, a brutal underground fight club that promises freedom to the strongest. With nothing to lose and revenge fueling his every move, Suky must fight not only for his life but for a chance to reclaim his freedom.

name: Dark Frequency
description: A traumatic home environment leads to 16-year-old Mary being placed in a residential treatment center for troubled teens, only to find herself haunted by dark forces that reveal chilling secrets about her past and the sinister truth behind the facility.

name: Don’t Peek
description: A professional YouTubing couple - whose career is starting to fray their marriage - grapples with how to leverage the discovery that the previous owner of their new home was not only a serial killer who taped his crimes but also believed his victims were haunting him.

name: Crazy Texas
description: Amidst the festive spirit of Christmas in a small Texas town, two sisters find themselves embroiled in a dangerous struggle to safeguard their family wealth and deeply held religious convictions.

name: Bone Hill
description: A psychiatrist tries to save a young female patient whose psychoses might hold the key to ending an ancient evil.

name: Marcie's
description: Marcie has a dream: to own Ed's Tavern, where she's bartender and den mother to a devoted small-town community. But when a developer sets his sights on Ed's wooded land, Marcie's future is upended. As she rallies her people, she finds that an endangered bird may hold the key to preventing the loss of the tavern and saving her community.

name: Bigfoot: Blood on the Farm
description: " Bigfoot Blood on the Farm " is a tense, heart-pounding thriller about family, survival, and the terrifying unknown that lurks in the shadows of the woods. Two sisters find themselves alone on their rural farm, facing an unimaginable terror. " Bigfoot ". With the farm isolated and no one else around to help, the sisters must quickly shift from surviving farm life to surviving the fight of their lives.

name: American Psychopath
description: In the shadows of suburban of America, a mysterious tale unfolds as a girl from out of town becomes the prey of an unidentified serial killer. Making headline news, she must unravel the truth to regain her memory before he kills again.

name: Girl in the Attic
description: Kelsey honors her late mother by training for a marathon and sharing her journey online. Her posts attract Billy (Keenan Tracey), a grocery worker caring for his disabled mother, Debbie. Obsessed, Billy kidnaps Kelsey and hides her in their attic, controlling her for years. When Debbie discovers the truth, she and Kelsey must fight for survival.

name: True Justice: Eye For An Eye
description: Amateur sleuths tackle a fresh challenge at a local school, diving into the fierce world of parent politics. Their investigation uncovers hidden agendas and unexpected alliances as they navigate the complex web within the community.

name: Mother Knows Best
description: In the wake of a tragic accident, a mother's unwavering care pushes the limits of morality as she does whatever it takes to protect her son.

name: The Hail Mary
description: A determined nun spots a bitter outsider who needs a fresh start and nudges him toward redemption in an unusual way. By pushing him to build a football team for her Catholic school, she sets off a story about second chances, discipline, and reluctant teamwork.

name: Emperor
description: XVI Century. Action epic about young Johanna "Of Ghent", who seeks revenge on the holy Roman Emperor Charles V for the death of her father. It happens in a world of wealth, debauchery, violent retaliations, sex, manipulation, and treason.

name: Before Your Father Finds Us
description: A mother and her daughter are forced into witness protection after she testifies against the girl’s father. Years later, news of his escape shatters their rebuilt life, pushing them to flee to a remote cabin and rely on grit, trust, and quick thinking to stay safe.

name: Faith in the Flames: The Nichole Jolly Story
description: Nichole Jolly is a nurse at the town’s hospital, who begins her day as usual, only to face an unimaginable crisis when a wildfire rapidly engulfs the town. Torn between her duty to protect her patients and her desperate need to find her husband Nick, (Colin Moss) and children, Nichole discovers an unyielding strength within herself to save not only her family but countless residents from the encroaching flames. The film is a tribute to the indomitable human spirit and the unsung heroes who emerge in the face of tragedy.

name: Mr. Wonderful
description: Three generations of men—a millennial on the run from a drug dealer; his father, a jaded professor trying to keep his job; and the family patriarch fighting senility—all struggle to find meaning in life.

name: LEGO Disney Princess: Villains Unite
description: After Ariel, Moana, Tiana, Rapunzel, and Snow White thwarted Gaston's plan to take over all of their kingdoms, he calls upon Ursula, Jafar, and the Evil Queen to help take the Princesses down once and for all. The Princesses learn about Gaston's scheme and recruit a few friends of their own with the help of Magic Mirror: Aurora, Belle, and Cinderella! Together, the Princesses team up for an ultimate showdown of good versus evil.

name: Broken English
description: An iconic artist looks back on a life spent defying expectations, constantly reinventing herself across decades of music and public attention. With her full involvement, this intimate documentary traces the highs and lows of fame, creativity, and relentless scrutiny, using candid conversation and archival material to paint a resilient portrait.

name: Karen Kingsbury's The Christmas Ring
description: At a 'Christmas in July' sale, military widow Vanessa Mayfield crosses paths with antiques dealer Ben Miller. As Ben works in Vanessa’s hometown, their friendship begins to grow into something more. But trouble brews when Ben’s father unknowingly acquires a box of antiques containing Vanessa’s missing heirloom Christmas ring - a priceless piece of her family’s past. Planning to sell it, he has no idea of its true meaning. It will take a Christmas miracle for love, family, and the ring to come together.

name: I'll Never Let You Go
description: A successful gallery director’s impulsive affair with a magnetic artist sends her life into emotional chaos as she struggles with an empty home and a fragile marriage. What begins as a tempting escape soon turns unsettling when his behavior grows increasingly dangerous.

name: The Truth About Jussie Smollett?
description: The shocking true story of an allegedly fake story that some now say might just be a true story. With first-hand interviews from those at the helm, including investigating police, lawyers, journalists and Jussie himself, this compelling documentary invites the audience to decide for themselves who is telling The Truth About Jussie Smollett?

name: Black Goat
description: In a remote town, a young environmental engineer looks into a strange illness spreading through local livestock. As the investigation deepens, unsettling clues point to a hidden group and an ominous presence in the surrounding woods.

name: Stop! That! Train!
description: Two train stewardess BFFs switch from a dull railway to the luxurious Glamazonian Express. During a massive storm, they must work with snooty first-class crew and President Gagwell to prevent disaster in LA.

name: Frankie, Maniac Woman
description: An aspiring singer-songwriter in Los Angeles struggles under the weight of childhood trauma, harsh beauty standards, and pressure from the music industry. As the strain builds, her fight for self-worth turns dark and violent.

name: The Dark Wizard
description: This series follows a world-famous, controversial extreme athlete pushing the limits through climbing, base jumping, and highline walking. As the feats grow more daring, it also explores the personal struggles and inner demons that shadow life at the edge.

name: Seeking Persephone
description: To protect her family’s future, a young woman enters a marriage of necessity with a powerful, emotionally distant nobleman. As they navigate duty, expectations, and growing closeness, their guarded partnership begins to shift into something neither anticipated.

name: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man
description: Peter Parker is starting his journey toward heroism, but things quickly become anything but simple. Set in a fresh take on a familiar world, the series follows his early struggles, growing responsibilities, and the people around him as his life gets more complicated.

name: We Were Liars
description: A year after a mysterious accident leaves a teenager with missing memories, she returns to her wealthy family’s private island summer home. Surrounded by relatives, old friends, and unanswered questions, she must piece together what happened while everyone around her stays guarded.

name: The Audacity
description: In Silicon Valley’s insular world, a data-mining CEO pushes to convert insight and influence into profit and power. This dark comedy skewers warped ambitions, outsized egos, and the ethical lapses of people who see themselves as inventors of the future.

name: Marvel Zombies
description: After the Avengers are overtaken by a zombie plague, a desperate group of survivors sets out to find a way to stop the super-powered undead. Their journey spans a dystopian landscape where every step threatens their lives as they race to save their world.

name: Ironheart
description: After the events of Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, a young genius inventor returns to Chicago and builds iron suits to make her mark. But her ambitions pull her into conflict when technology clashes with magic, and she becomes entangled with a mysterious ally known as “The Hood.”

name: Daredevil: Born Again
description: A blind lawyer with heightened abilities tries to pursue justice through both legal work and street-level action, while a former mob boss seeks power through politics. As old conflicts resurface, their paths in New York move toward a tense confrontation.

name: E.B. White's Charlotte's Web
description: When farm pig Wilbur learns he is being raised for slaughter, barn spider Charlotte writes messages in her web to convince the farmer to let him live.

name: Iyanu
description: Set in the magical kingdom of Yorubaland, follow teenage orphan girl, Iyanu, a heroine who must uncover the mystery behind her newfound powers to save her people from an ancient curse threatening to destroy humanity.

name: Win or Lose
description: With a championship game approaching, eight characters face unexpected complications in their personal lives. Off the field, tensions rise as their everyday problems collide with the pressure of a big moment.

name: Outlander: Blood of My Blood
description: Spanning World War I battlefields and 18th-century Highlands Scotland, two couples are pulled into a romantic, time-crossing saga. As their lives intertwine across eras, they face powerful forces determined to separate them in unexpected ways.

name: Alien: Earth
description: After a mysterious deep-space research ship crashes on Earth, a group of tactical responders investigates the wreckage and finds a danger unlike anything the planet has faced. The series blends sci-fi horror with survival stakes and strange new threats.

name: Dope Thief
description: Two lifelong friends in Philadelphia pose as DEA agents to rob small-time drug dealers, treating it like a perfect grift. But when they hit the wrong target, they draw the attention of a massive narcotics enterprise and must stay ahead of escalating danger.

name: Splinter Cell: Deathwatch
description: In a world of covert operations and shifting loyalties, a legendary operative is pulled back into the field to guide a new recruit. Together they navigate high-stakes missions, cutting-edge tech, and uneasy alliances while trying to expose a far-reaching conspiracy before it spirals out of control.

name: Duster
description: Set in 1972, the first Black female FBI agent travels to the Southwest to help dismantle a rising crime syndicate. She recruits a bold getaway driver for a high-energy mission that blends investigation with fast-paced escapes.

name: Chief of War
description: As war divides Hawaii’s kingdoms, a fierce warrior sets out on a dangerous mission to bring his people together before a growing outside threat reaches their shores. The series blends battles, politics, culture, and personal duty into a large-scale historical drama.

name: IT: Welcome to Derry
description: In 1962, a wave of missing children unsettles a small town already full of fear and secrets. As a group of outsider kids starts digging for answers, worried adults and a shadowy military effort add to the growing sense that something ancient and dangerous is waking up.

name: The Last Frontier
description: After a prison transport plane crashes in remote Alaska, dangerous inmates scatter into the wilderness and a local law officer must protect an isolated community. The chase mixes survival tension, town protection, and a wider conspiracy angle in a cold, hostile setting.

name: #1 Happy Family USA
description: A Muslim-American family navigates the early 2000s by constantly adjusting how they speak and act to fit in. Through sharp, often outrageous comedy, the series explores fear, war, identity, and everyday family life during a time shaped by prejudice and pop-culture chaos.

name: A Thousand Blows
description: Two friends from Jamaica get pulled into the criminal underbelly of London’s East End, where they cross paths with the leader of an all-female gang. Their trouble deepens when they draw the attention of a ruthless boxing kingpin who wants to eliminate them.

name: Man on Fire
description: A troubled former Special Forces soldier must protect a teenage girl while evading dangerous enemies on the violent streets of Rio de Janeiro. As the pressure closes in, survival depends on staying one step ahead.

name: The Mighty Nein
description: When a powerful arcane relic, the Beacon, lands in dangerous hands, a ragtag set of fugitives and outcasts must join forces to protect the realm. Bound by secrets and past scars, they race to stop reality from unraveling and confront a growing threat.

name: Deli Boys
description: After their powerful father dies, two spoiled brothers suddenly lose their cushy lives and uncover the criminal side of the family business. Thrown into a world they barely understand, they try to survive, stick together, and prove they can run what he left behind.

name: Mermicorno: Starfall
description: In a fantastical and magical undersea world, where a team of Mermicorno (enchanting half-Unicorno/half-fish creatures) join together to save the ocean from the threat of the evil Ika Inkblot.

name: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
description: A Librarian from the past lands in the present and discovers his old castle is now a museum. A mistake unleashes magic across the continent, and he’s assigned a new team to track down dangerous artifacts and contain the fallout, one strange case at a time.

name: Butterfly
description: A former US intelligence operative living in hiding in South Korea has his past come due, forcing him into a hunt by a deadly young assassin and the sinister spy organization behind her. As consequences surface, he must navigate danger while dealing with personal stakes tied to an impossible decision from his history.

name: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
description: A young group of cadets comes together with hope and ambition, pushing toward a shared dream under strict instructors. As they form friendships and face rivalries and first loves, they also confront a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the wider Federation.

name: RoboGobo
description: Five adorable adopted pets are given super-powered Robo-Suits by kid inventor Dax, then going on a mission to save other pets in trouble and learning how to become a family in the process.

name: Kevin Costner's The West
description: This fresh look at the epic history of the American West delves into the desperate struggle for the land itself – and how it still shapes the America we know today.

name: Pluribus
description: When a strange force spreads across humanity and turns everyday life into a cheerful collective, one stubbornly unhappy holdout becomes the unlikely obstacle to a world of enforced bliss. As the pressure to “just be happy” grows, they’re pushed to resist, investigate, and find a way to stop it before everything familiar is rewritten.

name: Suspect: The Shooting of Jean Charles De Menezes
description: In the tense aftermath of terrorist attacks in London, a police operation goes disastrously wrong when an ordinary commuter is mistaken for a threat. This fact-based drama follows the pressure, confusion, and search for accountability that unfold after a terrible public tragedy.

name: Common Side Effects
description: Two former lab partners stumble onto a rare mushroom with extraordinary healing potential, only to find powerful forces determined to keep it hidden. As they dig deeper, they’re pulled into a tense, often darkly funny chase that pits personal loyalty against corporate and government pressure.

name: Task
description: In the working-class suburbs of Philadelphia, an FBI agent assembles a task force to stop a violent string of robberies. As the investigation closes in, the crimes are traced to an unsuspecting family man whose life is about to collide with the fallout.

name: The Bondsman
description: A backwoods bounty hunter comes back from the dead with a second chance at life, love, and a nearly-forgotten musical career. But his old job is now tied to demon hunting, bringing a new, otherworldly danger to his doorstep.

name: Lazarus
description: In a near-future world, a widely used miracle drug is revealed to carry a deadly delayed consequence. With time running out, an elite team is formed to track down the elusive creator and uncover the truth behind the crisis, racing across the globe to stop a looming catastrophe.

name: Wolf King
description: A young villager discovers a shocking family legacy that ties him to ancient werewolves and a royal future. As he comes of age, he must face new responsibilities, hidden dangers, and a destiny far bigger than the life he has known.

name: BAT-FAM
description: This animated series follows a superhero household trying to balance crime-fighting, parenting, and everyday chaos under one roof. With a playful, kid-friendly tone, it mixes family sitcom energy, quick jokes, and light action as the group adjusts to life together.

name: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
description: Three lifelong pals launch a chaotic quest tied to the suspicious death of an old friend. As they dig for answers, they also wrestle with keeping their own dark secret hidden, mixing humor with mystery as the story unfolds around Belfast and beyond.

name: Toxic Town
description: In Corby, dozens of babies are born with disabilities, and the mothers refuse to stay silent. They organize, suspect local harmful chemicals, and push for answers and accountability, turning their fight into a long, emotionally draining battle for justice.

name: Devil May Cry
description: When a mysterious threat moves to unleash the gates of Hell, a swaggering demon hunter steps in as the world’s best hope for salvation. With danger closing in and enemies coming from the demonic underworld, the fight becomes a nonstop battle to stop Hell from spilling over.

name: Ballard
description: A determined detective investigates a string of murders tied to a ruthless killer while uncovering signs of deep corruption within the police. As pressure mounts, the case tests personal resolve and a commitment to justice for victims and their families.

name: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+
description: Mickey and pals welcome everyone back to the clubhouse for all-new adventures filled with songs, laughs, handy helping, and fun new surprises.

name: On Call
description: A veteran training officer and her rookie ride-along take to the streets of Long Beach after the loss of a fellow officer, balancing harsh realities with the politics of modern policing. The series follows their day-to-day work as they respond to calls and learn how to navigate pressure both on the job and within the department.

name: Ransom Canyon
description: Passions run deep in a small Texas town where three ranching families clash over land, legacies, and the people they love. Beneath the personal dramas, bigger forces circle the farmland, turning relationships and loyalties into constant pressure.

name: Scarpetta
description: Renowned forensic pathologist Kay Scarpetta returns as Virginia’s Chief Medical Examiner to investigate a haunting murder that echoes a past case from decades ago. The mystery unfolds with investigations spanning 1998, where she teams up with detectives and the FBI to probe brutal stranglings.

name: Too Much
description: After a life-changing breakup, a New Yorker relocates to London chasing a fresh start and a romantic reset. She’s drawn into a messy, offbeat connection with an indie musician, where culture clash, awkward honesty, and emotional turbulence test what a real love story might look like.

name: Miss Austen
description: A woman looks back on her life and her bond with her famous sister, as a long-remembered decision to destroy private letters raises questions about love, duty, and legacy. Moving between past and later years, this witty yet tender period drama reimagines a real-life literary mystery through family ties and personal sacrifice.

name: 56 Days
description: After a body is discovered in an upscale apartment, investigators piece together the previous 56 days of an intense relationship to find out what happened. The story moves between the present-day case and the couple’s fast-moving romance, building suspicion around both love and deception.

name: Dying for Sex
description: After a life-changing cancer diagnosis, a woman leaves her marriage and begins exploring desires she has long kept buried. What starts as a bold search for pleasure opens into a tender, funny, and deeply emotional story about friendship, mortality, and choosing how to live.

name: Eyes of Wakanda
description: Follow the adventures of brave Wakandan warriors throughout history in this globe-trotting adventure, where they must carry out dangerous missions to retrieve Vibranium artifacts from the enemies of Wakanda. They are the Hatut Zaraze and this is their story.

name: Murderbot
description: In a high-tech future, a self-aware security robot hides its freedom while reluctantly protecting a group of scientists on a dangerous planet. It would much rather avoid messy human feelings, keep a low profile, and watch its favorite soap operas.

name: Government Cheese
description: When Hampton is released from prison, his long-awaited family reunion doesn't quite go as he hoped. In his absence, Hampton's wife and sons formed an unconventional family unit, and his return spins their world into chaos.

name: Apple Cider Vinegar
description: Two young women promote wellness remedies as cures for deadly illnesses, unraveling their lives while they manipulate beliefs and trust. As their message spreads, the show traces how their choices reshape relationships and credibility, blurring the line between knowing and unknowingly misleading people.

name: Watson
description: A year after losing a close friend and partner, a doctor returns to medicine by leading a clinic focused on rare conditions. As unusual cases pile up, the work pulls him back toward the mysteries and dangers he hoped to leave behind.

name: Your Friends & Neighbors
description: After a wealthy finance figure loses his marriage and career, he turns to robbing people in his own upscale circle to keep himself afloat. What begins as a desperate and thrilling secret soon pulls him into increasingly dangerous trouble.

name: Tucci in Italy
description: This travel-and-food series explores different regions of Italy through local dishes, traditions, and everyday life. Each episode uses meals as a way to discover the people, history, and character of a place, with plenty of scenic stops and cultural detail along the way.

name: Prime Target
description: A brilliant math student nears a major breakthrough when a shadowy threat tries to derail him. Seeking answers and fighting for survival, he teams with a government agent to uncover a high-stakes conspiracy with global implications.

name: Happy Face
description: A decades-ago case resurfaces when the father of a woman returns to her life, forcing her to confront what he did and what it could mean for her future. As she pushes to determine whether an innocent man is being punished for his crime, she also reevaluates who she is.

name: House of David
description: House of David tells how the biblical David rises to become the most celebrated king of Israel, as Saul’s pride leads to decline. Directed by God, the prophet Samuel anoints an unlikely outcast teenager as the new king, launching a story of faith, conflict, and destiny.

name: Run Away
description: A desperate parent searches for a runaway daughter and is pulled into a murder investigation where every answer leads to more buried secrets. As family tensions rise and danger closes in, the hunt becomes a fast-moving web of lies, suspicion, and painful choices.

name: Death by Lightning
description: A little-known American political figure rises from humble beginnings to the nation’s highest office during a turbulent era. Alongside his ascent, the series follows an unstable outsider drawn toward power, turning a chapter of history into a tense political drama.

name: The Hunting Wives
description: A newcomer to East Texas gets pulled into an elite housewives clique where glamour and gossip come with hidden dangers. As her social circle tightens, dark secrets surface and the group’s polished world starts to look much more dangerous than it first appears.

name: Paradise
description: In a calm, affluent community packed with high-profile residents, a shocking murder shatters the peace. A tense, high-stakes investigation follows as secrets surface and the investigation keeps expanding in scope.

name: Side Quest
description: Go deeper into the Mythic Quest universe in these four standalone stories. Follow the lives of players, comic book shop owners, touring orchestra musicians, and members of the art department as they search for community, success, and love.

name: Lockerbie: A Search for Truth
description: After Pan Am Flight 103 explodes over a small town, Dr Jim Swire sets out to uncover the truth behind his daughter’s death. His search takes him across continents and political divides, straining his stability and family as his trust in the justice system is shaken.

name: Dept. Q
description: A brash but brilliant detective is put in charge of a new unit and an unlikely team of outsiders tasked with reopening Edinburgh’s cold cases. As they dig into long-buried leads, clashing personalities and dark discoveries test their resolve while the department fights to prove it belongs.

name: House of Guinness
description: Set in Dublin in 1868, the Guinness family faces a turning point after their patriarch dies. With four children carrying hidden problems, the future of the brewery—and the family’s power—hangs in the balance.

name: Margo's Got Money Troubles
description: A recent college dropout and aspiring writer is pulled into financial chaos after a new baby arrives. With bills piling up and few options left, she scrambles to figure out how to keep moving forward.

name: The Terminal List: Dark Wolf
description: Before The Terminal List, a Navy SEAL becomes entangled in the CIA’s black operations, diving deeper into the moral “gray.” As inner light and dark impulses battle for control, loyalty and personal sacrifice blur the lines between duty and consequence in a tense spy-thriller journey.

name: The Americas
description: This nature miniseries journeys across North, Central, and South America, exploring the region’s beauty, hidden wildlife, and vulnerable ecosystems. It highlights breathtaking landscapes and animal behavior while balancing wonder, education, and a gentle reminder of how fragile these environments can be.

name: The Copenhagen Test
description: After an analyst realizes his eyes and ears have been hacked, he’s pulled into a tightly controlled operation built by his agency. The plan draws out hidden enemies while his every move is shaped by the rules of this monitored world.

name: All Her Fault
description: A routine pickup after a child’s first playdate turns into a terrifying mystery when the address, the adult at the door, and the expected child do not line up. The story follows the panic, suspicion, and family pressure that unfold from that moment.

name: Chad Powers
description: Eight years after an unforgivable mistake ends his football future, a quarterback tries to get a second chance by disguising himself as a talented oddball and joining a struggling college team. Can he help turn their season around—while keeping his past from catching up?

name: Overcompensating
description: A closeted former football player and homecoming king forms a fast friendship with a high school outsider determined to fit in at any cost. As they try to navigate campus life, they get pulled into chaotic parties, awkward encounters, and identity games—along with help from familiar faces who know the scene well.

name: MobLand
description: Two powerful crime families collide as tensions rise and loyalties are tested, putting their businesses and loved ones at risk. As the conflict escalates, a trusted fixer tries to keep the peace while navigating shifting alliances, pressure from all sides, and the brutal cost of holding an empire together.

name: Sherlock & Daughter
description: A famous detective is pulled into a dangerous case that could put people close to him at risk. A determined young American arrives in London after her mother’s murder, hoping to uncover the truth about her family, and the unlikely pair team up to chase clues through a wider conspiracy.

name: The Hunting Party
description: A small team of investigators is assembled to track down and capture extremely dangerous killers who have just escaped from a top-secret prison that isn’t supposed to exist. The pursuit blends an ongoing mystery with fresh cases as the team works to bring each escaped criminal back.

name: Sirens
description: Worried about her sister getting too entangled with her billionaire boss, a scrappy outsider heads to a lavish seaside estate seeking answers. As she digs deeper into the glamorous world around them, suspense and unsettling secrets start to surface in the setting’s polished luxury.

name: A Cruel Love: The Ruth Ellis Story
description: In 1950s Britain, a young nightclub manager becomes the focus of a notorious murder case that grips the public and exposes the pressures of an unforgiving justice system. As the investigation and courtroom battle unfold, the story digs into a turbulent relationship, contested responsibility, and the wider debate around punishment and fairness.

name: NCIS: Tony & Ziva
description: After an attack on a private security business, two former partners are forced to flee across Europe with their child in the middle of the chaos. As they try to uncover who is targeting them, old wounds and lingering feelings complicate every decision, pushing them to rebuild trust while staying one step ahead.

name: Hostage
description: A kidnapping targeting the British prime minister’s husband triggers threatening messages aimed at both the UK and France. With pressure mounting at the highest level, the two leaders are forced into an impossible choice while balancing political pressure and personal stakes.

name: The Studio
description: Desperate for celebrity approval, a newly appointed studio head and his executive team at Continental Studios balance corporate pressure with creative hopes. As demands pile up, they scramble to keep movies alive and relevant, even when the business side threatens to take over.

name: UNTAMED
description: In Yosemite National Park, a death pulls a federal agent into a case among lawless corners. As the investigation unfolds, the wilderness adds pressure—because the natural world doesn’t follow human expectations.

name: Nine Bodies in a Mexican Morgue
description: After a small plane crashes in a remote Mexican jungle, a group of strangers must work together to survive with limited supplies and no clear way out. When people start turning up dead, fear and suspicion spread, and the remaining survivors race to uncover who’s behind it before they’re next.

name: PULSE
description: Pulse follows ER residents at a Miami hospital where high-stakes medical crises collide with intense personal drama. As workplace tensions escalate, a divisive allegation sends shockwaves through the staff and reshapes relationships while patients keep coming through the door.

name: FOREVER
description: Reunited as teens, childhood friends fall deeply in love, navigating the joy and heartbreak of a first romance. Their relationship is shaped by family life, community, and the emotional challenges that come with growing up.

name: Stick
description: An on-course meltdown derails a former golfer’s dreams, leaving him struggling to stay afloat. Determined to turn things around, he throws himself into mentoring a teenage prodigy with huge potential and finds a chance to rebuild his own life.

name: Good Cop/Bad Cop
description: In a small Pacific Northwest town, a sister-and-brother detective duo works cases while juggling quirky locals, limited resources, and constant friction. Their job gets even messier because the police chief is also their father, turning every investigation into a test of family loyalty and teamwork.

name: The Runarounds
description: A group of recent high school graduates from different backgrounds spend one summer chasing a shared dream: starting a rock band. In coastal North Carolina, they face friendship, ambition, and the pull of ordinary adult life.

name: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox
description: Amanda Knox travels to Italy for study abroad, only to be wrongfully imprisoned for murder weeks later. The series follows her relentless fight to prove her innocence and reclaim her freedom, while examining how authorities and the world formed such firm judgment.

name: The Miniature Wife
description: A married couple’s everyday power struggles turn into something far stranger when a technological accident triggers an extreme relationship crisis. As they each try to regain control, their home becomes a battleground of pride, vulnerability, and shifting rules.

name: Down Cemetery Road
description: After a house explosion, a missing child sparks a tense search in South Oxford’s quiet suburbs. A concerned neighbor joins forces with a private investigator as secrets surface and the investigation pulls in unsettling military conspiracy elements.

name: Bad Thoughts
description: This sketch-comedy series turns intrusive, socially unacceptable thoughts into a run of short, darkly funny stories. The episodes jump through warped takes on family life, romance, communication, health, and everyday discomfort, aiming for laughs through shock, absurdity, and taboo-breaking humor.

name: Bookish
description: In post-war London, an antiquarian bookseller uses his deep knowledge and vast library to help untangle baffling mysteries. As each case unfolds, he also offers shelter and guidance to a small circle of troubled people, blending cozy charm with clever sleuthing.

name: Agatha Christie's Seven Dials
description: In 1925 England, a lavish country house party turns dark when a prank appears to lead to murder. An unlikely amateur sleuth follows the clues into a chilling mystery that threatens to upend the world around her.

name: The Beast in Me
description: A successful writer becomes entangled with a wealthy new neighbor whose charm hides something unsettling. As curiosity turns into obsession, a tense psychological game grows around suspicion, power, and the possibility of violence close to home.

name: The Abandons
description: In 1850s Washington, two rival families led by formidable matriarchs—one wealthy, one struggling but fiercely loyal—clash for control on a lawless frontier. As tensions rise, power plays, shifting alliances, and hard choices test what each side is willing to sacrifice to survive and come out on top.

name: The Pitt
description: In an overcrowded, underfunded emergency department in Pittsburgh, a dedicated medical team pushes through a relentless shift of urgent cases, tough choices, and mounting pressure. The series focuses on the human cost of saving lives when time, space, and resources are always running short.

name: Black Rabbit
description: A successful restaurant owner’s carefully built life is thrown into danger when a troubled sibling returns with debts and dangerous people close behind. As pressure builds in New York’s nightlife and criminal circles, family loyalty, bad choices, and survival become increasingly tangled.

name: Star City
description: Step into a thrilling chapter inspired by For All Mankind. Same alt-history universe. Different perspective: the Soviet Union's. Go behind the Iron Curtain with the cosmonauts, engineers, and intelligence officers who risked it all in the race for the Moon.

name: The Institute
description: Fourteen-year-old Luke wakes up in a mysterious facility filled with other children who were brought there the same way, each with unusual abilities. Nearby, a haunted former police officer begins building a quieter life, but the two stories are heading toward a collision.

name: The Better Sister
description: Chloe lives in New York’s elite world with her lawyer husband and teenage son, while her estranged sister Nicky struggles to stay afloat and stay clean. When her husband is brutally murdered, the investigation rattles the family and drags hidden, long-buried secrets into the open.

name: Leanne
description: After her husband leaves, a resilient Southern mom is forced to rebuild her life from scratch. With the help of a loving but blunt family, she navigates heartbreak, fresh starts, and everyday chaos while leaning into humor and small wins along the way.

name: The Girlfriend
description: Laura seems to have everything—career, a devoted husband, and a beloved son—until he brings home a girlfriend who instantly disrupts the household. As tensions rise, Laura becomes convinced her son’s partner is hiding something, turning the situation into a debate over suspicion versus manipulation.

name: Hollywood Squares
description: Two contestants play tic-tac-toe to win money and prizes. The "board" for the game is a vertical stack of open-faced cubes, each occupied by a celebrity seated at a desk and facing the contestants. The celebrities are asked questions and the contestants judge the legitimacy of their answers to win the game.

name: Revival
description: In a rural Wisconsin town, the recently deceased suddenly return from their graves—looking and acting like they always did. As fear and confusion spread, a local officer and single parent is pulled into a brutal murder investigation where anyone in town, living or revived, could be hiding the truth.

name: The Paper
description: A familiar documentary crew sets out to find a new workplace to follow and lands on a historic local newspaper in Toledo. As an eager publisher tries to bring the paper back to life, the cameras capture the messy, funny, and sometimes awkward push to keep the newsroom afloat.

name: Going Dutch
description: After an epically unfiltered rant, an arrogant, loudmouth U.S. Army Colonel is reassigned to the Netherlands, where he is punished with a command position at the least important army base in the world.

name: The Waterfront
description: A wealthy North Carolina fishing family battles through dangerous seas as their crumbling business empire teeters on the edge. With serious financial trouble and escalating criminal pressure, the family must scramble to survive while old conflicts resurface and loyalty is tested.

name: Sheriff Country
description: A small-town sheriff patrols Edgewater while investigating local crimes and trying to keep order in a community with limited resources. At home, family tensions run high as she deals with an ex-con parent and a troubling, unresolved incident tied to her rebellious child.

name: Rooster
description: On a college campus, a writer tries to balance work, family, and the everyday chaos around him. As he navigates a complicated bond with his daughter, awkward encounters and quirky people push him to rethink what he wants from relationships and life.

name: Doc
description: After a brain injury wipes the last eight years of her life, a determined doctor must rebuild her work and identity with only a few close people to guide her. Alongside challenging medical cases, she reconnects with a changed personal life and fights to keep practicing despite major gaps.

name: Spider-Noir
description: Ben Reilly, an aging and down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, is forced to grapple with his past life as the city's one and only superhero.

name: Young Sherlock
description: Disgraced and raw, a young Sherlock Holmes gets pulled into his first murder case, putting his freedom at risk. What begins as a personal mystery quickly spirals into a globe-trotting conspiracy with far-reaching consequences for his life.

name: Haunted Hotel
description: A single parent inherits a strange hotel and moves in, only to find it filled with supernatural residents who have no plans to leave. The show mixes spooky chaos, family friction, and offbeat humor in an adult animated setting.

name: Bet
description: In an elite private school, social status is determined by high-stakes gambling, where a new student with a mysterious past stirs up the hierarchy. As bets escalate, the student’s plans shift from disruption to revenge, drawing everyone into increasingly tense games.

name: American Gladiators
description: Amateur athletes face off in demanding physical contests against each other and against the show’s resident gladiators. The series centers on high-energy challenges, including a punishing obstacle course, as competitors push their strength and endurance to the limit.

name: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes
description: Familiar duo Mordecai and Rigby navigate mundane park jobs that inevitably spiral into surreal, chaotic disasters.

name: Sean Combs: The Reckoning
description: This 2025 TV miniseries traces Sean Combs’ rise as a music mogul and the public image behind his empire, using footage and insider accounts. It also explores the troubling allegations surrounding his career, presenting both the success and the darker shadows that followed.

name: The Rainmaker
description: Fresh out of law school, a new lawyer jumps into a tense battle in and out of court against a seasoned rival, while dealing with personal stakes. As a team digs into the case, two linked conspiracies emerge around the mysterious death of their client’s son.

name: Countdown
description: After an officer tied to Homeland Security is murdered in broad daylight, a LAPD detective is pulled into a secret task force with undercover agents to investigate. As the search unfolds, it reveals a far darker plot and sets off a race against time to save a city of millions.

name: Talamasca: The Secret Order
description: A young man is recruited into a secret international organization that monitors the supernatural. As he learns the group’s methods and rules, he follows a trail tied to his own family’s hidden connection to an immortal world of strange powers and unsettling threats.

name: All's Fair
description: A group of ambitious divorce attorneys break away from a male-dominated firm to build their own powerful practice. As they handle high-stakes breakups and messy secrets, their loyalties and personal lives are tested.

name: The American Revolution
description: This miniseries explores the American Revolution as more than a fight for independence, tracing how it unfolded as a local civil conflict and a global struggle at the same time. Spanning battlefields and communities from the Atlantic coast to far beyond, it follows the era’s people through victory, defeat, and a crisis that reshaped a new nation and the wider world.

name: Bait
description: A struggling actor nears a career-changing audition, only for the pressure to unsettle his sense of self and strain the people around him. As ambition, identity, and paranoia collide, the story shifts into a strange mix of personal crisis and conspiracy-tinged unease.

name: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
description: When a teenager goes missing, the investigation reveals that multiple young men and boys have disappeared under the suspected actions of John Wayne Gacy. The series follows the hunt for answers and the ripple effects on families and law enforcement.

name: Suits LA
description: A former federal prosecutor rebuilds his career in Los Angeles by representing powerful clients. When his law firm hits a breaking point, he’s forced to take on a kind of work he once looked down on, testing his principles and pushing him into morally gray choices.

name: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen
description: As a wedding day approaches, a bride becomes convinced that something horrifying is waiting for her at the altar. Each step toward the ceremony deepens the dread, turning what should be a celebration into a spiraling nightmare.

name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: A century before the world of Game of Thrones, two unlikely travelers roam Westeros with honor and misfit bravery. A tall, earnest knight and his small squire face powerful foes and dangerous exploits in an era when dragons still live in memory.

name: Half Man
description: An unexpected arrival at a wedding sparks a violent turning point, sending the story back through the tangled history of two estranged men. The series explores family conflict, buried resentment, and the events that shaped their bond over time.

name: Haha, You Clowns
description: A tender animated comedy follows three big-hearted teenage brothers and their gentle dad as they navigate everyday adventures while coping with the loss of their mom. With goofy moments, oddball energy, and surprising warmth, the family learns how to keep moving forward while feeling her presence in small, meaningful ways.

name: The House of the Spirits
description: Across a century of violent social change, a powerful family is shaped by passion, pride, secrets, and forbidden love. As revolution rises around them, personal loyalties and old wounds threaten to pull generations apart.

name: Rooster Fighter
description: A fearless rooster becomes an unlikely defender of humanity, taking on towering monsters with bold confidence, a big heart, and a signature battle cry. Packed with comedy and action, the story follows this underdog hero as each new threat tests his courage and determination.

name: Dexter: Resurrection
description: A man wakes to find his son missing and heads to New York determined to repair the damage between them. As they each wrestle with their darker impulses, old questions and unfinished business close in, turning a search for closure into a tense reckoning.

name: Off Campus
description: A student tutor helps a hockey captain try to win over her crush, and their arrangement grows into a real bond. As they navigate college life, both of them confront lingering feelings and past choices.

name: Adults
description: A group of twenty-somethings in New York try to figure out adulthood while aiming to be good people, even when they are still learning who they are. The series follows their messy, funny attempts to navigate friendship, work, and everyday life.

name: HIS & HERS
description: Two estranged spouses, one a detective and the other a news reporter, compete to solve a murder. Each one suspects the other, turning their investigation into a tense battle of information, distrust, and competing motives.

name: Shifting Gears
description: A stubborn widower runs a classic car restoration shop and prefers life on his own terms. When his estranged adult child moves back in with two teens, the household becomes a daily test of patience, boundaries, and rebuilding trust—turning family life into a different kind of restoration.

name: Take That
description: This three-part docuseries looks back at the rise, pressure, fallout, and lasting appeal of one of the UK’s biggest boy bands. Through candid interviews and a strong focus on the songs, it traces decades of fame, friendship, setbacks, and reinvention.

name: Legends
description: In 1990s Britain, drugs flood the streets, and a team of civil servants is pulled into an undercover operation. Their mission is to bring down the gangs driving the crisis.

name: F1: The Academy
description: Fifteen young women break barriers in one of the world's most demanding sports as they race to get a female driver back on the Formula 1 grid.

name: Mid-Century Modern
description: Three best friends decide to spend their golden years together in Palm Springs after an unexpected death, moving into the home of the wealthiest one who lives with his mother. The series follows their chosen-family bonds as they navigate life together with humor and heart.

name: Ripple
