description: Set in New York City, four strangers face their own personal struggles. Their separate journeys unexpectedly intertwine, forming new connections and reshaping how they see their lives.

name: Widow's Bay
description: A mayor pushes to remake a small New England town into a tourist destination, ignoring repeated warnings that the place is cursed. The series sets up a clash between economic ambition, local superstition, and the unsettling past hanging over the community.

name: PONIES
description: In 1977 Moscow, two overlooked women are pulled into espionage after personal tragedy exposes a dangerous Cold War conspiracy. As they learn the rules of spy work, their unlikely partnership draws them deeper into secrets, risks, and shifting loyalties.

name: Lord of the Flies
description: After a plane crash, a group of schoolboys are left alone on a tropical island with no adults to guide them. What begins as an effort to build rules, share responsibilities, and stay hopeful slowly turns into fear, rivalry, and a breakdown of order.

name: M.I.A.
description: A restless young woman longs to escape the Florida Keys for the glamour of Miami. After a family crime operation is torn apart by tragedy, she is pulled into the city's dangerous underworld and forced to confront how far she is willing to go.

name: Long Way Home
description: Two longtime friends set off on a motorcycle journey from Scotland to England, taking the scenic route through much of Europe on aging bikes. Along the way, the series mixes road-trip banter with striking stops, local encounters, and a relaxed travel vibe.

name: Long Story Short
description: This animated comedy follows a family across different points in time, tracking siblings as they move from childhood into adulthood and revisit earlier moments. With sharp humor and heartfelt honesty, it explores how family bonds, old wounds, and everyday choices echo across the years.

name: Unchosen
description: Inside a tightly controlled British cult, a woman feels increasingly trapped between a stifling marriage and the arrival of a compelling outsider with a dangerous past. As pressure builds behind closed doors, personal loyalty and the hope of escape become harder to untangle.

name: Murdaugh: Death in the Family
description: A wealthy Southern legal family comes under intense scrutiny after a deadly boat crash pulls back the curtain on privilege, influence, and buried tensions. As more troubling connections surface, the drama follows how public pressure and private dysfunction threaten a carefully protected way of life.

name: The 'Burbs
description: A young couple moves back into a familiar suburban street, hoping for a fresh start. When new neighbors arrive, long-buried secrets begin to surface, and the block’s friendly facade gives way to suspicion, dark humor, and escalating danger that threatens everyone’s sense of safety.

name: The Chair Company
description: After a humiliating mishap at a major workplace event, a suburban family man becomes convinced he’s uncovered something much bigger than he expected. What starts as an effort to fix a wrong spirals into a surreal, far-reaching conspiracy that pulls him deeper and deeper.

name: Playing Gracie Darling
description: Decades after a teenage girl vanished during a séance in a small town, a copycat disappearance pulls her former friend back home. As a chilling local game turns dangerous, old fears resurface and a search for answers forces the community to confront its past.

name: Robin Hood
description: This modern reimagining of the classic tale follows a Saxon forester’s son and a Norman lord’s daughter as their romance grows amid a turbulent, occupied England. Together, they set out to fight corruption, challenge unjust power, and help restore peace to the land.

name: Iron Man and His Awesome Friends
description: Follow the adventures (and misadventures) of best friends and super geniuses, Tony Stark, Riri Williams and Amadeus Cho as they work together to solve problems both big and small and protect their city.

name: The Beauty
description: High fashion turns sinister as international supermodels begin dying in gruesome, mysterious ways. FBI agents are sent to Paris to investigate, only to uncover a sexually transmitted virus that pushes people toward physical perfection—at terrifying cost.

name: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
description: Follow a tween vampire girl who leaves the safety of Transylvania to attend a performing arts boarding school. Living amongst humans for the first time, she pursues her passion for music while keeping her vampire identity a secret, something that’s made more challenging when her overprotective father charges an overzealous ghost to live with her at the school.

name: I Love LA
description: A codependent group tries to figure out life and love in Los Angeles, where ambitions and relationships keep colliding. One aspiring talent manager feels stuck in a routine living situation until a longtime best friend, fresh and frenzied, returns and shakes up the orbit of their plans.

name: Not a Box
description: Get creative with bright-eyed bunny Riley! With just one cardboard box, Riley imagines magical worlds full of new friends and fantastic adventures.

name: Electric Bloom
description: Follow the three members of a mega-famous pop group, Electric Bloom, as they look back and tell the story of their band and friendship, starting with the day they all met in middle school. The girls go on a journey to becoming the biggest band in the world and the best friends in the universe.

name: Stranger Things: Tales from '85
description: Set in a harsh winter in 1985, this series returns to a small town where familiar friends face frightening new creatures and a growing paranormal mystery. As fear spreads, they must work together to protect their home from another strange threat.

name: Running Point
description: A former party girl gets an unexpected chance to run her family’s professional basketball team and must prove she belongs in a high-pressure, male-dominated world. The show mixes workplace comedy, family friction, and light sports stakes.

name: Long Bright River
description: A Philadelphia police officer patrols a neighborhood hit hard by the opioid crisis. When murders begin, her investigation connects to her own past as she balances the case with personal worries, including a missing sister.

name: Malice
description: A charming tutor moves into a wealthy family’s world and quickly stirs up unsettling changes. As the household’s secrets come into focus, the arrangement reveals a darker plan underneath the glamour.

name: Love Story
description: An anthology of sweeping true love stories that captured the world’s attention.

name: Boots
description: A bullied teenager impulsively joins Marine boot camp hoping to reinvent himself, only to find the experience far harsher and more revealing than expected. As training pushes everyone to their limits, unexpected bonds, humor, and hard truths turn survival into a search for belonging.

name: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
description: A 100-day expedition pushes a team through some of Earth’s most extreme environments, traveling from one pole to the other alongside scientists, explorers, and local experts. Along the way, the journey mixes awe-inspiring landscapes with accessible science and personal reflection on what these places can teach us about resilience and change.

name: Pee-wee as Himself
description: This two-part miniseries offers a kaleidoscopic look at the imaginative artist behind a beloved performer persona, told through life story and reflections. It blends archival material with fresh interviews, tracing early ambitions, creative breakthroughs, and the personal cost of a public image.

name: The Celebrity Traitors
description: An all-star cast play the ultimate game of deceit and betrayal.

name: Cape Fear
description: A storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna and Tom Bowden when Max Cady, the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison and wants revenge.

name: The Madison
description: The Clyburns leave their comfortable New York City lives for the wild beauty of Montana’s Madison River Valley in search of connection. After a sudden loss reshapes everything, they try to find peace and rebuild their lives while navigating grief and family dynamics.

name: The Yogurt Shop Murders
description: In 1991, four teenage girls were brutally murdered at a frozen yogurt shop in Austin, Texas. What happened that night forever shook the Austin community and continues to mystify the police and haunt the families left in the wake of unthinkable loss.

name: Étoile
description: To help struggling ballet institutions, two acclaimed companies in New York City and Paris swap their brightest stars as they each try to revive their fortunes. The plan sparks intense rivalry, culture clash, and constant pressure as the art world’s high stakes hit both sides.

name: DTF St. Louis
description: A group of middle-aged adults, worn down by restless relationships and everyday dissatisfaction, get pulled into a risky romantic entanglement. What starts as an escape from routine turns darker as suspicion, desire, and consequences build around a mysterious death.

name: The Lowdown
description: The Lowdown follows a gritty citizen journalist in Tulsa, relentlessly chasing what he believes is the truth even when it puts him in danger. His investigative drive keeps landing him in trouble as he digs deeper into the stories around him.

name: Extracted
description: A group of everyday competitors is dropped into the harsh Canadian wilderness to endure brutal weather, dangerous terrain, and the fear of predators. Far away, their loved ones are confined to a secluded headquarters, watching a nonstop live feed and making high-pressure choices that can help—or pull—them from the game.

name: Imperfect Women
description: After a murder upends the lives of three lifelong friends, their bond is pushed to the limit. As investigators dig deeper, long-buried resentments surface and trust fractures, forcing each woman to question what she truly knows about the others.

name: Celebrity Bear Hunt
description: Holly Willoughby hosts this competition show set in the Costa Rican jungle, where 12 celebrities become prey for legendary survival expert, Bear Grylls.

name: Smoke
description: An arson investigator is forced to work with a police detective to stop two arsonists. Their investigation sparks a tense chase driven by secrets, suspicion, and shifting trust as the fires reveal unsettling truths.

name: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair
description: After years of keeping away from his family, Malcolm is pulled back in when his father and mother insist he show up for their 40th anniversary party. He tries to manage the fallout—especially with the people he’s been trying to protect.

name: With Love, Meghan
description: A lifestyle series set at a sunny California estate where a host welcomes friends and well-known guests for relaxed get-togethers. Each episode mixes simple cooking, gardening, and hosting ideas, aiming for an easy, feel-good escape with plenty of pretty presentation and homey inspiration.

name: Devil in the Family: The Fall of Ruby Franke
description: When popular vlogger Ruby Franke is arrested in August 2023 for child abuse, a widely watched online family story unravels. The series revisits how their YouTube channel presented a perfect household, then shows the family’s turn toward counseling that leads to a terrifying downward spiral.

name: Finding Her Edge
description: A former ice dancer returns to the rink and pairs up with a promising new partner, hoping to rebuild her confidence and chase big goals. But old feelings for her first love complicate training, relationships, and the choices she has to make on and off the ice.

name: Beyond the Gates
description: In a wealthy gated community, a powerful family sits at the center of love, rivalry, ambition, and scandal. This daytime soap follows the secrets and social drama simmering behind polished doors as relationships, loyalties, and reputations come under pressure.

name: Goosebumps: The Vanishing
description: When twins Devin and Cece are sent to spend a summer in Gravesend, Brooklyn with their divorced dad, scientist Anthony Brewer, they must band together with new friends to save the neighborhood from a long-dormant threat.

name: Man vs Baby
description: As Christmas nears, a well-meaning dad ends up housesitting a luxurious London penthouse while also looking after a lost baby. What follows is a light, chaotic holiday comedy built around one awkward problem after another in a family-friendly setting.

name: Goldie
description: Follow Goldie as she shakes up her beloved town of Boysenberg with her best friends. Together, they learn that being different is something to celebrate—and it's a whole lot of fun.

name: American Manhunt: Osama bin Laden
description: Featuring rare footage and interviews with CIA insiders, this documentary series follows the long, high-stakes effort to track down Osama bin Laden. It traces how agents monitored his activity for years and pursued multiple leads before the final operation in 2011.

name: Miss Governor
description: As she tries to shine in politics, Mississippi's first Black lieutenant governor must manage her zany family and overcome a boss who's stuck in the past.

name: WWE LFG
description: Take an inside look at what it truly takes to make it in the WWE. Iconic WWE Legends such as Paul "Triple H" Levesque and Shawn Michaels and weekly regular coaches Undertaker, Booker T, Mickie James and Bubba Ray Dudley mentor a new generation in weekly matches on their quest to become the next WWE Superstars.

name: The Carters: Hurts to Love You
description: Unravel a deeply disturbing path told by Angel Conrad, Nick and Aaron Carter's sister, along with first-time interviews with friends Melissa Joan Hart and Scout Willis. Never-before-seen home movies that detail the brothers' rise to fame and the devastating toll it took on their family also help tell the Carters’ story.

name: Everybody's Live with John Mulaney
description: This live weekly talk show mixes celebrity interviews, themed discussions, music, and unpredictable call-ins. The tone is loose, offbeat, and intentionally chaotic, aiming for a more playful and experimental feel than a standard sit-down chat series.

name: American Murder: Gabby Petito
description: What happened in the final days of Gabby Petito’s life? In this gripping true-crime miniseries, her loved ones share the untold story of her disappearance and tragic murder, built from accounts and recovered material from a road trip that captured plenty of attention.

name: Boston Blue
description: A seasoned New York detective starts over with the Boston police, where a new partner and a tightly connected law enforcement family shape his next chapter. Alongside fresh cases, he also hopes to rebuild family ties in the city.

name: Not Suitable for Work
description: Follow five work-obsessed twenty-somethings striving for professional success and, if they have time, personal happiness in Manhattan's most glamorous neighborhood, Murray Hill.

name: Big Mistakes
description: Blackmailed into working for dangerous criminals, two deeply incompetent siblings get pulled into organized crime. What follows is a chaotic string of failures as they try to survive while staying wildly unprepared.

name: Number One on the Call Sheet
description: A documentary miniseries where major Hollywood stars share candid interviews about how they landed career-defining leading roles. It explores the highs and lows of the craft, breakthrough moments, lessons learned from an evolving industry, and hopes for the next generation to push things further.

name: 9-1-1: Nashville
description: Set in Nashville, this series follows first responders handling emergencies while also dealing with family power struggles, glamour, and messy personal ties. It mixes rescue action with relationship drama in a setting that aims for both heart and high-stakes chaos.

name: Million Dollar Secret
description: In this cutthroat competition series, an undercover millionaire must blend in with the group while staying hidden and evading elimination. All while the money remains at stake and the game keeps forcing high-stakes decisions from the contestants.

name: Adolescence
description: When a 13-year-old is accused of murdering a classmate, his family, therapist, and the detective overseeing the case are left wondering what really happened. As the accusation spreads, each person is forced to confront what they believe—and what they might be missing.

name: Nemesis
description: A relentless LAPD cop becomes obsessed with taking down the master thief behind a string of daring heists — and only one can come out on top.

name: Wylde Pak
description: Two half-siblings spend a summer under one roof and have to figure out how to get along while adjusting to a new family routine. Between everyday mishaps and helping out at a chaotic pet grooming business, they learn to balance their very different interests and grow closer.

name: Hollywood Demons
description: This docuseries explores some of Hollywood’s darkest scandals through interviews with insiders, collaborators, and survivors. Across six documentaries, it focuses on abuse, exploitation, and the personal struggles behind public image.

name: Fight for Glory: 2024 World Series
description: Experience the battle of juggernauts like never before as the Yankees and Dodgers revive MLB's most iconic playoff rivalry. With intimate access to superstar players, managers, and their families, witness the sacrifices it takes to claim baseball's throne.

name: Vladimir
description: When an English professor becomes fixated on a new colleague, her marriage and career unravel in messy, high-pressure ways. As obsession grows, the relationship dynamics around her start causing increasing chaos at home and in academia.

name: Saturday Night Live UK
description: A live weekly comedy series brings the fast-paced, unpredictable spirit of a famous late-night sketch format to the UK. With a distinctly British angle, it mixes sketches and live-show energy in a way that aims to feel fresh, current, and playful.

name: Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld
description: Two outlaws face the galaxy’s dangerous underworld as they shape their futures. The stories follow separate criminal paths, blending tense encounters with darker, moral gray choices as they navigate forces that pull them in different directions.

name: LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy - Pieces of the Past
description: A new threat rises in the galaxy, and Sig Greebling and Darth Dev must combine their powers of Force Building and Sith Breaking to stop it. Alongside Jedi Bob, Yesi Scala and Servo, they will journey into the deepest corners of Lego Star Wars lore, uncovering pieces of all the galaxies that have come before.

name: The Testaments
description: Growing up in Gilead, a new generation of young women confronts a bleak future they were never meant to question. Pushed to find allies, old and new, they fight for freedom while risking everything to change what comes next.

name: Monster: The Ed Gein Story
description: The shocking true-life tale of Ed Gein, the infamous murderer and grave robber who inspired many of Hollywood's most iconic on-screen killers.

name: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
description: After the Clone Wars, Maul tries to rebuild his criminal syndicate from the ground up. He sets his plans in motion on a planet that the Empire has not reached yet, aiming to carve out a new power base.

name: WWE: Unreal
description: This docuseries goes behind the curtain of WWE’s biggest events, following performers and staff as they plan, rehearse, and deliver massive live spectacles. It highlights the pressure, teamwork, and personal stakes involved in turning scripted entertainment into a high-risk show that still feels real to the crowd.

name: CIA
description: A rule-following federal agent is pulled into a secret joint task force and paired with a more unpredictable intelligence operative. Working covert cases in New York, the duo tackles terrorist threats, international schemes, and dangerous secrets while learning to navigate their very different styles.

name: Marshals
description: After leaving ranch life behind, a former soldier joins an elite team of federal marshals in Montana. As they take on violent threats across the region, the job tests the balance between duty, family, and the emotional strain of being the last line of defense.

name: Mating Season
description: Set in the animal world, the series follows a cast of bears, raccoons, deer, foxes and a host of other horny, lovable forest critters, as they navigate love, sexual relationships and the universal need to hook up and find a partner.

name: Hell Motel
description: A group of 10 true crime obsessives are invited to the opening weekend of the newly renovated Cold River Motel, the site of a 30-year-old unsolved satanic mass murder. History repeats itself when the guests get stranded and start getting knocked off one by one during a murder spree that grows exponentially more gruesome than the original with each kill.

name: DMV
description: In a DMV office where everyone arrives annoyed, a group of underpaid employees tries to survive the daily grind with humor and camaraderie. Between awkward customer encounters and workplace chaos, they lean on each other to get through a thankless job and find small moments of connection.

name: Power Moves with Shaquille O'Neal
description: NBA legends Shaquille O'Neal and Allen Iverson work to revive Reebok's legacy and find a rising star to rep the brand.

name: Stumble
description: A driven coach takes charge of a newly formed junior college cheer squad, aiming for another title while trying to lift up a group of underdog students. The series mixes competition, personal growth, and a goofy mockumentary-style look at teamwork.

name: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
description: In Rhode Island’s close-knit social circles, old friendships, family reputations, and long-held loyalties shape every gathering. As guarded secrets and betrayals test these bonds, the smallest state proves it can hold plenty of big drama.

name: The Black Dagger Brotherhood
description: A tight-knit group of vampire warriors fights to protect their kind from ruthless demonic enemies while trying to rebuild a fragile world. As danger closes in, loyalties are tested and intense romances spark, pulling newcomers into a secret, gritty supernatural society.

name: The Faithful
description: This event miniseries follows a group of courageous, passionate, and flawed women as they navigate belief, family, and power in their world. Told through their perspectives, it traces the roots and legacy that would influence Judaism, Christianity, and Islam.

name: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
description: A disgraced former football player is on a mission to rehabilitate his image.

name: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
description: Welcome back to Elmore, where reality bends like a prank and family life is anything but ordinary. In The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball, a mischievous kid and their siblings are pulled into increasingly surreal adventures, tangling with wild threats and offbeat dilemmas across town.

name: Velvet, El Nuevo Imperio
description: Talented designer Ana Velázquez arrives at Velvet and falls in love with Alberto Márquez, heir to the company, but their love must overcome many intrigues, including a marriage of convenience.

name: Memory of a Killer
description: A man leads two starkly different lives: a dangerous hitman by night and a quiet family man in upstate America. When he faces memory loss after losing a brother to the same illness, threats rise for both worlds.

name: Scrubs
description: A beloved hospital comedy returns as longtime friends reunite at Sacred Heart after many years apart. As medicine and the newest interns have changed, familiar and fresh faces try to balance pressure, friendship, laughter, and heartfelt moments.

name: Mr. Scorsese
description: Explore the many lives of Martin Scorsese through intimate interviews, private archives, and conversations with major collaborators. The series connects his personal journey to his films, showing how experiences and viewpoints shaped the work you know.

name: aka Charlie Sheen
description: Actor Charlie Sheen tells his story in this candid two-part documentary, taking viewers through a dazzling Hollywood rise, a tabloid-topping fall, and the beginnings of his road to recovery. Expect an up-close, personal look at fame’s highs and lows.

name: KPOPPED
description: Global music icons team up with world-renowned K-pop idols for spectacular song battles. Performing their biggest hits with a K-pop twist, these artists show up, show out, and shut it down in a friendly competition for the ultimate bragging rights.

name: Girl Taken
description: After a young woman is taken from a quiet rural town and later escapes years later, she returns to a family and community changed by the trauma. The series focuses less on the abduction itself and more on the emotional fallout, strained relationships, and difficult path toward rebuilding a life.

name: Strip Law
description: An uptight lawyer joins forces with a flashy Las Vegas magician to tackle the city’s most ridiculous legal problems. Together with a ragtag law office, they chase quick wins, big personalities, and nonstop chaos as each case spirals into wacky, adult animated comedy.

name: The Lady
description: A young woman’s life changes fast when she lands a dream job at Buckingham Palace and forms a close bond with a royal figure. As the glamour fades, her private life grows more complicated, pulling her into a tense, real-life-inspired story that moves from high society to serious consequences.

name: The Sisters Grimm
description: One year after their parents' mysterious disappearance, sisters Sabrina and Daphne move to a magical town where fairytales are real and secrets lurk behind every corner.

name: Dutton Ranch
description: Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on starting over in South Texas. The dream of a future away from the past collides with harsh new realities and a rival ranch determined to protect its empire.

name: R.J. Decker
description: In South Florida, an ex-con photographer reinvents himself as a private investigator, taking on oddball cases with help from people close to law, media, and his complicated past. The show mixes mystery, humor, and local weirdness with a laid-back detective vibe.

name: Armorsaurs
description: Dinosaurs are back, and five teens are the only ones who can bond with them. It's up to these heroes to armor up and pilot their dinos to fight evil and save the world.

name: True Haunting
description: People recount unsettling paranormal experiences in their own words, paired with present-day interviews and immersive reenactments. Each story leans into eerie atmosphere and personal testimony, inviting you to decide what you believe as the strange events build and questions linger.

name: The End of an Era
description: This behind-the-scenes docuseries chronicles how a global tour phenomenon took shape, focusing on its development, impact, and day-to-day inner workings. It also offers an intimate look at life on the road as the tour headlines worldwide, with insights from performers, family, and friends who helped make it happen.

name: The Bad Guys: The Series
description: How did the Bad Guys break into the bad guy business in the first place? Find out in this hilarious prequel series set before the hit films.

name: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
description: Explores the murder of Byron Griffy, a respected mortician, who was found dead on his remote ranch, shot execution-style.

name: Heated Rivalry
description: Two hockey rookies at the center of big-league ambition find themselves tangled in a secret fling that grows into years of love, denial, and self-discovery. Torn between the sport they live for and feelings they can’t ignore, they have to figure out whether real love can survive in a fiercely competitive world.

name: Fire and Water: Making the Avatar Films
description: This two-part documentary provides a fascinating glimpse into the making of the Oscar-winning box office phenomenon "Avatar: The Way of Water" and features exclusive behind-the-scenes footage, concept art, and interviews with cast and filmmakers.

name: Funny AF with Kevin Hart
description: A comedy competition series follows a nationwide search for the next breakout stand-up act, guided by well-known comedy mentors. The journey builds toward a live finale where the winner is decided in real time by audience voting.

name: Handsome Devil: Charming Killer
description: This three-part docuseries revisits the brutal murders of two women and follows the investigation, trial, and public reaction. It also examines how the accused became an unexpected social media fixation, raising unsettling questions about charisma, attention, and the way online fandom can distort reality.

name: It's Not Like That
description: Freshly divorced Lori and recently widowed minister Malcolm, friends with teens, navigate singlehood while questioning if their longstanding bond hints at a romantic future

name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
description: This docuseries looks back at a once-glamorous modeling competition that grew into a pop-culture phenomenon, then became known for intense drama and lasting controversy. Through interviews and reflection, it revisits how the show’s biggest moments were made—and why they still spark debate and viral reactions today.

name: Free Bert
description: A loud, messy dad and his unfiltered family shake up their lives when they land at an elite school filled with judgmental parents and strict expectations. As they try to fit in, their chaotic honesty sparks clashes, awkward moments, and surprising heart at home and on campus.

name: Trust Me: The False Prophet
description: This TV miniseries chronicles the rise of a self-proclaimed religious leader as one couple infiltrates his inner circle and watches his influence grow. Told through their perspective, the story builds tension around manipulation, devotion, and the search for truth.

name: Jury Duty Presents: Company Retreat
description: A temp joins a hot sauce company’s annual retreat as the longtime leader prepares to step down. As an eager heir tries to prove himself, an outside buyout offer adds pressure and awkward workplace tension.

name: 4x20: Quick Hits
description: This anthology series brings together four short films, each about a widely loved plant and the people connected to it. Across quick, self-contained stories, it explores enthusiasm, culture, and personal perspectives in a compact format.

name: Wonder Man
description: Simon and Trevor, two actors from very different career stages, pursue life-changing opportunities while balancing personal ambition and superhero-linked secrets. As they chase roles that could change everything, the show blends workplace drama with moments of humor and heart.

name: My Brother the Minotaur
description: A human-raised minotaur begins having dreams tied to a mythical past and sets off on an adventure to make sense of them. With help from a brother and close friends, the journey becomes a search for identity, belonging, and where home really is.

name: Hulk Hogan: Real American
description: This documentary series looks past the larger-than-life public image to explore the person behind a wrestling legend. Built around a candid final interview, it promises a personal, unfiltered look at fame, identity, and legacy.

name: Bear Grylls is Running Wild
description: In this adventure series, a survival expert takes major celebrities on intense 48-hour trips through harsh wilderness settings. The journey mixes demanding outdoor challenges with candid conversations that show a more personal side of the guests.

name: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Strange Tails
description: Hawkeye and The Avengers have made saving the world look easy. But now they face their wildest threat yet: SOCIAL MEDIA. To save the world, a new team must be recruited to help our heroes contend with an influencer bent on cataclysmic destruction.

name: American Primeval
description: In a brutal frontier setting, a mother and child on the run join forces with unlikely allies while trying to survive a land shaped by violence, fear, and hard choices. Their journey becomes both an escape from the past and a test of what family can mean in a merciless world.

name: Washington Black
description: An 11-year-old boy escapes a brutal life on a Barbados sugar plantation by taking to the skies in an experimental flying machine. As he travels across the world with an unlikely companion, he searches for freedom, belonging, and a sense of identity while trying to stay one step ahead of the past.

name: This Is a Gardening Show
description: A light, playful series follows a curious host exploring gardening with self-deprecating humor and a genuine love of the natural world. Along the way, it offers approachable advice, simple tools, and easy tips for viewers who want to grow their own connection to plants.

name: The Cult of NatureBoy
description: This miniseries follows the rise of a social media figure who builds an alternative lifestyle community and urges followers to cut ties with their families for a promised utopia. What starts as an online movement steadily grows darker and more disturbing.

name: Zero Day
description: After a devastating cyberattack throws the country into chaos, a retired national leader is pulled back into public life to head an emergency investigation. As pressure mounts from politics, media, and public fear, the search for answers uncovers a tangled network of deception and competing agendas.

name: The Residence
description: During a high-profile state dinner, a murder inside the White House residence turns staff and guests into suspects. An unusual detective digs through secrets, rivalries, and misdirection to uncover what really happened.

name: Spartacus: House of Ashur
description: In an alternate timeline, a once-overthrown gladiator clawed his way back to power and now controls the same gladiator school. With a fierce ally at his side, he drives a new wave of brutal spectacle that clashes with the powerful elite.

name: Secrets of the Penguins
description: Over two extraordinary years, National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory discovered never-before-filmed secret traditions, surprising intelligence and close-knit societies of penguins. This astonishing series reveals they are more like us than we ever dreamed, from their powerful friendships to the courageous risk-takers using ingenuity and innovation in some of the world's most extreme places.

name: Good American Family
description: A Midwestern couple adopts a child they believe has dwarfism, but their confidence slowly cracks as doubts grow about who she really is. As perspectives shift, the story blurs what’s presented and what may be true, creating mounting unease.

name: Wayward
description: In a quiet town, a local officer begins to question a school meant to reform troubled teens and the influence of its magnetic leader. As suspicion grows, the community’s polished surface starts to feel more unsettling than reassuring.

name: SNL50: Beyond Saturday Night
description: This documentary series goes behind the scenes of a long-running live comedy institution, covering auditions, the writing process, famous sketches, and a turbulent season that helped define its future. It focuses on how the show is built each week and why it became such a cultural force.

name: Court of Gold
description: This behind-the-scenes docuseries follows several top men’s basketball medal contenders at the 2024 Paris Olympics as they chase gold. It mixes locker-room access, interviews, and game-day pressure while highlighting multiple nations and the personalities, history, and rivalries that shape the tournament.

name: The Survivors
description: Fifteen years after a tragedy killed three young people and shook a quiet seaside town, a mysterious death of a young woman brings old fears back to the surface. As the past returns, the town is forced to confront what was left unresolved.

name: Jerry Springer: Fights, Camera, Action
description: This documentary miniseries looks behind the scenes of a notorious American talk show, exploring how its explosive on-screen conflicts became a cultural lightning rod. It also examines scandals connected to the production and the controversy surrounding its rise.

name: The Dinosaurs
description: This epic documentary miniseries traces dinosaurs across 165 million years, from their earliest appearances to their final era. It explores how changing forces over time shaped their evolution and the environments they lived in.

name: The Diamond Heist
description: A bold crew sets out to steal a priceless diamond in a real-life caper, while investigators work to stay one step ahead. Told through interviews and lively reenactments, the series tracks the planning, the pressure, and the cat-and-mouse chase from both sides.

name: Twisted Yoga
description: Ex-members of a tantric yoga school speak out about how they went from searching for wellness and community to fearing they'd joined a cult, and seeking justice for alleged abuse and manipulation at the hands of a self-styled guru.

name: Paul American
description: Global sports and entertainment superstars Jake and Logan Paul are pulling back the curtain for their latest venture: a family reality TV show.

name: WWE EVOLVE
description: A new generation of WWE prospects begin their in-ring journey with the goal of becoming the next great Superstar.

name: Taylor
description: Dig deep across Taylor Swift's 20-year career, a period that has seen her transcend the realm of pop star to become a cultural icon. Through interviews with high-profile commentators, industry insiders and fans, discover the forces that have shaped her trajectory and the devoted community she inspires.

name: Meet Iron Man and His Awesome Friends
description: Join young genius inventor Tony Stark (Iron Man) and his team of heroic friends as they embark on thrilling adventures, using their tech, teamwork, and quick thinking to save the day!

name: Variety & CNN Actors on Actors
description: Critically acclaimed performers are paired in candid, unscripted conversations about their craft.

name: Cartoon Cartoons
description: The revival of the Cartoon Cartoons Program, featuring many new shorts across the Cartoon Network Studios Team Staff.

name: Oh My God... Yes! A Series of Extremely Relatable Circumstances
description: Follow three women – Sunny, Tulip, and Ladi – who live in the not-so-distant future of South Central LA as they navigate womanhood in an unpredictable, tech-driven world.

name: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed
description: A newly divorced mom falls down a dangerous rabbit hole of blackmail, murder, and youth soccer.

name: Testament
description: The series is a modern-day reimagining of the Book of Acts that follows the early followers of Jesus in an alternate, modern era. A resurrection sparks a new movement that turns the world upside down, spreading hope amid chaos. As the followers risk everything to preach the good news, the Temple races to silence them before the oppressive Imperium regime retaliates. But public miracles, unburied secrets, and fractured loyalties force both sides to confront the true cost of their choices.

name: The Witness
description: With their 2-year-old as the sole witness to her murder, Rachel Nickell's partner fights to protect him amid a flawed investigation.

name: Unconventional
description: Unconventional is a bold, hilarious, and deeply authentic look at modern queer life. Created by six-time Emmy nominee Kit Williamson (EastSiders, Mad Men), this irreverent comedy follows Noah Guillory (Williamson), a queer millennial juggling a decade-long marriage, the uncertainty of fatherhood, and the chaos of academia—all while acting as a sperm donor for his sister’s wife.

name: Lanterns
description: Two intergalactic cops, new recruit John Stewart and Lantern legend Hal Jordan, are drawn into a dark, earth-based mystery as they investigate a murder in the American heartland.

name: Gold & Greed: The Hunt for Fenn's Treasure
description: An eccentric man named Forrest Fenn sets off a real-life treasure hunt when he hides a chest of gold in the Rockies — and leaves clues in a cryptic poem.

name: Super Team Canada
description: Six little-known Canadian superheroes try to save the world from evil giant robots, an unemployed octopus and needy hardware store clerks. The stakes are high for the stereotypically underdog Canadian super-unknowns, who are called in as Earth’s last resort when all other superheroes have been destroyed.

name: David Blaine Do Not Attempt
description: A globe-spanning docuseries follows a performer as he meets remarkable people whose real-world abilities can look like magic. Along the way, he immerses himself in extraordinary cultures, learns demanding skills firsthand, and captures the awe, fear, and inspiration that come with pushing human limits.

name: Gabriel and the Guardians
description: It follows Gabriel, a Celestial Guardian in the mythical world of Ara who is tasked with protecting the Tree Eternal — even as his companions falter, Gabriel stays true to his mission and never loses hope through this story of identity, rebellion, faith and redemption.

name: No Taste Like Home with Antoni Porowski
description: A host takes celebrity guests across multiple countries to trace family heritage through local dishes and traditions. Along the way, they meet communities, learn surprising pieces of ancestry, and share meals that connect personal history with the flavors that shaped it.

name: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
description: Hosted by the iconic Henry Winkler, each 60-minute episode of this nostalgia-drenched series tells the stories of the things we did—for fun, for money, or out of plain boredom—that you can’t do anymore. Pastimes, practices, and products that were once allowed—even encouraged—which you will never see again in modern America.

name: Love Overboard
description: Sexy singles board a luxury yacht to mix, mingle, and chase romance, but enjoying the most extravagant perks comes with unexpected hurdles. As the voyage continues, connections deepen, alliances shift, and emotions run high while everyone fights to avoid being left behind.

name: Seen & Heard: The History of Black Television
description: Journey through the history of black representation on television, showcasing how black artists and creators both shaped and revolutionized the medium while confronting the systemic challenges that have often undermined their contributions.

name: A Knight in the Making
description: Follow "A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms" from the page to the screen in this fascinating and comprehensive look at how HBO's newest series in the Game of Thrones universe was brought to life.
